Peter, we were **SHOCKED** to hear that Nancy Pelosi is stepping down from Democratic leadership.

Nancy Pelosi spent decades in public service and 10 YEARS as our valiant House Speaker. **_Some of her accomplishments include:_**

✅ Skillfully negotiating key legislative wins
✅ Standing up to Trump
✅ Leading the Democratic caucus through incredibly tumultuous times

**Before she leaves the public stage, we need 2,000 Democrats to give us their honest opinion on her work:**

Republicans will officially take control of Congress in 4 days. And when they do, dangerous members like Marjorie Taylor Greene will instantly gain considerable power on committees.

And if you needed a reminder of just how extreme Greene is, take a look at what she said earlier this month: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56653775/385635515/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221230EOY_N_HQ_FULL_6_G_N_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmU0YjA0Ni1hMjg4LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gheXeXdYvTMfOMjWzzYxA_itPadtNH2KshtXu3m3NU=) **Greene said that the insurrectionists "would have won" on January 6 had she been leading them, and that the mob "would have been armed.**

body:
| McCarthy and the far-right Republicans he’s empowered have one objective — completely destroying the reputations of Democrats like Adam with personal smears and attacks, as they work to sabotage the Biden administration and stall our progress for the next two years.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1529%2E5257348%2ExGwZjm)
Derek, we’re just 24 hours away from the final FEC fundraising deadline of 2022 — and to be candid, we still have a lot of ground to cover if we are going to be prepared for what’s to come.
With Republicans just four days away from formally taking the House majority, we need to turn things around. And fast.
**[Derek, if you can spare it, rush $5 to support Adam ahead of the unhinged attacks McCarthy and the Republicans will be unleashing on him in the opening salvo of their House majority next week.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221230_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1529%2E5257348%2ExGwZjm)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Two Years Later
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Friends,

Can you believe it has already been two years? I wanted to reach out and wish you a Happy New Year and give you a quick update. Since you elected me to be your Commissioner of Securities and Insurance, we have gotten a lot done for the people of Montana.

Today, our agency sent out some of the highlights from 2022. I want to share it with you as well.

-Troy
---
|
---
| After two years as your Montana Commissioner of Securities and Insurance, I still smile every morning when I walk into the office. I am proud of the work we do to protect consumers, educate Montanans, and serve the people of this great state. From top to bottom, I am humbled by the work ethic, knowledge, and devotion to the mission of this agency shared by everyone on our team.

As we usher in the New Year, I want to highlight some of the agency’s major accomplishments during 2022. Our agency:

• Helped open the door to independent pharmacists rejoining TRICARE to better serve our military members and retirees with our letter to the Biden Administration – coupled with pressure from our Congressional delegation – and subsequent conversations with Express Scripts.

• Generated $124 million for the general fund and $39 million for the Healthy Montana Kids program (FY22).

• Formed the CSI Financial Abuse Specialist Team (FAST) to provide a coordinated response to elder financial exploitation referrals with a time-sensitive, targeted evaluation by securities and insurance specialists.

• Signed a Collaborative Enforcement Agreement with the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services to enforce certain provisions of the No Surprises Act.

• Filed through our legal team nearly 90 administrative enforcement actions and ordered nearly one million dollars in fines and fees.

• Closed over 1,200 complaints in the CSI Insurance Consumer Services Bureau and recovered over $8 million for Montana consumers.

• Approved over $340,000 in restitution payments to victims of [Metals.com](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=2e87b0e58a&e=a212bb87cc) using funds from the Lynne Egan Memorial Securities Restitution Assistance Fund.

• Denied $8,711,704 in rate increase requests between January and November – benefiting 12,852 Montanans.

• Served on the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC) Health Insurance and Managed Care Committee (Vice Chair), the American Indian and Alaskan Native Liaison Committee (Chair), and as a member of the Cybersecurity, Technology and Innovation Committee, International Liaison Committee, and Government Relations Leadership Council.

• As a member of the Board of Land Commissioners, voted to approve the acquisition of the Stonewall Hall building – Montana’s territorial capital building.

• Partnered with FEMA, nonprofits, and other state agencies to provide on-the-ground information to flood victims.

• Hosted over 200 industry attendees for the CSI Montana Insurance Summit to hear speakers from across the nation, network, learn more about the CSI, and earn continuing education credits.

• Held Elder Exploitation BINGO events at senior care facilities across the state, giving residents important information on how to avoid becoming victims of fraud.

• Visited with multiple Montana tribal nations to share information about our agency and identify potential partnership opportunities. For example, CSI, together with Senator Small, commenced an initiative to expand our financial literacy and capital formation outreach programs in American Indian communities and schools.

• Launched a robust new website with additional features and fresh, quality content to help consumers and industry easily locate information, report fraud, and submit documents.

• Published reports to members of the NAIC American Indian and Alaska Native (AIAN) Liaison Committee detailing AIAN culture, the Affordable Care Act and AIAN populations, and lessons from the AIAN communities in response to the COVID-19 pandemic.

• Voted to approve the Mount Haggin and Big Snowy Mountain acquisition to expand public land access on the Board of Land Commissioners.

• Increased our agency outreach by sending 26 press releases, publishing seven opinion editorials, submitting dozens of informative PSAs, producing nine episodes of the CSI Insider Podcast, and posting over 350 times to social media.

• Created an educational video for use by Drivers Education programs to help young drivers learn about the importance of auto insurance, what insurance is, what it is not, and the ramifications of unsafe driving.

• Continued our work to build a strong agency culture to increase retention and recruitment, build highly motivated teams, and a strong sense of agency purpose.

As we begin 2023 and head into the 68th Montana Legislature, we look forward to capitalizing on the great work of the past year. In the coming weeks, our agency will publish the 2022 Annual Report detailing these accomplishments and many more. Happy New Year!

Best Regards,
Commissioner Troy Downing
---
|
---
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I’ll keep this short, Derek:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Your donation will help elect more Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. | |
---
Together, Democrats have made significant strides this year. We protected our Senate majority. We lost fewer seats in the House than in any Democratic president’s first midterm election in at least 40 years. And we passed critical legislation that puts workers and families first. **I know for a fact that we could not have come this far without your support, Derek. Thank you.** **I also know there’s still more work to do to continue building a better America.** From protecting the right to vote to organizing across the country, the DNC is laying the groundwork to elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide in the years ahead. clean_body: Your donation will help elect more Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. | | Together, Democrats have made significant strides this year. We protected our Senate majority. We lost fewer seats in the House than in any Democratic president’s first midterm election in at least 40 years. And we passed critical legislation that puts workers and families first. I know for a fact that we could not have come this far without your support, Derek. Thank you. I also know there’s still more work to do to continue building a better America. From protecting the right to vote to organizing across the country, the DNC is laying the groundwork to elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide in the years ahead. They are relying on your support ahead of their important fundraising deadline tomorrow. Thank you for all that you do, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Before the new year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, can you be one of the [17] supporters we need in your area to contribute now?
#
Peter,
A few days ago, we set a critical end-of-the-year fundraising goal: **$900,000 raised in 2022 to keep our people-first movement strong and to fully support Pramila's advocacy for us in Congress at such a pivotal moment.**
To be frank, fundraising has slowed a bit in December. We're currently behind by about $7,000, but we crunched the numbers and it will take just **[956]** contributions to hit our goal.
[**Based on the number of Team Jayapal supporters in your zip code, we just need[17] people in your area to make a contribution of $3 or more so we can hit our goal before the deadline. Can you be one of them today? **](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25507?refcode=em20221230-2005&t=1&akid=2005%2E420207%2EtN2y6j)
**[Peter, chip in $3 before New Years](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25507?refcode=em20221230-2005&t=20&akid=2005%2E420207%2EtN2y6j)**
Pramila doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money because she has always believed in the power of the grassroots and the power of the people to enact real, lasting change. She relies on supporters like you, chipping in any amount to make a difference.
Peter, if we dig deep and reach this goal, we will be able to build an unprecedented grassroots movement to continue moving Pramila's bold and transformative agenda forward in this new Congress. **And we won't stop until we have true social, racial, economic, and environmental justice across America.**
[**Be one of the[17] supporters we need in your zip code to contribute now. With so much on the line for working families, we can't afford to fall short of this goal.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25507?refcode=em20221230-2005&t=21&akid=2005%2E420207%2EtN2y6j)
Every little bit helps. Thank you for making a gift today,
Lauren Lalonde
Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221230-2005-footer&t=22&refcode2=2005_420207_tN2y6j&akid=2005%2E420207%2EtN2y6j)**

body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---

Hello Friend,Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?_When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!__When we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ's return is going to be glorious!**But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God's Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I've found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days.And today, I'm pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It's all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history.This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn't want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God's plan as never before - you'll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free!You can make your most generous donation here: [https://ptv.org/donate/final-conquest-generous-gift/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._sfMTWE-mJ8SvBW9_kQ)One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0376%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Wbl2rRWj5nlRkj24Ys6cGw&sysid=1)
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44122%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gFIv4kXxmUjabTCrOaddJw&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44123%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xge%2brtL0N3xPdkwaxrMi%2bA&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44124%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4MjayqDd0HVHXmxgan%2fvyg&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7626%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ugiecCUgcRKTXlPZIL5vDg&sysid=1)
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99157%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h%2bRfGGMkZB5pHD2Lz6IpFQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Weq12d2RJFaG6IlKBdL%2bPg&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99159%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5r6K4zoHO6yP%2brZfz3uH3A&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PNArwOX1C00bzdq%2b2jggBg&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99151%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SCauJhM4Wqsi9LNnq8hZlw&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Kari Lake
subject: Let me be the first to tell you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78561%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m8aqlAFuEY44EQw%2f8bS%2bBw&sysid=1)

---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that’s just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78562%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=spuwakjcrbgBKVb8VC0psw&sysid=1)

Best,

Kari Lake

subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zudopch852208immq6tr48leodok4c2eafbh8msg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob5c1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs6g5kr7l3os77p41crftbcopnmbrafod1o9qfj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob5c1h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpdvnbb9vl7vnh5b7s4mv7osi875e1r3ogqnhjdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob5c1h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znppd5u9t2b2tlfp0fiaatlgk9o5sfjvpoh4jp2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob5c1h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb76bdk0kuiu3riegjtfaajupjpdj1nvtj4ntgq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob5c1h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2s8lpjcuhf8nreojrd4hd17t6rrjg1sakcl4c90_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob5c1h2bs)

body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1q726o4tlgki9q0q72p2bniknd87t3bbehhu1io_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob1c1h2bs)

| | |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlmphg9js8jejq6bivk52idqjcpu81ddv3v4ha3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob1c1h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9egs7cukdf3nrilebq4t2815e7r5m7dccc2kcbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob1c1h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z07n1rhd25s87geahvjd48ef7uvfl8dfjcr0j6eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob1c1h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6reaevvkakkva5i0d8hgcnsgb9chq89j1mgofbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob1c1h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsm98jnoellok7p2ugn4ae33q46u38nvkhiab9kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob1c1h2bs)

name: Kari Lake
subject: I wanted to be first to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeld8krikl3doad8sfvrvpm0f54kudnhevh3mfv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge6oj2cjh2bs)
---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkrf9f6s9bv7f7uj4n1mrs3322qah55sn8mbpibg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge6oj2cjh2bs)

Best,

Kari Lake

name: Kari Lake
subject: Take this from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za4a11gc1l4qhp7fjb64e32o2bgau8rl17bd8mkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob1chh2bs)
---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zetvgi0011sgriaugdl0cgjrnkp4u5sm3c339fjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob1chh2bs)

Best,

Kari Lake

Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2n6si75tdj2vmp7qa22euj9j4bth7g6umt5117g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob6c3h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3d9pc0h36fet2hgc128gsp56k4tr8qs8i3aqno8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob6c3h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znack3td59go8hpf30d4nlueg6kgf5jc5dhnuieo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob6c3h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zekqir9s70vsjb0bgavm61rekt4b4st6126qf198_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob6c3h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z20nsj6ev9o7sjvn5q52err4damths558fq46lg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob6c3h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zli6hd6p49omtjhtsvf1h8mgliieaoa6sdhckr80_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge2ob6c3h2bs)

### _Friday, December 30, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I breakdown the Time For Choosing Speech by former President Ronald Reagan. ### _Wednesday, December 28, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I breakout the crystal ball and make my picks on the stories that will be making headlines in the coming year. As I bonus I throw in my pics for all the champions in the NBA, MLB, NFL and College Football. ### _Monday, December 26, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look back at the events that make up 2022. name: Right Wing Report
subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
[unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os42yrlD8N)
---
Dear Patriot, Below is an important sponsored message for your consideration. Messages like these enable us to continue bringing you the latest news at no cost. Courtesy of Right Wing Report
* * *
|
# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61329278:s42yrlD8N:m:1:2570829362:4D024CB1CAB80568A18D1EBE05F3557C:r) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **" Our death toll would be staggering" **reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61329278:s42yrlD8N:m:1:2570829362:4D024CB1CAB80568A18D1EBE05F3557C:r) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61329278:s42yrlD8N:m:1:2570829362:4D024CB1CAB80568A18D1EBE05F3557C:r) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61329278:s42yrlD8N:m:1:2570829362:4D024CB1CAB80568A18D1EBE05F3557C:r) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... **[Click here to see it in action!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61329278:s42yrlD8N:m:1:2570829362:4D024CB1CAB80568A18D1EBE05F3557C:r)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: The war on Christmas
body:
| |
---
| | Friend, if you were a Christian that wanted to attend worship service in 2020, government officials treated you like a terrorist. If you were a criminal that assaulted innocent people, burned buildings to the ground and ransacked every business in your path, Leftists handed you the keys to the city. I’ll never forget what they did over the last two years - _because they want to do it again._ They pretended it was about safety, but we both know that was a lie. It was about control. It was about their agenda. **And it was about their decades-in-the-making war on Christian America.** No matter what you believe or who you worship, this is your fight. You see, the radical Left is doing everything in their power to rip Christianity from our culture, because that’s where our freedoms, our rights, our liberties -- the values that have defined our nation -- came from. [**I explain this at length in Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99154%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hs4ZeryUoEvwRyh%2fQozYlA&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99165%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BMQOqS%2fbFg3488MqqaiYLA&sysid=1)
---
You may know my story. I’m not a Christian and I never have been. I spent decades entrenched in the radical Left before I saw them for who they really were. **_And I know the reason Leftist politicians hunted down churchgoers like enemies of the state while violent criminals roamed free over the last two years._** It wasn’t negligence, coincidence, or incompetence. They want to tear Christianity and religion from our country because they want to replace God with government. They want you answering to the State and the State only. And they know if they can strip America’s religious foundation, they can finally shred our Constitution and destroy the institutions that made us who we are. **But this war is far from over, and I need you on my side.** [**That’s why I hope I can count on your generous, tax-deductible donation of $45 or more to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99166%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5%2bUKQhaSbum52b9BG%2bj8uw&sysid=1) I founded the Freedom Center because I was determined to expose everything I’d learned about the radical Left in the hopes that I could stop them in their tracks. Since then we’ve published thousands of articles, pamphlets, books and profiles - and we’ve changed hearts, minds and outcomes. The Left comes after us time and time again because they know just how effective we are. We’ve been targeted by MasterCard, Discover Card, the Ways and Means Committee, and many more. But we won’t back down - no matter who comes after us. Because there is no nonprofit with a history like ours -- or more importantly, a knowledge like ours. There is no nonprofit with our expertise or understanding of the Left and its motives, or the track record we have to back it up. **[That’s why I hope I can count on your generous, tax-deductible gift of $45 or more today](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99167%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i3hzd8T2zNAnT%2bNYb7hYrw&sysid=1) - and as a thank you for your support, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of _Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America._** Karl Marx said it himself: communism begins where atheism begins. Simply put, without Christianity, we have no country, and we have no future. But too many of our fellow citizens don’t understand what’s at stake, or exactly what we’re up against. And I need your help sounding the alarm. I hope I can count on you.
---
Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
[**Support the Freedom Center**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99168%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nHtRxBh39%2ftd%2bWqgsN4FoA&sysid=1)
---

---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z94kt7oiepk5ser2697d74jn28gb70aui9ssrn90_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4553hr3t18ne6k85o01uj7kvgpv0l4uv2g94uug_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31c3h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr43049asft1iioicishd8rhvad1ke42quiqdgp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31c3h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling, Friend
body:
I just read one of the best things of 2022 – The Washington Post, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcomi
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhm3bt5ej3f3sevheg5sf302c9k4oqhm4eg3hvq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6fgfnccgglr5qsd81ba7pptnul153g62428umlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don 't stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm80n0ui19pt127e6vcs26758plm2hd08q160gvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)

Here's how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.
[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfq6q597l1vodpuqari2po076b3v62pco7jai2p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1d3mkkt2hg8a9km1uq2e9v1gkk9fr0gc0oh3qg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zccn55g1nseh3oe8d3ibtbjt29u24cdca6afje4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjvnvhg6iblafkc2vopas3oc8r82656ctprtqcg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za8eq9b778kie035hikm01sgq8jt68ougivjpbd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbrl2lnic4q20r29fdons99gdd5gfnomcvum5sd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjvtuvvet3dvjsrti2vn7vptfmsu4ir43fab5nbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlmr6vbg42r66unp1bppf5hhnt9e5h7hpg871cmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72chh2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

_The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible._

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z95qbm71n9pj183g13foth1tlretho3f6597tnqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31cth2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsgorj1at5i1o9iafuvpf26201buqfauralmacjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31cth2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9d3idb6e5sef1tv0u4lsv728li3sk6fd78rkjjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31cth2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsard1ip8ffil1q2j88cffc0eaeffiqf15qfsou8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31cth2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9d5aca9iva240f3s2ohkt5r8dqts4l8417jd3sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31cth2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfsmm8ti76gh0mcusfa9cq94ua5ko2q0nko94dmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31cth2bs)
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd8uchf98s7kpn3nk6un0sg3g0k5rrhi2bva0j28_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge1o31cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Briefing
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbo40l348an4j430ld3jksul8cqmsg1e9lg6dmk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztuvfk9ueccmfif6ofs0ae0b80ch30l3lpgq6s4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72cph2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpvchb818c64e88g7602799imbvtmh5qvm5da63o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72cph2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl1761dooci3altje9f819as7bdh0ab20behkpog_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72cph2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjss67hs49hvak8cb8fus7712rf4us74uhefrc10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72cph2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zttta04ap350ndqhshskapqfhm4sklntfttahpt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4iag5km90mctvh10ioutvs8dp9bb2n2ivnc89q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs7mofm098ghh04306i4m9lq99mf393cttqnblp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72c5h2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zig9g1bpf5ojhpc040spv74k6gtvr4k01ddpuoao_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72c5h2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zivqpjirggb2ecup9p5lg4a30rqu7mupu1a1ons8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie8or1cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs3edsqqegafnqjkd4cfpj8e019dnl6jtq64slh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie8or1cjh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc9mm3cpk9f3lp9d1eup6l6mqe032h77c4psmg7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie8or1cjh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmoa738b5msv49evgrnnmrnuckumsrg89i10v6vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie8or1cjh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsaeurp5qqf6q5rsvg9osvoogu6iniil17roq4q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie8or1cjh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zso10panqi6394sp1jugr5jog16k7id2p81k0v0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie8or1cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
