name: =?utf-8?Q?Active=20Republican=20Women=20of=20Las=20Vegas?=
subject: Happy New Year 2023
body:
President departing remarks

https://arwlv.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b591f4023583355f43a683ac&id=8ff76e65c8&e=23eca40478
------------------------------------------------------------

Active Republican Women of Las Vegas (ARW) was founded in 1970. Our mission:

"Active Republican Women of Las Vegas (Nevada) is a women’s political organization, bringing together women to positively impact the direction of our state and our nation. We come together as a collective force advancing the Republican Party and women through political access and participation."
------------------------------------------------------------

As some of you may know, my presidency ends this month. I assumed the helm of ARW last January following the October 2021 organizational split resulting in another Republican Women’s club forming soon thereafter. Forward progress was my main motivation. Above paycheck or promotion, true and sustainable momentum is what drives me. And there is so much more to come. It has been an honor to volunteer my time in leading one of the oldest Republican women's clubs in Nevada. All of the hard work poured into putting the club back on track, keeping it running, and convening the membership - all while being a valued component club to worthy candidates and our community - fulfills the club's mission.
------------------------------------------------------------

Seeing Nevada become a Republican state once again was my primary goal. I had the passion and the vision to make the needed changes, put a working plan in place, and move forward. We clearly needed a new direction and a new approach to getting new members, new ideas, and new energy. But true change requires consensus. That is why I am grateful for every loyal club member who stood by during these transitions. Thank you for giving me the opportunity and placing your confidence in me to advance the club's legacy. This election year 2022 has been a very productive year for all of us and I am no exception.
------------------------------------------------------------
To highlight:
------------------------------------------------------------

Finding joy in welcoming new members
------------------------------------------------------------

Introducing new members to ARW and our activities is our life’s blood. Many of our new members (and new Las Vegans), found through greater Internet search capability initiated under my leadership, are a breath of fresh air. Sharing their political experiences from their home states has been invaluable to us. To have new members joining immediately after migrating from other states, and even other countries, is extremely gratifying.
------------------------------------------------------------

Becoming a forum for thought leadership
------------------------------------------------------------

If there's one thing I want to pass on to the next president it is to leverage the value of our general monthly meeting. It is not just a venue to mingle, it is a live platform for sharing thought leadership and hearing from the main sources for change in our community.
------------------------------------------------------------

Getting good people elected
------------------------------------------------------------

>From relishing the privilege of meeting excellent leaders/ politicians from other clubs and many different campaign crews to working with extraordinary individuals across the political spectrum, we are all drawn to the same mission - to get our qualified candidates elected. It has been an incredible journey and I have learned so much that will inform our future efforts to get good people in office!
------------------------------------------------------------

Recapping my February 2022 President’s inaugural speech, it is also a final State of ARW Club assessment and fitting for my final address to the membership:
------------------------------------------------------------

My Commitment: Increase membership volume
------------------------------------------------------------

Our Results: Our membership in 2021 has increased in 2022 by 48% (full member) and 20% (associate member). I have also increased subscribers and followers to our email database by 100%. In other words, we have doubled the number of subscribers/ followers to our email communication to more than 1K.
------------------------------------------------------------

My Commitment: Educate our members and the public about America’s Best Principles
------------------------------------------------------------

Our Results: You may recall we hosted Brock Gillespie who shared insight about China and its leadership. We also welcomed Loren Spivack who spoke on America's Best Principles. And who can forget our collaboration with CORE (Congress Of Racial Equality) during the epic G.O.T.V Rally co-hosted by American Activist Niger Innis?
------------------------------------------------------------

My Commitment: Develop a Strategic Plan to help elect our candidates
------------------------------------------------------------

Our Results: We launched relevant online search ads to promote candidates targeting Republican men and women in Nevada in collaboration to ARW's website.
------------------------------------------------------------

My Commitment: Get more involved in the community
------------------------------------------------------------

Our Results: We welcomed an additional nonprofit organization called Peggy’s Attic helping children with shelter, clothes, and food at the critical moment when child protection services performs rescues and before children access foster care programs.
------------------------------------------------------------

My Commitment: Turn NV Red
------------------------------------------------------------

Our Results: We are all part of the ongoing movement to learn from the election cycle results and emerge more relevant and critical in future elections.
------------------------------------------------------------

I am proud to also share other accomplishments:
------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------

* An All-in-one system on a new domain - website, direct message, marketing, payment system, and online membership submission. It is easier, faster and more accessible for SEO (Search Engine Optimization) and SEM (Search Engine Monetization) furthermore. The new payment system makes transactions much easier saving the club $70 per 100 transactions, which equates to approximately $800 per year.
* A YouTube channel and Blog page on the website is ready to go.
* Club savings in the amount of 3K (per the approved budget by the last board) for the website.
* My donation of $900 to boost SEO and SEM during the election.
* The use of online paid ads generating $1200 in club revenue.
* The silent auction and donations generating $1490 in club revenue.

In conclusion:
------------------------------------------------------------

ARW’s 53-year legacy and commitment to local politics while helping our community in supporting women, children, and veterans are our most important assets. ARW is action and leadership in motion. I am grateful for the many hearts ARW has touched and those it has helped. Even on the hardest day, ARW has found a way to support and contribute - financially, emotionally, and physically - to the Republican Party, its candidates, and the communities we serve.

It was my goal when I became the president to advance ARW and leave it in a better place from when I started. I believe I have done that.
------------------------------------------------------------

Please contact Cristina Cimino (Nominating Committee) if you are interested in being part of the board at (818)348-3988

Open positions include:
------------------------------------------------------------
* President
* 1st VP
* 2nd VP
* Secretary
* Website and Marketing
* Social Media

clean_body: President departing remarks Active Republican Women of Las Vegas (ARW) was founded in 1970. Our mission: "Active Republican Women of Las Vegas (Nevada) is a women’s political organization, bringing together women to positively impact the direction of our state and our nation. We come together as a collective force advancing the Republican Party and women through political access and participation." As some of you may know, my presidency ends this month. I assumed the helm of ARW last January following the October 2021 organizational split resulting in another Republican Women’s club forming soon thereafter. Forward progress was my main motivation. Above paycheck or promotion, true and sustainable momentum is what drives me. And there is so much more to come. It has been an honor to volunteer my time in leading one of the oldest Republican women's clubs in Nevada. All of the hard work poured into putting the club back on track, keeping it running, and convening the membership - all while being a valued component club to worthy candidates and our community - fulfills the club's mission. Seeing Nevada become a Republican state once again was my primary goal. I had the passion and the vision to make the needed changes, put a working plan in place, and move forward. We clearly needed a new direction and a new approach to getting new members, new ideas, and new energy. But true change requires consensus. That is why I am grateful for every loyal club member who stood by during these transitions. Thank you for giving me the opportunity and placing your confidence in me to advance the club's legacy. This election year 2022 has been a very productive year for all of us and I am no exception. To highlight: Finding joy in welcoming new members Introducing new members to ARW and our activities is our life’s blood. Many of our new members (and new Las Vegans), found through greater Internet search capability initiated under my leadership, are a breath of fresh air. Sharing their political experiences from their home states has been invaluable to us. To have new members joining immediately after migrating from other states, and even other countries, is extremely gratifying. Becoming a forum for thought leadership If there's one thing I want to pass on to the next president it is to leverage the value of our general monthly meeting. It is not just a venue to mingle, it is a live platform for sharing thought leadership and hearing from the main sources for change in our community. Getting good people elected From relishing the privilege of meeting excellent leaders/ politicians from other clubs and many different campaign crews to working with extraordinary individuals across the political spectrum, we are all drawn to the same mission - to get our qualified candidates elected. It has been an incredible journey and I have learned so much that will inform our future efforts to get good people in office! Recapping my February 2022 President’s inaugural speech, it is also a final State of ARW Club assessment and fitting for my final address to the membership: My Commitment: Increase membership volume Our Results: Our membership in 2021 has increased in 2022 by 48% (full member) and 20% (associate member). I have also increased subscribers and followers to our email database by 100%. In other words, we have doubled the number of subscribers/ followers to our email communication to more than 1K. My Commitment: Educate our members and the public about America’s Best Principles Our Results: You may recall we hosted Brock Gillespie who shared insight about China and its leadership. We also welcomed Loren Spivack who spoke on America's Best Principles. And who can forget our collaboration with CORE (Congress Of Racial Equality) during the epic G.O.T.V Rally co-hosted by American Activist Niger Innis? My Commitment: Develop a Strategic Plan to help elect our candidates Our Results: We launched relevant online search ads to promote candidates targeting Republican men and women in Nevada in collaboration to ARW's website. My Commitment: Get more involved in the community Our Results: We welcomed an additional nonprofit organization called Peggy’s Attic helping children with shelter, clothes, and food at the critical moment when child protection services performs rescues and before children access foster care programs. My Commitment: Turn NV Red Our Results: We are all part of the ongoing movement to learn from the election cycle results and emerge more relevant and critical in future elections. I am proud to also share other accomplishments: An All-in-one system on a new domain - website, direct message, marketing, payment system, and online membership submission. It is easier, faster and more accessible for SEO (Search Engine Optimization) and SEM (Search Engine Monetization) furthermore. The new payment system makes transactions much easier saving the club $70 per 100 transactions, which equates to approximately $800 per year. A YouTube channel and Blog page on the website is ready to go. Club savings in the amount of 3K (per the approved budget by the last board) for the website. My donation of $900 to boost SEO and SEM during the election. The use of online paid ads generating $1200 in club revenue. The silent auction and donations generating $1490 in club revenue. In conclusion: ARW’s 53-year legacy and commitment to local politics while helping our community in supporting women, children, and veterans are our most important assets. ARW is action and leadership in motion. I am grateful for the many hearts ARW has touched and those it has helped. Even on the hardest day, ARW has found a way to support and contribute - financially, emotionally, and physically - to the Republican Party, its candidates, and the communities we serve. It was my goal when I became the president to advance ARW and leave it in a better place from when I started. I believe I have done that. Please contact Cristina Cimino (Nominating Committee) if you are interested in being part of the board at (818)348-3988 Open positions include: President 1st VP 2nd VP Secretary Website and Marketing Social Media "I knew that looking back on the tears would make me laugh but I never knew that looking back on the laughs would bring tears." -graciousquote ARW - From GOTV Rally to Xmas Party 2022 "Moment lasts for seconds but memories lasts forever." -graciousquote REPUBLICAN ELECT ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () () Copyright 2022 © Active Republican Women of Las Vegas All Right Reserved. www.ARWLV.org Our email address is: RSVP@arwlv.org President@arwlv.org Our mailing address: P.O. subject: Let me explain.

body:
| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zauvk0hci1mk4umv36vfnlhddtl4aa9m4po78s4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72c5h2bs)

Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8uu19fver43kfuuqg0t7la0ov4aa06h7s8rhfug_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ge9o72c5h2bs)

He was the first pontiff in 600 years to resign from the job. Pope Francis will celebrate his funeral Mass in St. Peter’s Square on Thursday, which will mark the first time a current pope will celebrate the funeral of a former one. Benedict [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | #### [ Hunter Biden's Ex-Stripper Lover Requests to have Child's Last Name Changed to Biden Lunden Roberts, a former exotic dancer, has made a request through her lawyer for Hunter Biden’s 4-year-old daughter to change her last name in order to “benefit from carrying the Biden family name.” Hunter initially claimed he had no idea who Roberts was, but he was later ordered to pay child support after a DNA [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ BREAKING: Student In Custody In Murder of 4 Idaho Students A man in his mid-20s was taken into custody by local police and the FBI at 3 a.m. in Scranton, Pennsylvania. While this suspect is a college student he was not attending the University of Idaho. He did however appear in court this morning. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Will abortion remain legal in Virginia? It’s on the ballot right now in this State Senate race, which could tilt control to an anti-choice majority. The election is on January 10th.
body:
Abortion ban in Virginia?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf659115-7d75-457b-8966-f3432700040a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_In two weeks Virginia could begin the process of making abortion illegal._** _**This isn't hyperbole. Very few people are talking about it, but on January 10th there's a crucial special election in Virginia to fill an open state senate seat. **_ Why is this so important? Because, in 2019, riding a wave of lies about "CRT," anti-chioce zealot Glenn Youngkin was elected Governor. Also, Republicans took the state house and came within a vote of the state senate. In other words, a slender majority in the state senate is the last bulwark vs Republicans turning women into second class citizens. [**_This one state senate seat will make all the difference in the world to over 8,600,000 Virginians. Can you join us right now in making Virginia safe for Virginia women, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Aaron Rouse for state Senator, a man who'll protect women's rights and fight the retrograde Youngkin agenda?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T023fff6e-4b9d-4278-ae57-c1b6f14093f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Democrats have a 21-19 lead in the state senate, but one Democrat, Joe Morissey, refers to himself as pro-life and supports Republican efforts to ban abortion._ **_Democrats, fortunately, have abortion-rights defender Aaron Rouse running._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74e79264-c9d0-4d2f-a0eb-eb48318c4991/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Rouse has experience as a Virginia Beach City Councilman for four years and name recognition as a former Virginia Tech and NFL football player. Rouse is running against Kevin Adams. All that matters about him: If elected he'll join 19 other Republicans, a renegade Democrat and Youngkin to make abortion illegal. _** _This will cause women grievous harm and, in some cases, death. Doctors fearing prosecution will refuse to see women having miscarriages and other complications, as was just reported is happening in Louisiana RIGHT NOW._ [**_This one state senate seat will make all the difference in the world to over 8,600,000 Virginians. Can you join us right now in making Virginia safe for Virginia women, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Aaron Rouse for state Senator, a man who'll protect women's rights and fight the retrograde Youngkin agenda?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13cdf6e2-8a62-43c1-9f63-695f3f2d5479/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, my friends.
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! **[_ARIZONA JUDGE RULES AGAINST KARI LAKE’S ELECTION LAWSUIT_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44131%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZRKTsBC9uUv55lJflAJRtA&sysid=1)**

Patriot,

We have an urgent update from Team Lake.

An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari’s election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning.

**We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be.**

Kari’s finalizing our plans with the most formidable team of election lawyers this country has ever seen. [**BUT we’re going to need your help, Friend, if we’re going to be able to finish this fight.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44132%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yiD1Ck30%2fS3WkieJT%2f%2fm0A&sysid=1)

This judge may not have ruled in our favor, but we have faith in the American justice system. It’s not too late to make things right.

[**According to our team, if every one of our supporters can contribute just $10 to Kari Lake’s fight to secure our elections and ensure the disaster that happened in Arizona is NOT repeated, our team will have the funds needed to bring this case to the Supreme Court.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44133%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qcdmNrCLCDbBzPepWwjytQ&sysid=1)

name: Senator Edwards Press
subject: Happy New Year!
body:
My Final Thanks to You
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| CHUCK EDWARDS MEMBER OF NC SENATE 48TH DISTRICT
---
|
---
| 300 N. SALISBURY ST, RM 628 RALEIGH, NC 27603 (919) 733-5745
---
| | |
---
| Happy New Year and Farwell from the NC Senate
Greetings!
As 2022 and, subsequently, my final term in the North Carolina State Senate both draw to a close, I want to take this moment to thank you. It has been a high honor and a pleasure to serve the citizens of North Carolina, specifically the 48th District. I'm eternally grateful for your support, encouragement, prayers, and debate over the past six years.
It was during those first few moments as a legislator in 2016 that I made a promise to never leave western North Carolina behind. Through every bill, every budget, and every decision I made over the past six years, I did so with the people of the mountains in mind.
I am proud to have had the opportunity to fight for your freedoms and to protect our constitution. I'm excited to have brought home millions of dollars to our small mountain communities, to have helped you keep more of your hard-earned money, brought North Carolina back to a place of economic security, and to have always prioritized the people who trusted me to serve in the first place, you. I'm blessed to have met so many people, and made so many more friendships.
This year, January 1st signifies new beginnings beyond that of just a new year. It also marks the start of my new legislative journey in DC, as I have been trusted to faithfully continue my service to WNC from the U.S. House of Representatives. As I move forward to serve in Congress, I maintain my promise of never leaving North Carolina behind.
Before I leave the legislature, I have one last order of business - connecting you with your new legislators in District 48. Be on the lookout for a similar letter from me with each of their contact information.
With that, I must offer my gratitude one last time. Thank you. There are few words sufficient to express how much you and the WNC mountains mean to me. I am just getting started and look forward to continuing my service to western North Carolina over the next 2 years.
I pray the new year brings bountiful blessings your way. Please never hesitate to contact me if I can be of service to you.
Happy New Year!
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Chuck Edwards North Carolina State Senate District 48
---
| ###
---
| | |
---
| | | | FOLLOW US
---

Friend,
Today is the last day of 2022 and that means it is your last chance to use your 2022 Political Contribution Refund. Here in Minnesota, we have a program that allows you to make a $50 (or $100 per couple) political donation once per year and have it refunded by the state. I don't want you to miss out on this opportunity, friend. Will you make your refundable donation today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Refundable $50 Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=123122EOY10]
Refundable $100 Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=123122EOY10]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane_other=true&refcode=123122EOY10]
Thank you, friend. Grassroots donors like you are what make our campaign a success, and we can't thank you enough.
Katie Young
Deputy Finance Director
Minnesota House DFL Campaign

name: American Defense News
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1e0ijfqeemacla12mofjifj3l42nk99c79b3voo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkb0f6onspms5p755lu0kf81sf83d053me1p3pqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c3h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqdpcqigj2ssvuefulii0l74ff58008aa251e5no_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c3h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znhcmr5l9j0sct13itq98ls6t0629809agjgpcto_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c3h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1p5klui7rv686pl9hcthrlis2l8f1glg6m67sug_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c3h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztrjbh11rhsi9v9h34p8j7smtdjroul4p5ohcggo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](https://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zn7gga23286nlgak7hkvm3796qbqbih7sha58ipo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhd0d2vs3buld66j7li3kae4vthqgqu96qd9na8o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c9gm9pb2cpge49fg)

| Greetings!
Before I leave the legislature, I have one last order of business - connecting you with the legislators who will serve you for the 2023-2024 Legislative Session in Henderson, Transylvania, and Buncombe counties. Below is a comprehensive list of legislators in the old District 48 and their email addresses. If you need help finding your new delegation, you can find your legislators using your home address [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWsw_3PtD0FXMznL-VkOoSMgemn7q85BVR1VJv5VPcMo6IAWVMpMd6E31WIrFeROd9iNyCbw1vUY1nVrrrU3z9YsZ5KJq6m600o-eECQGG8gB8udmMwGJEtty9-M1NgMgJpZiOZmasgG16V-YNa9GJBrqpUjLvej&c=I4r0n4yTfWooBjVHDJUGlGv6z8itcR7WnIvaG2W6z1Dosy0WOblB1Q==&ch=g9bIDl_6E9yOcyjQAqofM52PpnNJZMawK8KjTemC45-SszhwGIA_ag==).
NC State Senate District 46 Warren Daniel \- new Senator for part of Buncombe County
* Email: [Warren.Daniel@ncleg.gov](mailto:Warren.Daniel@ncleg.gov)

To subscribe to Senator Daniels' newsletter, text the word RALEIGHUPDATES to 22828 and follow the instructions in the reply text. After subscribing, you will never receive another text from the number.
NC State Senate District 48 Tim Moffitt \- new Senator for Henderson County
* Email: [Tim.Moffitt@ncleg.gov](mailto:Tim.Moffitt@ncleg.gov)

NC State Senate District 49 Julie Mayfield \- Buncombe County
* Email: [Julie.Mayfield@ncleg.gov](mailto:Julie.Mayfield@ncleg.gov)

NC State Senate District 50 Kevin Corbin \- new Senator for Transylvania County
* Email: [Kevin.Corbin@ncleg.gov](mailto:Kevin.Corbin@ncleg.gov)

NC House of Representatives District 113 Jake Johnson \- Henderson County
* Email: [Jake.Johnson@ncleg.gov](mailto:Jake.Johnson@ncleg.gov)

NC House of Representatives District 114 John Ager \- Buncombe County
* Email: [John.Ager@ncleg.gov](mailto:John.Ager@ncleg.gov)

NC House of Representatives District 115 Lindsey Prather \- new Representative for Buncombe County
* Email: [Lindsey.Prather@ncleg.gov](mailto:Lindsey.Prather@ncleg.gov)

NC House of Representatives District 116 Caleb Rudow \- Buncombe County
* Email: [Caleb.Rudow@ncleg.gov](mailto:Caleb.Rudow@ncleg.gov)

NC House of Representatives District 117 Jennifer Balkcom \- new Representative for HendersonCounty
* Email: [Jennifer.Balkcom@ncleg.gov](mailto:Jennifer.Balkcom@ncleg.gov)

NC House of Representatives District 119 Mike Clampitt \- new Representative for Transylvania County
* Email: [Mike.Clampitt@ncleg.gov](mailto:Mike.Clampitt@ncleg.gov)

I am confident my colleagues, old and new, are eager to get to know their constituency and begin assisting in any way they can. Please don't hesitate to email them if you would like to sign up for their newsletter, or need assistance with a State agency.
To find a member's phone number or mailing address, you can utilize the [ncleg.gov](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWsw_3PtD0FXMznL-VkOoSMgemn7q85BVR1VJv5VPcMo6IAWVMpMd6E31WIrFeROfP5sJV0mYXoibOJWfW89l4jUtAAWdB1eT3i5KdlemDtbmZVTNAYXOPc__JnngELj7Jip2QTHWto=&c=I4r0n4yTfWooBjVHDJUGlGv6z8itcR7WnIvaG2W6z1Dosy0WOblB1Q==&ch=g9bIDl_6E9yOcyjQAqofM52PpnNJZMawK8KjTemC45-SszhwGIA_ag==) website under the '[House](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWsw_3PtD0FXMznL-VkOoSMgemn7q85BVR1VJv5VPcMo6IAWVMpMd6E31WIrFeROdUuAUgnCHcw6uL2AbxBwtrcJha4E70TeTq05tyQHUUc9ljXhRoNyA5oyMkwmNSeVncVSRSGNE3hGP5Jy6vj30w==&c=I4r0n4yTfWooBjVHDJUGlGv6z8itcR7WnIvaG2W6z1Dosy0WOblB1Q==&ch=g9bIDl_6E9yOcyjQAqofM52PpnNJZMawK8KjTemC45-SszhwGIA_ag==)' or '[Senate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWsw_3PtD0FXMznL-VkOoSMgemn7q85BVR1VJv5VPcMo6IAWVMpMd6E31WIrFeROqMWxhErkragcVOlvZCGj6gbii8ZuizSObD3AObb-wFY8zn1mCN839C2IN-jkGL4jd8GevlFayt0qA-7yGvAPtg==&c=I4r0n4yTfWooBjVHDJUGlGv6z8itcR7WnIvaG2W6z1Dosy0WOblB1Q==&ch=g9bIDl_6E9yOcyjQAqofM52PpnNJZMawK8KjTemC45-SszhwGIA_ag==)' tabs.
It has been an honor to serve Henderson, Buncombe, and Transylvania counties these past 6 years. Despite my departure from the state legislature, please never hesitate to contact me if I can be of service to you in the future. I shouldn't be difficult to find.
---
| Sincerely,

An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari's election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling, Friend
body:
I just read one of the best things of 2022 The Washington Post, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7636%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ZgXZcOSU3NRDKfYH%2fqHUjA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZnySONa7uB%2b6SerllXm9Iw&sysid=1)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We’re winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America’s belief in that trust -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That’s why I’ve set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99163%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KKzOlk0CmCgPmSPA55ZmEg&sysid=1)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They’ve used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don’t stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99164%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1%2f3OeMr8VGceJIW4XXwjEA&sysid=1)

Here’s how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC’s team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.
[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99175%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p2MnOhFMTjTwDufJLMtRdQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99176%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cus%2b3M0NTXsorywyHoUZvw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99177%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OySKHppTExjK0GXkJo6kzQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99178%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m5nnloU%2b4noePd1L08m40g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99179%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m47zsYLZP12SGd%2btcCRT9g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99170%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JEmF8UeV9X5%2fj6mm0nJ88g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99171%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KlffptqHX11jQtDXyeD7hA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ENgpvUtRDKuQzyyjWHlDsQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99173%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LcoLN25o4PTCfzW%2bEPTnaQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99174%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dqvqfyA3H9x%2bauEMgYZcig&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

_The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible._

| It is New Years Eve,
We have much work to do to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family in peace.
While under one party Democrat rule in Virginia, radical leftists tried to out-California California with dangerous anti-American woke policies. Thank God Virginia has a Republican Governor, but, the radical left continues to block or water down just about everything Governor Youngkin, Lt.Gov Winsome Sears, other fellow Republicans, and myself are trying to undo or fix. We must win back Republican control of the Senate.
I am asking you to put your faith in me, someone who works hard, has won all three of my state level General Elections, and someone who has one of the most Conservative voting records in Virginia.
We have just 17 hours before the end of the fundraising cycle.
To continue fighting for you, we must raise enough money to win.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling, Friend
body:
I just read one of the best things of 2022 – The Washington Post, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcomi
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsatn3qofle7qqoa5pce7609gsi3p94suco5tcpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj1c3h2bs)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu7oopr0v8vu0ulr42s8gh1uilj4k48kept9995g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj1c3h2bs)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don 't stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaj8hk08jbv7o0rhg5di89c94q5ml9pr3usrpg10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj1c3h2bs)

Here's how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.
[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z45q3et0gb4dheu650qreq73pjj0vuquj19lal00_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj1c3h2bs)

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhcar1nb822sgbqqjnjhbatgi3b8t0evhn38esg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2bc4i47rgverrmatdhbcr4as8lmsu2i0ck7q4ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5l7i4j6i1niphlblvcbkpgmmlaqdulsr68n7nt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5a17t03hf0b9cvde4sn4sichsidl5m8bqmqsumo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj1c3h2bs)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z47t3tgp9ir9e5gpaio4q4ucb5mq5qqng61g2fro_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tj3c1j68p30elqnbclleor79dlicpi62t5mmhqecdj364r7aslim9q68ob0ehg6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p74phlciqj8dtimdj3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6h5fv2okacopq1mbli3g7qaesd3vpsj1pujfo60_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z83ukhhq3evdhg9sa3ctnhmgd8goer1t55cak7ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c5h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq90ga6ks5usfgest7ua1vg15naarnraa7cfkpk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c5h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk22s5bv67jlbu4kr3pe9b268tjvidpq5gmv1l7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c5h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn975mkq0jgbd5r4cj57tq1g2b29vg5mvean3uf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c5h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqn5iacdlq9dhh65nr06hdacgop5mgn5fggi2jbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj6c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0s6pjqvlnrdbnedct94egjdbbt3d699sua93788_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj5cjh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg8r2lf82q72vkd6sbd1lqk13nh9qetd4fcg6hhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj5cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsfuk76hrt6umo23odh24ctnpuie6mglsav2clv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj5cjh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrnk7946nacq20e19k0jss0kasdf6jsasgs5fbbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ieaoj5cjh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling, Friend
body:
I just read one of the best things of 2022 The Washington Post, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0379%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=gpnA8EUTj4eKPHTEJhR82w&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PtZvvhs%2faC2BWnYJ1rPyuw&sysid=1)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We’re winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America’s belief in that trust -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That’s why I’ve set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L7AebNOz0tp6UyAjm4lmUA&sysid=1)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They’ve used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don’t stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VeIwwAaN48%2bY8SNuv4%2f8mA&sysid=1)

Here’s how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC’s team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z75u9g5lbee4aoqcgbu264f9fetqmmq99tkd800g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie1o74cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1r5d0nd20do9ngc8llvhipi6m063s4obo5el36o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie1o74cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2rl9r5insu57it4c6h39ia8ig69p9luk6d3qke8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c5ie1o74cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together in 2023.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Hi Derek,

I wanted to wish you and your family a joyful, peaceful, and abundant New Year!

I couldn’t be prouder of everything we accomplished together in 2022. When outside groups and right-wing extremists came after our community, we stood together to defend it. Together, we made history.

So thank you, Derek, for being part of the reason 2022 was so special. I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together in 2023.

Have a wonderful New Year’s Eve,

Chris

name: Kari Lake
subject: Let me be the first to tell you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=aef6447178864e97941b2f3ecb898450&_e=xxzCdBlDw6gluNSkzJ1E2b7hhigWQe-1QsK-B8gzsywB9sbLTe0mcrXQdgBoinmkik6gWX74xH3g_EgKnOrgFkACDtBIU-aUB9tfLvo8TxX6KYD3a6Gkcq6o-qwjGIbcxMm24GpGGeA2EzqOQbgLX_Q0KUtz1nGGaqqClFWKq_VOfrg5L1K2ekfRiTAeJpTXBUNylhSOn6yaG-n2BgJGoCSDGMRv4clOkswxNBCe4GE_aSl861bLQTH5fblsdf1ao_pg1sxmGTd6RVh0dcDYMUBrqi3H-HjJcYPwhgFGvM3qk8enEuM9rpn8u_O4flyqmDJztbyidlK-GbfeaRjKVFwGBZVBW8LTcRmQgo9N-p-qLq9_KCmlhtVZ-rOUeS5CvbPvYvTEkA13IYkH04iNTFwLuKAssB4QbdFdGr4VXiu1kB5gZc09r7eIQvpzmCsBokgulWt5aEUzu5CoYhkQ6-WaP7sxxWHalrNUnrAkqzMPQPcS4cFIRzVdzWm4BW2yODOgQLCLTnwH0vNmc0JhXkjPgj7XxbhPXr3hwfl225o%3D)
---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point — that’s just not an option.**

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you — I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.
**However, I need to know — do I have your support?** | [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=aef6447178864e97941b2f3ecb898450&_e=xxzCdBlDw6gluNSkzJ1E2b7hhigWQe-1QsK-B8gzsywB9sbLTe0mcrXQdgBoinmkik6gWX74xH3g_EgKnOrgFkACDtBIU-aUB9tfLvo8TxX6KYD3a6Gkcq6o-qwjGIbcxMm24GpGGeA2EzqOQbgLX_Q0KUtz1nGGaqqClFWKq_VOfrg5L1K2ekfRiTAeJpTXBUNylhSOn6yaG-n2BgJGoCSDGMRv4clOkswxNBCe4GE_aSl861bLQTH5fblsdf1ao_pg1sxmGTd6RVh0dcDYMUBrqi3H-HjJcYPwhgFGvM3qk8enEuM9rpn8u_O4flyqmDJztbyidlK-GbfeaRjKVFwGBZVBW8LTcRmQgo9N-p-qLq9_KCmlhtVZ-rOUeS5CE-WYO7a6Bsu1XrCeS2Xw4NGWcUEjBHsatByTf-2TqjcRoZRYxV-fPAfWqi32ZMmgWEv8yCIaGw1v51tXZPgFAu7m2E_twRtllEKEiTk28QWd5-pWQk3Cc4zPkk5Jcx7CTRTSl8-MgHmBrX5cSYAgOfkDnRMQhQjHq1-Ujw63EcyE8TAdVzxzpH-BMyYlYJuf)
---

[**I can’t do this alone, Friend**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=aef6447178864e97941b2f3ecb898450&_e=xxzCdBlDw6gluNSkzJ1E2b7hhigWQe-1QsK-B8gzsywB9sbLTe0mcrXQdgBoinmkik6gWX74xH3g_EgKnOrgFkACDtBIU-aUB9tfLvo8TxX6KYD3a6Gkcq6o-qwjGIbcxMm24GpGGeA2EzqOQbgLX_Q0KUtz1nGGaqqClFWKq_VOfrg5L1K2ekfRiTAeJpTXBUNylhSOn6yaG-n2BgJGoCSDGMRv4clOkswxNBCe4GE_aSl861bLQTH5fblsdf1ao_pg1sxmGTd6RVh0dcDYMUBrqi3H-HjJcYPwhgFGvM3qk8enEuM9rpn8u_O4flyqmDJztbyidlK-GbfeaRjKVFwGBZVBW8LTcRmQgo9N-p-qLq9_KCmlhtVZ-rOUeS5CE-WYO7a6Bsu1XrCeS2Xw4ILmT0BRDPPgLF3F-U1Jleemy20kEQxCffFNq0aguKkGRt89KYbytTimk-A2s4zSlWAM3HH8PDSFZS2CZczqh4n9iQkIkT1G_R2saxnJ1fJGMSjTzqXVhSdxO8SwZvumptqMvH7qfRrt5opcWEJ8lFdvRFpfPRb63bUR4gJM1u9d)

Kari Lake

name: Mia Bonta
subject: LESS THAN 24 HOURS REMAINING, VOTE TODAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
body:
Hi Peter,
This is your LAST chance to request your mail-in ballot – Register by 12PM TODAY! [https://ademelections.com/register/mail]
The New Year isn’t the only thing upon us – there are less than 24 hours left to request a mail-in ballot [https://ademelections.com/register/mail] from the CA Democratic Party for the ADEM Delegate Election. This is unlike regular elections, you MUST register to vote online if you would like to make your voice heard!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/adem.png]
It’s as easy as confirming you’re registered to vote and voting for the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate when your ballot arrives in early January! When requesting your ballot, ensure you save your PIN which is emailed to you when you register online.
The Unity Slate is composed of strong and experienced AD-18 community leaders. They are labor organizers, teachers, policy-makers, and students, dedicated to uplifting our community of Oakland, Alameda, and Emeryville.
>>> VOTE FOR THE PROGRESSIVE & LABOR UNITY SLATE TODAY! <<< [https://ademelections.com/register/mail]
I couldn’t think of a better group to represent our community within the CA Democratic Party as they make endorsements, vote on the party platform, and elect party leadership. Numerous local elected officials and organizations agree, take a look for yourself.
The Progressive & Labor Unity Slate is endorsed by:
Assemblymember Mia Bonta
State Controller, Malia Cohen
Oakland Mayor-Elect Sheng Thao
Oakland Council President Nikki Fortunato Bas
Oakland Councilmember Dan Kalb
Emeryville Mayor John Bauters
Emeryville Councilmember Ally Medina
Emeryville Councilmember David Mourra
SEIU-UHW (healthcare workers)
Alameda County Building and Construction Trades Council
Black Women Organized for Political Action
Please vote for all 14 Progressive & Labor Unity Slate members in the order they appear on your ballot: Zac Bowling, Mayra Alvarado, Carlotta Brown, Victor Flores, Doug Bloch, Courtney Welch, Fay Eastman, Jada Taylor Folse, Renia Webb, Ivan Garcia, Rowena Brown, Alex Randolph, Seth Steward, and Kevin Jenkins.
And before you begin your New Year festivities, get 5 friends to register to vote [https://ademelections.com/register/mail] !
Onward to 2023,
Assemblymember Mia Bonta
Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973

This is unlike regular elections, you MUST register to vote online if you would like to make your voice heard! [] It’s as easy as confirming you’re registered to vote and voting for the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate when your ballot arrives in early January! When requesting your ballot, ensure you save your PIN which is emailed to you when you register online. The Unity Slate is composed of strong and experienced AD-18 community leaders. They are labor organizers, teachers, policy-makers, and students, dedicated to uplifting our community of Oakland, Alameda, and Emeryville. >> VOTE FOR THE PROGRESSIVE & LABOR UNITY SLATE TODAY! <<< [] I couldn’t think of a better group to represent our community within the CA Democratic Party as they make endorsements, vote on the party platform, and elect party leadership. Numerous local elected officials and organizations agree, take a look for yourself. The Progressive & Labor Unity Slate is endorsed by: Assemblymember Mia Bonta State Controller, Malia Cohen Oakland Mayor-Elect Sheng Thao Oakland Council President Nikki Fortunato Bas Oakland Councilmember Dan Kalb Emeryville Mayor John Bauters Emeryville Councilmember Ally Medina Emeryville Councilmember David Mourra SEIU-UHW (healthcare workers) Alameda County Building and Construction Trades Council Black Women Organized for Political Action Please vote for all 14 Progressive & Labor Unity Slate members in the order they appear on your ballot: Zac Bowling, Mayra Alvarado, Carlotta Brown, Victor Flores, Doug Bloch, Courtney Welch, Fay Eastman, Jada Taylor Folse, Renia Webb, Ivan Garcia, Rowena Brown, Alex Randolph, Seth Steward, and Kevin Jenkins. And before you begin your New Year festivities, get 5 friends to register to vote [] ! Onward to 2023, Assemblymember Mia Bonta Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973 1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.com [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Conservatives Give
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3fb246c2857647298adea62d0893027a&_e=1BdZewXPCi_kSZ7pJdstVxtmvhvYdeISmeja1CzOlWAnVaWTrrgpOnrZCGnQuz2ho4KeOzXlBoKE5rj1evYWBlOGxvBbbs0uG0Y_p0MqiPrF9QDKEA8kQoYleSSO_T2spEw5IsX7srK74i3-hIIvwnTy-sWMPRPBf7kdRsU5kZlX3Yp4EoOKzkwVLJjMNMdxSL-f4QJRPCfmjSwzOvzO-EmZyaileKJ8P8r48WgWKaeYjkYcE2MJ6VSxqkBYe9Is8vmdG7P4A8aKzMAqojTK5NjLSQLtMvEgt8GcLi8NjCPIrVlb-MQYrmXYtO_Omi-gsxoHu6riCcNQp5YWtJr7Y0CRqmIl-NMZfCOoLXcHAXnq9soiumhJuxe7OhiFsHyeubbDsAaVvCcAf0V2n2Tc4d2LAafKcDy81jR7AHU8v1A%3D) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3fb246c2857647298adea62d0893027a&_e=1BdZewXPCi_kSZ7pJdstVxtmvhvYdeISmeja1CzOlWAnVaWTrrgpOnrZCGnQuz2ho4KeOzXlBoKE5rj1evYWBlOGxvBbbs0uG0Y_p0MqiPrF9QDKEA8kQoYleSSO_T2spEw5IsX7srK74i3-hIIvwnTy-sWMPRPBf7kdRsU5kZlX3Yp4EoOKzkwVLJjMNMdxSL-f4QJRPCfmjSwzOvzO-EmZyaileKJ8P8r48WgWKaeYjkYcE2MJ6VSxqkBYe9Is8vmdG7P4A8aKzMAqojTK5HOjRwx_EvepanGLbxcv8UeZUsBrXC45zfbHrswlViD8WFkRDMf2xmkarxi47RKiVidfye4nUQz8Pu2VhWzP_CI2ltmpGvG0Di0_HJd52yl0PY1TOXc5_GYpsAijWlv_MC8I0hM5D2OzqybqK7rkink%3D)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3fb246c2857647298adea62d0893027a&_e=1BdZewXPCi_kSZ7pJdstVxtmvhvYdeISmeja1CzOlWAnVaWTrrgpOnrZCGnQuz2ho4KeOzXlBoKE5rj1evYWBlOGxvBbbs0uG0Y_p0MqiPrF9QDKEA8kQoYleSSO_T2spEw5IsX7srK74i3-hIIvwnTy-sWMPRPBf7kdRsU5kZlX3Yp4EoOKzkwVLJjMNMdxSL-f4QJRPCfmjSwzOvzO-EmZyaileKJ8P8r48WgWKaeYjkYcE2MJ6VSxqkBYe9Is8vmdG7P4A8aKzMAqojTK5DcqCQBDz6omelzMhwKpqKjDWqLEMsnfruNcZcTeUOBfnRcV1L-mPAIigd0K3_2HYcER93OSc2NtCG6dM37juKp-lvvwwI4n-g8BgvjQKzh9t0IASNrpOVs1cYOMQzsPrQDnFxZjK8TU-Xv4VeA6hLY%3D)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3fb246c2857647298adea62d0893027a&_e=1BdZewXPCi_kSZ7pJdstVxtmvhvYdeISmeja1CzOlWAnVaWTrrgpOnrZCGnQuz2ho4KeOzXlBoKE5rj1evYWBlOGxvBbbs0uG0Y_p0MqiPrF9QDKEA8kQoYleSSO_T2spEw5IsX7srK74i3-hIIvwnTy-sWMPRPBf7kdRsU5kZlX3Yp4EoOKzkwVLJjMNMdxSL-f4QJRPCfmjSwzOvzO-EmZyaileKJ8P8r48WgWKaeYjkYcE2MJ6VSxqkBYe9Is8vmdG7P4A8aKzMAqojTK5Mmt3zesyPJmJDJWwXsnuJtgaV7R6NvVidwVHF2Lhk6Ym1HAubai_837PLn0BScywaoZwaBFTTIGVXt69hjUlP6W80tFCPCDmSM48VvImA1lyOgYRUmDDXsH-bIsEdC0mxBkIkAfZqArJDwoiqaK7D8%3D) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3fb246c2857647298adea62d0893027a&_e=1BdZewXPCi_kSZ7pJdstVxtmvhvYdeISmeja1CzOlWAnVaWTrrgpOnrZCGnQuz2ho4KeOzXlBoKE5rj1evYWBlOGxvBbbs0uG0Y_p0MqiPrF9QDKEA8kQoYleSSO_T2spEw5IsX7srK74i3-hIIvwnTy-sWMPRPBf7kdRsU5kZlX3Yp4EoOKzkwVLJjMNMdxSL-f4QJRPCfmjSwzOvzO-EmZyaileKJ8P8r48WgWKaeYjkYcE2MJ6VSxqkBYe9Is8vmdG7P4A8aKzMAqojTK5PTtnzRM_adSEgOgb8Pu9f8xfZVtlVkF8MuPwVWpzgxfaA_eImHyyEkPOgBFzxMw24XXWzEns-j41tQR0r6wmoel3o6cKC4BBZ8gdWG_QFHpu7oem5m6UekVNr1RbNgKTTSi-a2UtNyQUnmnpBN8wJI%3D)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3fb246c2857647298adea62d0893027a&_e=1BdZewXPCi_kSZ7pJdstVxtmvhvYdeISmeja1CzOlWAnVaWTrrgpOnrZCGnQuz2ho4KeOzXlBoKE5rj1evYWBlOGxvBbbs0uG0Y_p0MqiPrF9QDKEA8kQoYleSSO_T2spEw5IsX7srK74i3-hIIvwnTy-sWMPRPBf7kdRsU5kZlX3Yp4EoOKzkwVLJjMNMdxSL-f4QJRPCfmjSwzOvzO-EmZyaileKJ8P8r48WgWKaeYjkYcE2MJ6VSxqkBYe9Is8vmdG7P4A8aKzMAqojTK5L_fauK-qvCJ8SpekZLcpPC-921IliboGYS_0Rhh6-4SLU7sWz4PNwtQ2LUYddgiZi1ncTfu49Witg_jMP7oYewbg21L5rRLmr0h9CMyf1MxdoJhoE7Yu5BcPCnhf7eB8CFEpVl7MjkVnFycQ5qKaeM%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d72037cec47c48e986611934432d5d9e&_e=BRTnLurYNSASph1As0NMiYxz5ByRDw0LtaG7cBWT1SY8Rs1AhHQLpPAmk2xe4SrTqqerv5iII10EfawYBTSinZu7U4taPGiAquaTTNP6FytH1bvjY8oMNcBheHExl1JhmzP5bhZbznfttfU9iWd8a1Rz3aO29nshDCscFmQ2IqEq-kj1R_sc_hNZwcpRbGlDic2t-JFmyaC7b1FpPWqheSpyG48E5gz6EnDcck1Y8BRmQEWRTvDEYrNT2VbGcvjxcqpDpDAEaqAL0Gvyx3AR6g%3D%3D)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d72037cec47c48e986611934432d5d9e&_e=BRTnLurYNSASph1As0NMiYxz5ByRDw0LtaG7cBWT1SY8Rs1AhHQLpPAmk2xe4SrTqqerv5iII10EfawYBTSinZu7U4taPGiAquaTTNP6FytH1bvjY8oMNcBheHExl1JhAiU8lStbS4B01cIGZVKsMNSXyoy5HZPkYS8BWJ0o7k02d_MzrL2Ee6HZwpTYMAR1jmx0vpdJIqx_MmoTFQuSC9qcT0J_QVXBj3Vn_yNW_oerNBu7uKjCYjKSnB-cCor8DMUmc2Sxtt8OEdBBCY51BQ%3D%3D)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. **
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

2022 was a big year – and there’s even more ahead.

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56681115/385727943/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjFiOTFlNC0yNDg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TfJ14amHlGg_5cVT2MS-Kb75xGoV6w3NK5YBq05N-0=&emci=2737a72d-3f82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=c61b91e4-2489-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=4568237)

| | It’s been a big year, Derek. From passing federal legislation protecting marriage equality, to historic investment in our country’s infrastructure, to holding the Senate so we can continue to make progress, we’ve seen historic wins on a number of critical fronts – and we’re not done yet. But before the sun sets on 2022 and the new Congressional session kicks off, we’ve got another deadline to meet: _[**Tonight, we’re up against our _final_ deadline of 2022 – and we can’t afford to fall short if we’re going to start the new year strong. Will you pitch in $5 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56681118/385727945/-52084685?refcode=mw_em_221231_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjFiOTFlNC0yNDg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TfJ14amHlGg_5cVT2MS-Kb75xGoV6w3NK5YBq05N-0=)_ We already know we’ll be up against some big fights in 2023: Republicans at every level of the ballot have made it clear that they’ll do everything they can to stop our progress in its tracks. But we can’t let that stop us. Action on climate change, expanding access to affordable health care, protecting and expanding reproductive rights in a post-_Roe_ era – all this and much more is on the line. I’m committed to this fight, and to making progress for Virginians and for families all across the country. I hope you’ll stand with me – so with a few hours left before our deadline, I’m asking: _[**Please, Derek: Pitch in $5 before our midnight deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56681122/385727947/-52084685?refcode=mw_em_221231_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjFiOTFlNC0yNDg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TfJ14amHlGg_5cVT2MS-Kb75xGoV6w3NK5YBq05N-0=)_ Thank you for your support, today and every day. Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56681125/385727949/-52084685?refcode=mw_em_221231_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjFiOTFlNC0yNDg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TfJ14amHlGg_5cVT2MS-Kb75xGoV6w3NK5YBq05N-0=)**
