name: Becca Balint
subject: A story from freshman orientation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
If we can't have a muffin and a coffee together...we're doomed. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56681542/385729629/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDhhNjE5Ny0yNTg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RQl7LMhoXSrKC-uresjaChjpRabOpWF59bfZskSo9jg=&emci=aa9f687b-cb86-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=6d8a6197-2589-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=43402272) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56681543/385729630/2133404540?refcode=E19897-20221231-EOYDeadline-graphic-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDhhNjE5Ny0yNTg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RQl7LMhoXSrKC-uresjaChjpRabOpWF59bfZskSo9jg=) Peter, I wanted to share a story with you from a few weeks back. When I was completing my first week of freshman orientation, I noticed that new members ate meals together along party lines. Incoming Democrats and Republicans were only sitting with members of their own party. So I walked up to a table of a couple of my new, more moderate Republican colleagues, sat down, and started chatting. I said to them,_“If we can't have a muffin and a coffee together, then we're doomed.”_ There was definitely some initial awkwardness at the table. But later in the week, many of the folks I had breakfast with sought me out to tell me they appreciated what I was trying to do. **During my work in the Vermont legislature, I built a blueprint for collaboration and connection that allowed me to deliver meaningful legislation alongside people whose political leanings are very different from my own – _without_ sacrificing my core values.** I strongly believe that you have to be willing to meet people where they’re at – starting with keeping the conversation focused on shared values. There is always a way to reach out to people and find a shared connection. I don’t expect the culture in Washington to change overnight. But I’m excited to get to work and see what difference I can make – and I’m proud to have you with me on this journey. **If you support the new approach to politics I’ll be bringing to Washington with me this January, then please:[Pitch in $5 or more before tonight’s deadline to help us finish the year strong. clean_body: If we can't have a muffin and a coffee together...we're doomed. | | = Peter, I wanted to share a story with you from a few weeks back. When I was completing my first week of freshman orientation, I noticed that new members ate meals together along party lines. Incoming Democrats and Republicans were only sitting with members of their own party. So I walked up to a table of a couple of my new, more moderate Republican colleagues, sat down, and started chatting. I said to them,“If we can't have a muffin and a coffee together, then we're doomed.” There was definitely some initial awkwardness at the table. But later in the week, many of the folks I had breakfast with sought me out to tell me they appreciated what I was trying to do. During my work in the Vermont legislature, I built a blueprint for collaboration and connection that allowed me to deliver meaningful legislation alongside people whose political leanings are very different from my own – without sacrificing my core values. I strongly believe that you have to be willing to meet people where they’re at – starting with keeping the conversation focused on shared values. There is always a way to reach out to people and find a shared connection. I don’t expect the culture in Washington to change overnight. But I’m excited to get to work and see what difference I can make – and I’m proud to have you with me on this journey. If you support the new approach to politics I’ll be bringing to Washington with me this January, then please:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you so much for all of your support this year, Peter. name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Happy New Year, from my family to yours!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
I am so eternally grateful to have had you by my side in 2022, Peter. I couldn’t be more excited for the year ahead, and the progress that we will make together.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56683298/385734827/-877596893?refcode=em_eng_2022.12.31_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDMxZjA3YS0yOTg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IT79DQ8ZRA-JhxPDCY2KzO99RCRghZftWJL3FtKSms=)
Peter,

I know this is a busy time of year, but I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a Happy New Year! May 2023 be filled with joy and happiness for you and your loved ones.

I am so eternally grateful to have had you by my side in 2022, Peter. I couldn’t be more excited for the year ahead, and the progress that we will make together.

From my family to yours, I wish you a happy, healthy new year!

_Emilia_
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Ringing in 2023!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Happy New Year!| | |
---
Happy New Year (almost)! Looking back on 2022, Democrats made major accomplishments for the American people, from passing the Bi-Partisan Infrastructure Bill to sending historic gun safety legislation to President Biden’s desk, to codifying same sex and interracial marriage, and so much more. The crucial Violence of Women Act (VAWA) programs were funded at the highest level ever for these programs. Some other highlights of this bill that help children and families include: a bipartisan five-year reauthorization of the Maternal, Infant, and Early Childhood Home Visiting (MIECHV) Program with increased levels of funding that will help Wisconsin and other states serve more families; Reforms that ensure children stay covered in CHIP and Medicaid for up to 12 months – even if their parents’ income changes; Makes the summer EBT program permanent, ensuring that families with children eligible for reduced or free school meals receive a $40 allowance each month, for each child reducing food insecurity. Another vital program, especially during Wisconsin’s winter months is the Low-Income Housing Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP), which received a robust $5 billion in federal funding. So, let’s celebrate our victories and ring in the New Year! [**But with Republicans taking control of the House, we have much more work to do, and it won’t be easy. This is where you come in – help Gwen NATION start off 2023 on the strongest note possible.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56684208/385736922/-447511841?refcode=1231&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGYyZmNlOC0yYjg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ODqQ-uUHvFFDo518ljWmojV8woq0RAHvnDS_jbB4iFI=) Your support keeps me going, and I am so proud to have you on our team.

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: Tonight at midnight... = | Before you settle in to watch the Buckeyes, we have one last important deadline to hit before the end of the year, team. This year, we showed the nation that Democrats CAN win in Ohio. And Greg Landsman, Emilia Sykes, and Marcy Kaptur’s wins in "toss-up" congressional districts confirm that. We’re turning to the future, and we are focused on 2024. Here’s how we win: 2024 may seem far away, but the earlier we get started with fundraising, the better prepared we’ll be to support candidates like Sherrod Brown and push back against Republicans. But we need your help to build our campaign war chest. = | = Thank you, have a Happy New Year, and go Bucks! Team ODP The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert hung onto her seat in the 2022 election by 541 votes. It would have led to one of the biggest upsets in the past generation in a congressional race if she’d been unseated. We have good news though! Her challenger, Adam Frisch, has laid the groundwork to build name recognition and win, and he’s talking about running again.
body:
A dream delayed
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81aa1b51-bd48-4caf-b668-ea5572ac8dd6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Amp Action was one of the first--if not the first--groups to tell you Lauren Boebert was vulnerable to a spirited challenge by Aspen City Councilman Adam Frisch in early 2022._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to Adam Frisch before the midnight, December 31st deadline? To send a message to Frisch and to Boebert that this rematch needs to be on, and this time, Frisch will be the last one standing._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta476ba19-17ee-44ec-abf6-50794e657f92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Early this year, we noted that Boebert’s Trump-leaning district is:_** a) Not as Trump-y as the districts of most of the other flying monkeys she's associated with (Gaetz, MTG, Gohmert, Jordan, etc); b) she was unpopular in the district because of her never-ending-look-at-me antics, scandals & abject cruelty; c) Unlike most of her fellow loons, she's in a state controlled by Democrats who wouldn't bend congressional-district-lines to accommodate her difficulties d) Adam Frisch was a good candidate, and as a moderate Democrat, a good fit for the district. **Yet, the race was ignored by all the pundits, by most Democrats with power and money and, in the end, 541 more votes would have led to one of the biggest upsets in the past generation in a congressional race.** **_Well, we have good news! Frisch knows he can win, and is talking about running again._**
---
|

| _Add in Boebert's most recent scandal, that her attacks against international hero, President Volodymir Zelensky of Ukraine, during his visit and congressional speech were used as propaganda on Putin-mouthpiece RT, and Frish is leaning towards another run._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to Adam Frisch before the December 31st deadline? To send a message to Frisch and to Boebert that this rematch needs to be on, and this time, Frisch will be the last one standing._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5dc546b1-5590-4cf8-9301-15920109f1e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for fighting for our democracy seat by seat.
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Peter,
**I’ve said it before and I’ll continue to repeat it: Texas isn’t a red state, it’s an under-organized state**. We know that a better future for Texas (and our country) is possible, but we have to fight for it.
**In other words:_We need to organize like hell for the future we want and deserve._**
[**__**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56687149/385746389/-2133632426?refcode=em-20221231&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTg3OTA4OS0yZjg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKjrxhVPHC22KD2EXVGzSdO5D7RnGKkNcz8-QW7JxPo=)

Together, we are building tenant associations, supporting new workplace unions, and investing in young leaders – **all to make sure that our friends, family, neighbors, and communities are able to live in a better world.**
As organizers, we must renew our commitment to this work every single day. **Will you make a commitment to organize like hell in 2023, and chip in what you can today?**

In other words:We need to organize like hell for the future we want and deserve. = = **= Together, we are building tenant associations, supporting new workplace unions, and investing in young leaders – all to make sure that our friends, family, neighbors, and communities are able to live in a better world. As organizers, we must renew our commitment to this work every single day. name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: My Final Ask Before The New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://www.lashrecseaird.com [https://www.lashrecseaird.com]
Friends,
Nine months ago, we launched our campaign for Virginia Senate and you quickly demonstrated your belief in our commitment to stronger schools, safer communities and our right to choose. I know that the early momentum we’ve built would not be possible without you. So I want to take this opportunity to sincerely thank you, [insert name], for standing with us and getting our campaign to this point.
We knew then that the stakes were high, but we never thought what has transpired since then would be our reality. Families have faced unbelievable financial hardships as a result of skyrocketing food prices, soaring housing costs, fluctuating gas rates and unbearable childcare costs. This is on top of the constant gut wrenching reminders of the reversal of our reproductive freedoms by the U.S. Supreme Court.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse]
Not only am I eager to get to work as your representative to fight for solutions to these challenges, but as we close out the year I reaffirm my commitment to be a champion for you, our families and our communities.
It's been proven beyond a doubt that there is power in our grassroots movement. If you haven’t had a chance to show your support yet, there is still time. I am asking that you help us close out the year so we can start our 2023 election strong! Whether it is $13, $1300 or anything in between, we need your support now more than ever.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse]
In the year ahead we have a true opportunity to use our power to continue fighting for the issues we truly believe in. I can’t wait to continue this fight alongside you!
Thank you again, and Happy New Year!
Sincerely,
Lashrecse

Friend,
We are making great progress on our end of year grassroots donation push - we only need 43 more donations! Your grassroots donation helps us keep our campaign running so we can work on important issues that affect Minnesotans like reproductive rights, economic security, affordable healthcare, and education. Will you show your support of our Minnesota House DFL campaign with a contribution today?

Friend,
President Trump already reached out.

Donald Trump Jr. already reached out.

And now we’re reaching out AGAIN.

_What's wrong? We’re giving you_ _**ONE MORE CHANCE.**_
Our **End-of-Year deadline i** s ALREADY HERE, and President Trump needs YOU to help us CRUSH our goal so we can end 2022 AHEAD of the Democrats and their MEGADONORS.

**We must CRUSH our End-of-Year fundraising goal.** You need to know how important this is, Friend.

Patriot,

We have an urgent update from Team Lake.

An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari's election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning.

**We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be.**

Kari's finalizing our plans with the most formidable team of election lawyers this country has ever seen. Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=54998dfe1d1048709b78be702e071a1a&_e=OqjVtEN2XiQEZeRLaLibo7z2xdWGJazt3s2BuBfbUEHUemJA3gT8dEkrs87Qppz9aSd7BABS2CgZioFuefti39x3ZwDfJz6pC7u5ISFIFVtq2P5gFgkrYDeWRy_Dpwt8D9RvBG54mdYbY0PTPonaMcOnPT1M-7jOIEF48Z5BnETS8tOTNnibcGaFyK4i2B_RbEeHVihNwWRpa_b-JLKvWp_sE-0KqIOchnnH-GrcEsTTWRwteY9kqf4b0naWX9wJkG1f7pa1ykjKZp0DhcovlXwam6Bw1fsPMFffvYOZg0En-_MZR9FwwF4yVnFGEkWBn0AJWnUkaYZJwp5Yz6hpXzGPFeWWDEwep_AxGv-ns5PhXHHlO5oy8wxRCf6KOWsiZ_eSxhxJmRQGK5nsr9XVqvvj1QrSAo9b_3E4BiTlrvMb3EBSBGsWfVPhSHOGBuCtJP_-seRVP5wJRTlHDpHJIhEDBeYIr3_iaHypDhAyKQCStGz9bb1SismYRjcFQdPBwX7Grts-htMB_e280H-r-sQXGrpmeXHGegPjUqGQR6sBnp4trY9KDkdoAK6Hs_HA)

Peter, As 2022 turns into 2023 tonight, and I prepare to get sworn in on Tuesday, I write this final email to express my sincere gratitude for helping to propel me to Washington, where we have a lot of work to do. clean_body: | Peter, As 2022 turns into 2023 tonight, and I prepare to get sworn in on Tuesday, I write this final email to express my sincere gratitude for helping to propel me to Washington, where we have a lot of work to do. In fact, that work has already started, as I have taken the lead to expose continued Republican attacks on our democracy in the form of George Santos, who defrauded the voters of a nearby district in New York by lying about his entire biography and potentially committing fraud in the process. In order to stand up to George Santos and a Republican Party that no longer believes in free and fair elections, I will need your continued support so that I can focus on this important work. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | = = | = = | = = In 2023, you will receive fewer emails from me because I know that email solicitations clutter your inbox as they do mine. My emails will focus more on informing you of what is going on in Washington and my district, and what I’m working on so you know exactly what your support goes towards. But until we fix our campaign finance system, the unfortunate reality is that fundraising is a critical part of the job. So I hope you will appreciate my new approach to email fundraising and continue your support in whatever way you can. Every donation and every dollar really matters. That is especially so before our final deadline of 2022 at midnight tonight. I would be incredibly grateful if you could make one final donation in 2022 to help jumpstart my work in Congress in 2023. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you again for your continued support as we prepare to go to Washington to preserve and protect our democracy and the rule of law, and to stand up to lawless Republicans. We need everyone engaged in this fight. Happy New Year to you and your families. May 2023 be filled with joy, happiness, and democracy. All my best, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: =?utf-8?Q?Semi=20Bird?=
subject: 2023 is in reach
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3a4d8a869c&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,Whenever a new year rolls around, we all have that feeling of new hope, don’t we? We face the world with a fresh start and a new opportunity to tackle big goals. My name is Semi Bird, and I too write to you today with those same feelings, except that my goals include running for Governor and trying to be a part of big, CONSERVATIVE changes in this country.
Let me tell you a little bit about myself. Growing up, I never had any idea I could ever run for office. We came from humble beginnings and running for Governor was nothing I ever could have imagined in my future. I grew up in the ghetto of East Oakland, California with a single mom and six siblings.While my mother’s budget might have been small, her Christian faith was large and she taught me that I was always to be held accountable for my actions. The 'victim mentality' was not allowed. Mother believed firmly in taking control of one's own destiny so that we could become strong, independent and positive-contributing members of society.**THE MILITARY CHANGED MY LIFE!** I struggled academically and dropped out of high school after completing my junior year and I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps. I knew that if I wasn’t furthering my education, I needed to be making something out of myself. My mother wouldn’t have stood for anything else! I eventually enlisted in the U.S. Army and I am proud to have served my country during my career.
In addition to eventually earning my Bachelors and Masters Degrees, I served in Army Special Forces Intelligence and Operations. I am also honored to have received:
* A Bronze Star Valor
* A Purple Heart
* A Meritorious Service Medal
* Four Army Commendation Medals
* Four Army Achievement Medals
* And several others

I mention those awards not to brag on myself, but so that you understand more about my mother and the work ethic she instilled in me. She taught me to be a fighter.**IT’S NOW TIME FOR US TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE RADICAL LEFT!!**
| [HELP SEMI FIGHT BACK AS GOVERNOR OF WASHINGTON!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3e96f7d6b1&e=fdefed58de)
---
There was a time that life lessons like my mother taught me were more commonplace. Mothers and fathers instilled those values in their children. Unfortunately, our country is being run by people with a very different set of ethics from you and me.
Our current President has launched an all-out attack on freedom-loving Americans and Governors of various liberal-run states are no better. Right here in my home state of Washington, our Governor, Jay Inslee, allowed Black Lives Matter protestors to take over six blocks in downtown Seattle.
I am ready to fight against that LEFTIST JUNK and get back to the values taught by my mother and the military. I want to become Governor of Washington and change all the liberal policies that have changed this great state for the worse.**WILL YOU CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP ME GET THERE?**
| [DONATE $15 TO THIS RACE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6cc2916a14&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $30 TO THIS RACE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=57b55b88a4&e=fdefed58de)
---
We can change things in this country together, but I am going to need your help. Will you join me in this fight to save our great country? Much as my mother taught me to fight for what is right and to not be a victim, we must fight for the future of our nation. Joe Biden and leftist governors like Jay Inslee are destroying America.**BUT YOU AND I HAVE NOT LOST FAITH!** I know that good folks like you are willing to defend American values, rights and freedoms. We will not let the liberal elites ruin this great country. If every person reading this letter would chip in just $5 today, we would have the funds needed to fight this battle. What do you say? Are you with me?
| [LET’S TAKE BACK OUR NATION!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4638185880&e=fdefed58de)
---
In God We Trust,Semi Bird
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

body:
This momentum could change the world, if we keep it.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56690595/385755449/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221231EOY3_EOY_KK_Full_4_NG_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0ZDQ2YjhjLTM2ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A2SAoupMmppm6eXv_8CSATCsBZoetm6htR3NwHDs--0=)
| Fellow activist, Pennsylvania remains a focal point every election cycle, and we are continuously told that the stakes have never been higher. This is true because **we are always fighting to create a system that works for the many.**

In 2022, this perennial truth was yet again underscored by the attempts made to undermine voting rights, especially in youth communities and communities of color across Pennsylvania.

This will remain just as true in 2023, such as in the election for the late Justice Max Baer’s seat on the PA Supreme Court, and in 2024, for which we must continue to set the foundations by expanding the electorate throughout both years.

**[Together, we’ve proven the potential of expanding Pennsylvania’s electorate and mitigating the underrepresentation crisis. In 2023, I hope you’ll join us in proving just how much more we have to gain, fellow activist. Chip in $10 now to help us raise the last $2,175 of our $10,000 end-of-year goal and build on our momentum in 2023.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56690596/385755450/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221231EOY3_EOY_KK_Full_4_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0ZDQ2YjhjLTM2ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A2SAoupMmppm6eXv_8CSATCsBZoetm6htR3NwHDs--0=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56690597/385755451/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221231EOY3_EOY_KK_Full_4_NG_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0ZDQ2YjhjLTM2ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A2SAoupMmppm6eXv_8CSATCsBZoetm6htR3NwHDs--0=) In solidarity,

Kadida Kenner
Chief Executive Officer
_The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56690598/385755452/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221231EOY3_EOY_KK_Full_4_NG_B_G2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0ZDQ2YjhjLTM2ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A2SAoupMmppm6eXv_8CSATCsBZoetm6htR3NwHDs--0=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56690599/385755453/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221231EOY3_EOY_KK_Full_4_NG_B_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0ZDQ2YjhjLTM2ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A2SAoupMmppm6eXv_8CSATCsBZoetm6htR3NwHDs--0=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56690600/385755454/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221231EOY3_EOY_KK_Full_4_NG_B_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0ZDQ2YjhjLTM2ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A2SAoupMmppm6eXv_8CSATCsBZoetm6htR3NwHDs--0=)**_

clean_body: This momentum could change the world, if we keep it. = | Fellow activist, Pennsylvania remains a focal point every election cycle, and we are continuously told that the stakes have never been higher. This is true because we are always fighting to create a system that works for the many. In 2022, this perennial truth was yet again underscored by the attempts made to undermine voting rights, especially in youth communities and communities of color across Pennsylvania. This will remain just as true in 2023, such as in the election for the late Justice Max Baer’s seat on the PA Supreme Court, and in 2024, for which we must continue to set the foundations by expanding the electorate throughout both years. = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to : May 1, 2023 Last day to : May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. Here's why: **FOR THE FIRST TIME EVER The America First movement has an OFFICIAL plan!** **And, Friends, we want you to be one of the first to hear about it.** **[That's why, when you make a tax-deductible donation of $10 or more TODAY, we'll send you a free E-Book copy of the America First Agenda Book!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zl9gt3d79q1dlp8phoj7j6k5crdalmoldsn48jc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clg69or4chh2bs)**

But now, thanks to the support of patriots like you, we do. subject: The Washington Post is falling
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=82d8836281184ef9bb1b9b33582dc3a8&_e=JyfqUFOLVSqnQum56vmzORbXfuhG1C0rFzZl028X_bkWqc5Qo_dNbob3gbC1k9X6G6KYiF8jNb7ouQOdPTivHpG17V47jfdh-S9H8ZEaLb_ePpQ6h65CE_RHWgHfivyFdqkr142lWQfj9QouaIDtjjotsOUdy1FezKoZ36QO3QagdfAgPUpqE0nnN1txmR5Nb_9TDkfHuz3OUJLKq70RmLMF7gTz0IpMU_dDqpunotMG0VZbRJDErb5euxGt9p_vi6MdKdUC-o70VSClCvxWoQ%3D%3D)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 – _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We’re winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America’s belief in that trust— over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That’s why I’ve set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=82d8836281184ef9bb1b9b33582dc3a8&_e=JyfqUFOLVSqnQum56vmzORbXfuhG1C0rFzZl028X_bkWqc5Qo_dNbob3gbC1k9X6G6KYiF8jNb7ouQOdPTivHpG17V47jfdh-S9H8ZEaLb_ePpQ6h65CE_RHWgHfivyFpIjJPKa8IsNC72SXNDTcHwhndTBzFchN918WKID5YFvTvxMueQHYMZ7cSziyUh9UBobwTilDShimHnlvpApShpF38a6f-wZwLlIqw91YfDSRPuV194h4zDr76bjWASPKt47vRw34VppAtTNjCcv3Fg%3D%3D)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They’ve used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign — both pro-Trump and anti-Biden — and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don’t stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=82d8836281184ef9bb1b9b33582dc3a8&_e=JyfqUFOLVSqnQum56vmzORbXfuhG1C0rFzZl028X_bkWqc5Qo_dNbob3gbC1k9X6G6KYiF8jNb7ouQOdPTivHpG17V47jfdh-S9H8ZEaLb_ePpQ6h65CE_RHWgHfivyFV9_9fJ0cIhvOM2BFWKHQl5l6rU6Tnk1RGE2KXdch-HZ8OPB02rK_q7akext_AOxogQoJwv8kMuZglmrgl-XYZBAfheq9do_MqPreerwEP5VI3vaqscxFV2zsynG1P3UmpRDhGKycqaiEe3N39dvVow%3D%3D)

Here’s how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC’s team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.
[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=82d8836281184ef9bb1b9b33582dc3a8&_e=JyfqUFOLVSqnQum56vmzORbXfuhG1C0rFzZl028X_bkWqc5Qo_dNbob3gbC1k9X6G6KYiF8jNb7ouQOdPTivHpG17V47jfdh-S9H8ZEaLb-b2F5LDDJkNF99rOHf3p3B03ofzlt1RzN_ZBmtpg84To5SfLv8X-Gf0hfLgYt8-BNJhL_wUqSIZYZV8G3s2yVXMDXFuFDltRL7N514nLrPY1vjsA9YVMrzv1M6JDgiqZHar8MRYfp5ybvPTRlwU8ubzNvdfxnD8kxb5R97ckcBJ7Vcr0qaTvjqJurh-gcmK4g%3D)

clean_body: Friend, I just read one of the best things of 2022 – The Washington Pos t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs. Do you know what this means, Friend? We’re winning! My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America’s belief in that trust— over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That’s why I’ve set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week. I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are. They’ve used their power to sway our elections. During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda. They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican campaign — both pro-Trump and anti-Biden — and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump. Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates. The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don’t stop them, they will do it again! Here’s how MRC exposes the left-wing media: 1. MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987. 2. My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. 3. MRC’s team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters. Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: A Responsible Budget for Mississippi – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132724?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**In 2022 Mississippi made significant tax cuts, reducing the state income tax from around 7 percent to a flat 4 percent.** These tax cuts will directly benefit over a million Mississippi workers and help make our state more prosperous.

**Now working with a former White House economist, Vance Ginn Ph.D., the Mississippi Center for Public Policy is publishing a Responsible Mississippi Budget for the next financial year. Read it[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=88ba374c66&e=5703353baa). **
---
|
---
| Here is a Mississippi budget that every conservative lawmaker ought to be able to support. Why?

**Conservatives that are serious about limiting the size of government need to follow a simple fiscal rule; government spending should not increase faster than the rate of population growth plus inflation.**

For much of the past decade, state government spending (the general fund appropriations) has tended to grow faster than the rate of population change plus inflation – as shown in the graph below.
---
|
---
| Our budget proposes limiting the growth of Mississippi’s government spending so that it does not increase faster than the rate of population change plus inflation. **That would mean a general fund appropriation for 2024 of no more than $6.75 billion.**

To increase spending over and above that amount would mean raising spending per person in our state faster than inflation. That would be un-conservative.

**If lawmakers follow our advice, we estimate that there will be a budget surplus of around $800 million in 2024 – a portion of which could be used to reduce the tax burden yet further.**

“But can we afford further tax cuts?” some will ask.

**During the 2023 legislative session, some lawmakers will no doubt tell us that Mississippi cannot afford further tax cuts – just as they did in the last session.** If we’re not careful, they’ll claim, Mississippi could end up like Kansas.

Kansas cut taxes without controlling spending – which is why they ran out of money. The Responsible Mississippi Budget that we publish today takes the opposite – and truly conservative - approach. We limit spending first and having done so work out what taxes we can afford to cut.

**Mississippi today has record cash reserves. The idea that politicians in Jackson cannot afford to let you keep more of your own money says more about them than it does about the state of our state’s finances.**

We believe that Mississippi’s budget surplus is both cyclical and structural. That is to say the surplus will not completely disappear as and when the economy slows. Provided Mississippi lawmakers keep spending under control there will be money left over to reduce taxes.

**Over the past thirty years, the southern United States has flourished.** Tennessee, Texas, Georgia and Florida have enjoyed rapid growth. Dallas and Nashville have become go-to places for ambitious young people right across America.

**Why are these southern states doing so well? Because they have low taxes and light regulations. Three of the fastest-growing southern states don’t have a personal state income tax at all.**

Our Responsible Mississippi Budget provides a roadmap for us to become part of that southern success story, too.

Have a wonderful weekend – and Happy New Year!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f9fab6dc04&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=882c258c5f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=882c258c5f).

_Copyright © 2022 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

subject: The Washington Post is falling
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f794fcb2a43640c0913c03bcea5f2193&_e=Jql7CjF9wFsLqEepOzuGQv-u7w_HHo-Z3nAfi064D_I4J6rr-6aCWRNvJeFZXUU2ubWhR6bBBnwjmg2sA89WPb9ABHwvzsdARXFfYWhO6pPMHKUAHXqRaMDQ3QcypdJyaio3YB4O5xNJjK87q9zVwwUd4rQWwKm49vTnV2prcTRNpupA4-wYCFDaG8L3XDhiQax4rWYx2wPmEsYny81DLYJ9xOE34jLQi51VITkhg81Dt1s_YOmPw0uICqwjlhI_1qPgb52JBhjTCiGfIcYecQ%3D%3D)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f794fcb2a43640c0913c03bcea5f2193&_e=Jql7CjF9wFsLqEepOzuGQv-u7w_HHo-Z3nAfi064D_I4J6rr-6aCWRNvJeFZXUU2ubWhR6bBBnwjmg2sA89WPb9ABHwvzsdARXFfYWhO6pPMHKUAHXqRaMDQ3QcypdJyuIaORVNCxZL-YomaAvrtVTIgEZR8nsukL4eX0dR8uZo1lB8v3-uh0CGD4T7_KuQDhQEULpEhsYGK16Nc5vcpbOi2GiXk579gIG5NYcxb1Yz2BbPvNr5Tn9bje69FXS_AfHy9yOTFLuQdt_KxGVzicg%3D%3D)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don 't stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f794fcb2a43640c0913c03bcea5f2193&_e=Jql7CjF9wFsLqEepOzuGQv-u7w_HHo-Z3nAfi064D_I4J6rr-6aCWRNvJeFZXUU2ubWhR6bBBnwjmg2sA89WPb9ABHwvzsdARXFfYWhO6pPMHKUAHXqRaMDQ3QcypdJy1RrWzKdFxOEGrBs0PDOmG6NE8DL4wLb5BWEPoQV04bkoVupBsLdsyDT--WjNg9BikYYGoLLLUFhCBnVoCbvNqxDMQRc9C2UyegOJ0Is3X6yDWk7TTr4hA4202Dcn6yswOQSXUP2AXmQQwWkuWv3uCA%3D%3D)

Here's how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.

If we miss this goal, we’ll have to go back to the drawing board and re-evaluate our campaign plans moving forward.
_But, I know you won’t let that happen._
I’ve seen firsthand just how dedicated this team is. Election after election, goal after goal, you’ve stepped up to the plate to make sure that Susie stays fighting for Nevada in Congress.

Peter,

My name is Willie Takano – Mark’s dad. I’m so proud of my son and everything he’s accomplished – but I know he didn’t do it alone. It’s because of each of you, his supporters, that have helped him get elected to Congress where he has been able to do so much good work.

**But that work is at risk.** That’s because he’s behind on his fundraising goals and Republicans are eager to overtake his seat.

Look, I’ve seen America’s dark side before. When I was young, my family was forced into a Japanese American internment camp. Those were hard days. But since then, we’ve come a long way.

Now, I worry about that dark side emerging again. Extremist Republicans have spread hateful rhetoric and anti-Asian sentiment has reared its head once more.

**But seeing my son fighting for progress and justice as a lawmaker gives me hope. I know that good Democrats like you and Mark can make a difference.**

[**Peter, Mark has a huge fundraising deadline tonight and he still needs to raise $2,000. name: Bob Casey
subject: Ok, I really am wishing you a "Happy New Year" this time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We're looking forward to another new year with you. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56693009/385760900/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWVlMzM1Ny0zZDg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP-tpQXkRCgVbRgMPUYVW7pE2hs4CwXsZF15h9u85G4=&emci=44d38889-4b82-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=aeee3357-3d89-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=8943725) Peter, I accidentally wished you a "Happy New Year!" ten days ago, but now it's really and truly New Year's Eve, so I'm writing again.

2022 was a wild election year filled with talk of werewolves, crudité (they're veggie trays!), and Confederate Civil War reenactors. While I am more than ready to move on, I can't turn the page to 2023 without thanking you again for all of your support. Together we beat some of the most out-of-touch and extreme candidates in history to expand our Democratic majority in the Senate and keep the country moving forward.

Now, as I spend time thinking about the year to come and the 2024 election, I'm looking forward to working with you to win in the next cycle on issues that matter to your family.

[**Are you ready to fight for health care for all, better jobs, an end to child hunger, and more opportunity? clean_body: We're looking forward to another new year with you. Peter, I accidentally wished you a "Happy New Year!" ten days ago, but now it's really and truly New Year's Eve, so I'm writing again. 2022 was a wild election year filled with talk of werewolves, crudité (they're veggie trays!), and Confederate Civil War reenactors. While I am more than ready to move on, I can't turn the page to 2023 without thanking you again for all of your support. Together we beat some of the most out-of-touch and extreme candidates in history to expand our Democratic majority in the Senate and keep the country moving forward. Now, as I spend time thinking about the year to come and the 2024 election, I'm looking forward to working with you to win in the next cycle on issues that matter to your family. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = After the new year begins, the press, the pundits, and Republicans will be closely reviewing our end-of-year fundraising report to the Federal Election Commission. body:

| | We’re in for a tough fight in 2023. With a razor-thin House majority up for grabs in less than two years, it’s critical we have the resources to keep Josh in Washington.

As Josh’s Finance Director, it is my job to ensure we organize our funds, and as we look ahead to 2024, **it is critical we leave 2022 financially stronger than ever.**

Josh is a true leader. He’s a problem solver who isn’t afraid to take on the partisan bickering and get things done.

But that makes him a target — powerful forces want to push through their radical agendas instead of working for you. 2024 will be here sooner than we think, so staying strong has never been more important.

[Our $10,000 goal was carefully designed to ensure Josh can kick off his reelection campaign with the firepower he needs. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Please forgive me for emailing so early. I’ll keep this quick. A ton of my Democratic colleagues lost their House seats in November. | | | | | | | If Republicans sense any kind of weakness from this campaign, everything we’ve accomplished will go up in smoke. We already know the Republican machine will not rest. So folks, we absolutely cannot come up short now. We can’t let Republicans win. | | | | | | Thank you so much for your help, Dr. Raul Ruiz Sent from my iPhone | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Greg Stanton's iPhone
subject: Will you support my team as we start a new year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Team, I'm reaching out to you for the last time this year. It's New Year's Eve, and I find myself thinking back to all the amazing work my team has done this year, thanks to grassroots supporters like you who made that work possible.

With just hours to go until the new year begins, there's no time like the present to help my team start strong. By chipping in during this underappreciated time in the campaign cycle, you can be a part of the critical work of building a sturdy foundation for the new election cycle. Will you help us put our best foot forward into the new year by making your donation to build the Team Stanton Warchest today?
[**actblue.com/donate/gs-q422_2?refcode=TeamStantonWarchest**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PDhRzWzGIxV9ENK0TTjb-Nmt7IdcIxF89pRPcwwLmgE=/u50tn3M88WKoxupIui9cnyTCp13_QfeMbI5SXkLyt9I=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.12.31_b1_gsi_all)
Thank you for your support,

Greg

_Sent from my iPhone_

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: What it took to defeat a 31-year entrenched incumbent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter, it’s
Jamaal Bowman here. Congressman for NY-16.

Justice Democrats was there for my campaign from the very beginning. In
fact, they recruited me to run for Congress in the first place. Together
we took on and defeated a 31-year entrenched incumbent in New York’s 16th
District.

No other organization in the progressive space recruits candidates and
helps their campaigns win from day #1. Justice Democrats just announced
their 2024 Candidate Recruitment and it’s crucial that they reach their
$75,000 end-of-year fundraising goal before midnight tonight.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123947?refcode=em20221231-26820&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26820%2E1203867%2EJ6bmD6 ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to support
Justice Democrats’ efforts to recruit more candidates like myself who are
beholden to communities, not corporations?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123947?refcode=em20221231-26820&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26820%2E1203867%2EJ6bmD6 ]Contribute $3

In April 2019, a New York public education advocate nominated me to run
for Congress through Justice Democrats’ website. I had no insider
political connections and I didn’t have hundreds of thousands of dollars
to spend on Washington consultants. It is incredibly difficult for
working-class people like myself to run for Congress.

Our system is designed to protect entrenched incumbents and discourage
working-class people from running. That is why Justice Democrats’ work is
so important.

From the very beginning, they helped me build my campaign from the ground
up. From launch day to election day, Justice Democrats worked hand-in-hand
with my campaign’s team to develop fundamental parts of our
communications, grassroots fundraising, and field organizing operations.

I know that JD will work day and night to recruit the next generation of
progressive leaders to join myself in Congress to fight for policies like
a Green New Day, Medicare for All, criminal justice reform, and an economy
that works for all of us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123947?refcode=em20221231-26820&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26820%2E1203867%2EJ6bmD6 ]We need more candidates who aren’t beholden to the DCCC or the
corporate wing of the Democratic Party to run for office. Make a
contribution to Justice Democrats to help another wave of JDs take on
entrenched incumbents before their end of year deadline. There isn’t much
time left.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123947?refcode=em20221231-26820&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1040&akid=26820%2E1203867%2EJ6bmD6 ]Contribute $3

Thank you for supporting Justice Democrats and everything they are doing
to transform the Democratic Party.

In solidarity,

Jamaal Bowman

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1041&akid=26820%2E1203867%2EJ6bmD6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1042&akid=26820%2E1203867%2EJ6bmD6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221231-26820-footer&t=1043&refcode2=26820_1203867_J6bmD6&akid=26820%2E1203867%2EJ6bmD6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1044&akid=26820%2E1203867%2EJ6bmD6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Kate

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Seth Magaziner **
Date: Dec 30, 2022, 4:39 PM
Subject: We have some debt
Hi Peter,

As you know, the dark money flowing into Rhode Island from Kevin McCarthy’s SuperPAC skyrocketed in the last few weeks of our campaign. We were down in every poll and every pundit doubted we could win. But you stood by my side and together we stayed on the air with TV ads and put together a strong ground game to get out the vote. Our hard work paid off and we were victorious!

Unfortunately, we didn’t raise quite enough to keep up with the Republican dark money and we did end up with some final bills to pay.

If everyone receiving this email chipped in just $5, we would be able to pay our final bills and I can continue to focus my energy on lowering the cost of prescription drugs, investing in a clean energy economy, and standing up for fundamental rights like reproductive rights and the right to vote.

**[Will you chip in before the FEC end-of-year fundraising deadline to help me pay our final bills? clean_body: Did you see Seth’s message below? As you know, the dark money flowing into Rhode Island from Kevin McCarthy’s SuperPAC skyrocketed in the last few weeks of our campaign. Hi Peter, Did you see Seth’s message below? We still have some debt from our winning campaign and are hoping to start 2023 with all of our bills paid. We would love to have your help before our end-of-year deadline at midnight tonight. = Thanks again for your support of Seth! Kate Team Seth PS: Best wishes for a happy and healthy 2023! \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Seth Magaziner Date: Dec 30, 2022, 4:39 PM Subject: We have some debt Hi Peter, As you know, the dark money flowing into Rhode Island from Kevin McCarthy’s SuperPAC skyrocketed in the last few weeks of our campaign. We were down in every poll and every pundit doubted we could win. But you stood by my side and together we stayed on the air with TV ads and put together a strong ground game to get out the vote. Our hard work paid off and we were victorious! Unfortunately, we didn’t raise quite enough to keep up with the Republican dark money and we did end up with some final bills to pay. If everyone receiving this email chipped in just $5, we would be able to pay our final bills and I can continue to focus my energy on lowering the cost of prescription drugs, investing in a clean energy economy, and standing up for fundamental rights like reproductive rights and the right to vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | h | = | = Thank you, Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 40993 Providence, RI 02940 United States

name: Team AOC
subject: 2022 Wrapped: Major legislative wins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This year, AOC introduced 33 pieces of legislation — 17 passed the House and 8 were signed into law.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221231.n3HhsX&refcode=em20221231-3751-P_OTH_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3751%2E2526796%2Ec9hYHY)
As 2022 winds down, we’re looking back on our incredible work together this year. **Today, we’re excited to highlight some of our major legislative wins of 2022!**
This year, we introduced 33 pieces of legislation — 17 passed the House and 8 were signed into law. Here’s just a snapshot of some of the major wins:
### **We passed the first major gun reform in 30 years**
This new law will close dangerous loopholes, increase background checks, and crack down on interstate gun trafficking.
Alexandria also secured a $400,000 grant to Jacobi’s Stand Up to Violence Program in our district, which has a proven record of reducing violence by 50 percent.
### **We made progress on taxing the rich**
We implemented a new 15% minimum tax rate on the wealthiest corporations through the IRA.
### **We capped insulin at $35 per month under Medicare**
As a result of the Inflation Reduction Act, the government will be able to negotiate lower prices on select prescription drugs for seniors on Medicare for the first time.
The bill also caps out-of-pocket costs for medication for seniors to a maximum of $2,000 per year (down from the current $10,000+ a year for the costliest drugs) and restricts insulin costs to $35 a month for Medicare recipients.
### **We passed the largest-ever investment in fighting climate change**
In August, Congress passed the largest ever investment in fighting climate change with $369 billion! This funding is expected to create 9 million new jobs in renewable energy and lower annual energy bills by $1,000 per household.
It’s estimated that this bill will reduce greenhouse gases by 40% by 2030 and it dedicates $60 billion for environmental justice in communities hardest hit by climate change and fossil fuels.
### **431,000 families received a total of $2.7 billion for funeral assistance**
Alexandria fought for and won funeral assistance for families who’ve lost a loved one to COVID-19. Since that time, the program has distributed over $2.7 billion to over 431,000 families to date.
* * *
There are so many more wins that we couldn’t possibly cover them all in one email, but we hope seeing these here serves a reminder that change is possible — and it’s happening in big and small ways all the time.
Alexandria will continue to be a voice and an advocate for that change alongside all of you.
Thank you for reading and here’s to even more wins in 2023!
— Team AOC
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, shrink inequality, and reverse the effects of climate change. Through a Green New Deal, we will reduce our greenhouse gas emissions and guarantee a high-wage job to everyone who wants one. And we’re not stopping there — our platform calls for federal limits on rent increases, transformative criminal justice reform, Medicare for All and tuition-free public college. Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. [If you can, please consider making a donation today before midnight to help us reach our end-of-year fundraising goal.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221231.n3HhsX&refcode=em20221231-3751-P_OTH_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3751%2E2526796%2Ec9hYHY) **[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221231.n3HhsX&refcode=em20221231-3751-P_OTH_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3751%2E2526796%2Ec9hYHY)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221231?refcode=em20221231-3751-P_OTH_EXP_LEG&t=4&refcode2=3751_2526796_c9hYHY&akid=3751%2E2526796%2Ec9hYHY)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221231-3751-P_OTH_EXP_LEG&t=5&akid=3751%2E2526796%2Ec9hYHY)**

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: One final ask

body:
| Peter,

I hope your holiday season has been filled with joy, meaning, and calm. I know it's New Year's Eve, so I'll make this message brief.

Tonight is our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year, and I need your support to lay the groundwork for our campaign moving forward. **_Will you please make a contribution before tonight 's deadline?_**

You can use this secure link: [_**abigailspanberger.com/FECGoal**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/4PE_ImqwtK98ShJ8lvY-3sipTsiaHPAme2oTng6j8Eo=/Mz246vP09FjPTdHkkaIgJxErs5M6XrjMivb6l4j4V9s=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20221231-1-EM&amount=25)

I can't thank you enough for your continued support and I hope you spend today surrounded by loved ones.

All the best,

name: Our Revolution
subject: Sinema has no place in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Kyrsten Sinema — who famously celebrated
when voting against raising the minimum wage — spent the last few years
making sure big corporations could abuse working Americans for profit.

She kept drug prices high, blocked voting rights, and single handedly
saved a special tax cut for hedge funds. We can and must take her out of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8172?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221231_1_7&t=1011&akid=3842%2E5885482%2EjIrOro ]That's why we're launching a fund to defeat Sinema and replace her with
a progressive who cares about America. She's trying to pressure the Party
into running nobody against her, and we need to act now!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: 2022 is about to end. Want to rise up for the environment in 2023? Open this:
body:
__Open before midnight. |
---

|
Peter -- Midnight is a major fundraising deadline for us at LCV, and we're still short of our goal right now:
[](https://links.messages.lcv.)
[This is a goal that really matters.](https://links.messages.lcv.) How much we raise today could transform our campaigns when Congress returns in a few days -- we need to keep pushing the White House to take bold action to cut climate and other pollution, and we're already expecting extreme attacks on the environment coming from House Republicans.

They're hell-bent on delivering a wishlist to their Big Oil executive cronies, already rolling in record profits:
* **Major** expansions offering up public lands for fossil fuel production.
* A green light on restarting construction of the **Keystone XL pipeline** (despite the _massive_ failure and oil disaster from the existing Keystone pipeline).
* And a provision to **completely** gut the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) -- the law that requires environmental impact studies for projects like pipelines, highways, and drilling on public lands.****

Peter: **House Republicans NEED to face a swift and fierce response from the environmental movement to point out just how extreme and unprincipled their agenda is. But what happens in 2023 is going to come down to YOU.**

Please, before the year ends, make a gift to the League of Conservation Voters. [We need to raise $25,000 to make our voice heard on Capitol Hill. Make a gift today -- even $5 can make a difference.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**I want you to know -- this is a fight we can win.** I know because I've seen what we can achieve when the environmental movement organizes in a major way. Here are just a few examples of what **you** helped achieve this year:
* ******After a decade of work, we passed historic climate legislation -- the Inflation Reduction Act -- into law.** This year, our nation made truly historic progress to protect people and the planet. In August, Congress passed and President Biden signed into law the Inflation Reduction Act, which contains roughly _$370 billion_ in transformative investments for clean energy, energy security, and environmental justice.
* **You turned out to vote, expanding environmental leadership in the Senate and creating a "green wave" in the states.** Voter support for candidates who back strong climate action was in abundant evidence this year, as against long odds, political headwinds, and historical trends, voters turned out and delivered a clear victory for climate and democracy in the 2022 elections.
* **We expanded protections for public lands with the historic designation of Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument.** After years of campaigning and pressure from the movement, President Biden designated Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument in Colorado, the first national monument his administration has declared -- AND we expect President Biden to soon designate Avi Kwa Ame, or Spirit Mountain, as a National Monument in Nevada.

We need to keep this kind of work going -- not just to block extremist Republican attempts to ramp up drilling, but to EXPAND clean energy, to PROTECT clean air, clean water, and our climate, and to ADVANCE environmental justice.

So, we're asking one last time:

[This is the last time you'll hear from us in 2022. Make your year-end contribution now.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

THANK YOU, Peter, for everything you've done this year, and for all that you will do in the next one.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
LCV |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9043460&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDQ3MjI5OQS2&spReportId=MTY0MDQ3MjI5OQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9043460&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDQ3MjI5OQS2&spReportId=MTY0MDQ3MjI5OQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

Make no mistake -- they will try stealing another election.

**Left-wing activists used the media to manipulate the 2020 and 2022 elections for their radical political agenda, leaving millions of voters to cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

MRC also has evidence that Google is punishing Republicans who dared to speak out or take action against Big Tech by hiding their campaign websites from search results.

**Google buried the campaign websites of lawmakers critical of Big Tech 100% of the time.**

We also caught Google manipulating searches to bury GOP campaign sites in 83% of the top Senate races.

Google showed its anti-conservative views when it buried Senate Republican candidates' campaign websites before the 2022 midterm elections.

And if we don't expose Google to voters before the 2024 election, we can expect the same results.

[_**Can you join the fight for FREE elections by sending your urgent support? Click here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92de695dbbaa42cdbf4677c3df133626&_e=cmVUsjAVlQ-mX719B9l0arGrbPvjZUSuvGJhf42RVhxUNF0QsH_YqbSyFR4c386DHmaKTR0uex9EcujT9Vfpo9H5D6DZ7x0eY0LEEeuFh_knIwnA6mX8TJWZhdideXj6Fms-oxrToCyg9A_C9PMANtuNGwvBlE93ninj9--vVoswfLJ56QlFOYbCFW1oO9nMogr8PpjxOYwB9syEPHyN-rQYW9awpbJ4eUdXLRLsDlYRxSsl1xks_B7bghjj3TOJS7cBHIJ9Gpr9whY-BoDs7A%3D%3D)

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

_**How did we expose the left-wing media? **_

**FIRST:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 800,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**SECOND:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**THIRD:** MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

clean_body: Friend, My New Year's resolution: to DESTROY the radical Left media before the 2024 elections. Make no mistake -- they will try stealing another election. The Hunter Biden laptop only scratches the surface of their corruption. The radical left is colluding with the media and Big Tech to change the outcome of our elections. If we don 't stop them now, they will do it again! My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies. We're raising $75,000 before midnight on New Year's Eve to STOP far-left corruption and manipulation of our country. Can I count on you to join the fight by sending in an urgent gift right now? Click any link below to send your support. Left-wing activists used the media to manipulate the 2020 and 2022 elections for their radical political agenda, leaving millions of voters to cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates. They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump. MRC also has evidence that Google is punishing Republicans who dared to speak out or take action against Big Tech by hiding their campaign websites from search results. Google buried the campaign websites of lawmakers critical of Big Tech 100% of the time. We also caught Google manipulating searches to bury GOP campaign sites in 83% of the top Senate races. Google showed its anti-conservative views when it buried Senate Republican candidates' campaign websites before the 2022 midterm elections. And if we don't expose Google to voters before the 2024 election, we can expect the same results. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. How did we expose the left-wing media? FIRST: The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 800,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987. SECOND: My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias. THIRD: MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters. Friend, your support helps MRC fight against the lies of the radical left and tell the truth to voters. Can I count on your support? Click below and send your gift before midnight on December 31st. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible. body:
Governor DeSantis needs conservatives in the senate he can count on... which is why I'm running for Florida State House of Representatives.

| | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i9gL9eEXFQve0iI&b=gSmf.BTSvesjIh7E.AA4bQ)

|
