| Hello Friend,
With Ron DeSantis at the helm, Florida has made tremendous progress.

And no, I don’t mean “progress” like the left uses the term– I'm talking about the antithesis of all things Woke!

I’m proud to see my home state flourish under his leadership, and **if elected _this March 7th_ , I will fight alongside Governor DeSantis to take Florida to the next level.**

[](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i9gL9eEXFQve0iI&b=hxmK2hkEQVKaNBJGpHXTnw)

The truth is, there is more work to be done here in Florida– but it’s work that only conservatives with grit will accomplish.
**[Chamberlin for FL STATE HOUSE!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i9gL9eEXFQve0iI&b=hxmK2hkEQVKaNBJGpHXTnw)**
**On issues like Pro-Life, Veteran Rights, and the Second Amendment, Florida is lagging behind other states.** In order to get ahead and make a permanent, lasting impact, Governor DeSantis needs conservatives in the Senate he can count on...

_Who won’t back down from controversy.

Who won’t wimp out when reputation is on the line.

Who won’t sell out the great people of Florida._

This is why I’m running in this Special Election for Florida House District 24.**I am grounded to the core in my Christian, conservative beliefs and I’m ready to help Ron DeSantis take Florida to the next level.** **[Contribute Now!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i9gL9eEXFQve0iI&b=hxmK2hkEQVKaNBJGpHXTnw)**
Friend, will you stand with me in this critical race?**The first major deadline is in TONIGHT at midnight.** _**[Please consider making a rush donation of any amount today!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i9gL9eEXFQve0iI&b=hxmK2hkEQVKaNBJGpHXTnw)**_

With your support, we will turn Florida into a conservative stronghold, where families flourish, businesses thrive, and freedom reigns.

Sincerely,

Ryan Chamberlin
Candidate for Florida State House of Representatives
[](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i9gL9eEXFQve0iI&b=gSmf.BTSvesjIh7E.AA4bQ)

[P.S. Help me come out of the gate strong for this first major deadline with a donation of any amount!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i9gL9eEXFQve0iI&b=hxmK2hkEQVKaNBJGpHXTnw)

**Left-wing activists used the media to manipulate the 2020 and 2022 elections for their radical political agenda, leaving millions of voters to cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

MRC also has evidence that Google is punishing Republicans who dared to speak out or take action against Big Tech by hiding their campaign websites from search results.

**Google buried the campaign websites of lawmakers critical of Big Tech 100% of the time.**

We also caught Google manipulating searches to bury GOP campaign sites in 83% of the top Senate races.

Google showed its anti-conservative views when it buried Senate Republican candidates' campaign websites before the 2022 midterm elections.

And if we don't expose Google to voters before the 2024 election, we can expect the same results.

[_**Can you join the fight for FREE elections by sending your urgent support? Click here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec3be5e36252457cbcb694c902d4c887&_e=0fOWvli4-ofyqafM-0d72IAX1ZihPwMuQLD3Rb8-P25G260vHh4B5W263Td_FO_zKwH0QRAWrXEJVj2aRPJXKCcJgEpjPAzzxwhMu_YTH5bskhA2uYplqwjzFyzKNRaJOv0qgidqdDsM57rCR9gcRrwKBDtlnJL52tRHwCsmVOgt2uRYhk8tEldJo-heGjGOorjHm4HDbuqe-JxMYDUHppGaTgm158sdXVL4K3y-BqurIhspmaDIexo4AobmazpLDghIgxP0K9JHtwkBkKvoMg%3D%3D)

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

_**How did we expose the left-wing media? **_

**FIRST:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 800,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**SECOND:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

clean_body: Friend, My New Year's resolution: to DESTROY the radical Left media before the 2024 elections. Make no mistake -- they will try stealing another election. The Hunter Biden laptop only scratches the surface of their corruption. The radical left is colluding with the media and Big Tech to change the outcome of our elections. If we don 't stop them now, they will do it again! My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies. We're raising $75,000 before midnight on New Year's Eve to STOP far-left corruption and manipulation of our country. Can I count on you to join the fight by sending in an urgent gift right now? Click any link below to send your support. Left-wing activists used the media to manipulate the 2020 and 2022 elections for their radical political agenda, leaving millions of voters to cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates. They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump. MRC also has evidence that Google is punishing Republicans who dared to speak out or take action against Big Tech by hiding their campaign websites from search results. Google buried the campaign websites of lawmakers critical of Big Tech 100% of the time. We also caught Google manipulating searches to bury GOP campaign sites in 83% of the top Senate races. Google showed its anti-conservative views when it buried Senate Republican candidates' campaign websites before the 2022 midterm elections. And if we don't expose Google to voters before the 2024 election, we can expect the same results. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. How did we expose the left-wing media? FIRST: The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 800,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987. SECOND: My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias. THIRD: MRC's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters. Friend, your support helps MRC fight against the lies of the radical left and tell the truth to voters. Can I count on your support? Click below and send your gift before midnight on December 31st. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Candidate George Santos claimed he worked at Goldman Sachs & Citigroup, and attended NYU & Baruch College. No. Santos claimed he was Jewish. No, again. He said his mom was from Belgium. She's from Brazil. We know all this because of the pioneering work of Citizens for Responsibility & Ethics in Washington (CREW).
body:
How this clown even got elected ...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T587ab288-28de-4ed0-8d6c-40fc8ede673f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _**You've probably seen a lot about George Santos recently** , **a Republican elected to Congress **who claimed he worked at Goldman Sachs & Citigroup, attended NYU & Baruch College. None of this was true and we know that because of the pioneering work of Citizens for Responsibility & Ethics in Washington (CREW)._ [**_Can you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to CREW Today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf028bea9-b370-49d2-8a97-5af0ec0445e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Santos claimed he was Jewish. He's not. He said his mom was from Belgium. She's from Brazil. In Brazil, he was charged with forging checks and we're not even 100% sure at this point that he's a U.S. citizen. **_ Sadly, from Majorie Taylor Greene to Lauren Boebert, Ted Cruz to Donald Trump, serial lying, conspiracy-mongering and even criminality are not shocking anymore. **_It will take more than winning races to secure our democracy, we must protect_**** _ its integrity from scammers, criminals, extremists and other malcontents who mostly assemble in today's GOP._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7186fe5d-1397-4ae3-879c-c0710961f384/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_So we're asking you to join us in supporting Citizens for Responsibility & Ethics in Washington (CREW). They're done everything from successfully expose the grift running rampant in today's GOP to leading an effort that ended in the court-ordered removal of an insurrectionist from office_**-_-the first since 1869. In Otero County NM, Commissioner & head of "Cowboys for Trump" Couy Griffin saw his violent Jan 6th sedition cost him elected office, setting a key precedent and putting other Republican traitors on notice. _ _This is an important moment. George Santos' actions need a detailed investigation as he goes to Washington, if we're to have any chance of his removal. I can't think of anyone more likely to make it happen than CREW._ [**_Can you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to CREW Today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3b09a74-2cb6-43e8-b8c6-c369e46cd3eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for the integrity of our democracy. Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2eba0517-0d3b-45cc-b72f-ce63c665ce1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/citizensforresponsibilityandethicsinwashington3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T021931c9-f5b5-49a8-98ad-03cd134de5c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=8a736c06-f912-477a-a8df-a93291aa6cc1&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=8a736c06-f912-477a-a8df-a93291aa6cc1&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Asking because it’s important

body:
| The attacks from Elon Musk, Fox News, and Donald Trump have already begun.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1531%2E5257348%2EE6e_2Z)
It’s simple, Derek.
At midnight, we’ll reach the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year — the cutoff to receive contributions that will appear in next month’s public report.
Three days later, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party will be sworn into the new Congress where they will hold the House majority.
The attacks from Elon Musk, Fox News, and Donald Trump have already begun.
And they will ramp up as McCarthy goes to extreme lengths to marginalize and silence Adam’s voice for daring to hold Trump and the GOP accountable.
**[Derek, will you make a $10 contribution to our campaign before the midnight FEC fundraising deadline so we are prepared to respond to the GOP’s attacks as they increase exponentially once Republicans take the majority three days from now?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221231_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1531%2E5257348%2EE6e_2Z)**

name: VoteVets.org
subject: direct. Here’s why your $3 makes a difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Give us just a few seconds to explain
#
Derek -
Let us be direct:
We’re asking you to contribute $3 before our fundraising deadline comes to a close at midnight tonight.
We will use your donation to fund our political work in 2024. With a number of tough Senate races at stake in a tight chamber, that’s important.
We will use your donation to make sure Trump or DeSantis don’t win the White House. You know the stakes there.
We will use your donation to fight for Veterans and Military Families on Capitol Hill.
So please. Contribute here before midnight. We cannot do it without you.
[**Use this link to donate $3 or whatever you can afford to VoteVets before our midnight fundraising deadline.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221231-1-15&t=1&akid=7255%2E3013755%2EnHec2T)

name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: I’m reaching out to you with a request before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Before we enter 2023, will you support the DNC with a donation? | |
---
Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: _I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation._ **I mean it.** This year we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. **This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone. And they’re coming up on their final deadline of 2022.** **[Before we enter 2023, will you chip in a few bucks -- or even $7 -- to the DNC? clean_body: Before we enter 2023, will you support the DNC with a donation? | | Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation. I mean it. This year we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone. And they’re coming up on their final deadline of 2022. We’ve got to keep up our work of electing Democrats at every level and building a better America -- and the DNC’s work is integral to it. I really appreciate your support this year, Derek. God love ya. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . In the new year, there will still be a lot of work to do to fight for a Texas where every Texan can live with dignity and justice, but that's why I'm so proud to serve on the Board of the Texas Civil clean_body: I hope you will consider making a tax-deductible contribution to the Texas Civil Rights Project. | | | Hi Peter, Before the year ends, I want to thank you again for supporting my campaign and our vision for South Texas in which our communities come together to support one another rather than seek ways to further divide us. In the new year, there will still be a lot of work to do to fight for a Texas where every Texan can live with dignity and justice, but that's why I'm so proud to serve on the Board of the Texas Civil Rights Project. As the year ends, I have one final ask for you – I hope you will consider making a tax-deductible contribution to the Texas Civil Rights Project. As a Board Member of TCRP, I've seen how our community of passionate advocates has come together from across our state and our nation to demand that we have free and fair elections, that immigrants and borderland communities be treated with dignity and respect, and that we invest in our communities rather than criminalize them. I hope you will join me in supporting the Texas Civil Rights Project during this end-of-year season of giving. In Solidarity, Jessica Cisneros Board Member, Texas Civil Rights Project PS – if you are not in a position to give, I hope you will learn more about the Texas Civil Rights Project's work and follow them on , , , or . * | PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: GOP ALERTS
subject: Less than 24 hours!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Time to act ⏰

|

| | Dear Peter, I can’t thank you enough for your critical support this year. As the year winds down and we get back to work, the new legislative session is right around the corner. We face mounting challenges that I am confident we can tackle, together. However, we need your help to continue this fight. [_**Are you able to chip in today to help fuel our fight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56699253/385776939/-1941897473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmM4OGQ0OS00Yjg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uPhHx9kypIMKc62E_0QtOSpSDOb5g-SMb0cvk2cuzNk=) This fight is for all Tennesseans, to improve our healthcare, our infrastructure, our public schools, and our environment. Your support today will aid in our efforts for a growing and prospering Tennessee that benefits us all. Thank you and I send my best wishes to you and yours for the upcoming year. Best,
Heidi

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, I can’t thank you enough for your critical support this year. As the year winds down and we get back to work, the new legislative session is right around the corner. We face mounting challenges that I am confident we can tackle, together. However, we need your help to continue this fight. = This fight is for all Tennesseans, to improve our healthcare, our infrastructure, our public schools, and our environment. Your support today will aid in our efforts for a growing and prospering Tennessee that benefits us all. Thank you and I send my best wishes to you and yours for the upcoming year. Best, Heidi = | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Jacob Kleinrock treasurer. Campbell for State Senate PO Box 330302 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Giffords PAC
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your contribution is what sends a powerful message about the strength of our movement.
#

Team -
We have just hours left until our end of year fundraising drive comes to an end, [**and we’re humbly asking for your support.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221231-1-15&t=1&akid=3121%2E3935704%2E7TN33c)
In the nearly ten years since Giffords was founded, we’ve accomplished so much together.
At the state level, 525 strong gun safety laws have been passed nationwide to protect our communities. This summer, the strongest gun safety we’ve seen in decades was passed at the federal level. None of this would have been possible without the work we were able to do with the support of people like you.
However, there’s still so much more work to be done to keep our communities safe from gun violence. With our newly elected and narrowly divided Congress being sworn in next month, there will be challenges ahead. We’re going to have to be prepared to make our voices heard and demand that our new Congress has the courage to act.
Tonight’s year-end fundraising deadline is an ultimate test for our movement. We need to close our 2022 fundraising gap so we can have strong numbers in our public report. All eyes will be on us, especially the gun lobby’s, to see if we have the strength in numbers to keep our momentum going in the new year.
So we’re humbly asking you: [**Will you please chip in $3 to Giffords PAC today? Your contribution is what sends a powerful message about the strength of our movement.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221231-1-15&t=2&akid=3121%2E3935704%2E7TN33c)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-dec22.jP9tfI&refcode=em221231-1-15&t=21&akid=3121%2E3935704%2E7TN33c)**

Thank you for stepping up when it matters most,
The team at Giffords PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=3121%2E3935704%2E7TN33c) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: last call!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
I wanted to catch you quickly before the close of 2022. My finance team has been keeping me updated on the latest numbers, and we are so close to hitting our final end-of-quarter goal of the year.
Hi – Happy New Year's Eve!
I wanted to catch you quickly before the close of 2022. My finance team has been keeping me updated on the latest numbers, and we are so close to hitting our final end-of-quarter goal of the year. This is our last filing period before the next cycle begins, and hitting this goal will be critical to starting the next cycle off strong.
I know we’ve asked a lot of you, and we’re so grateful for all the support you’ve shown so far. But if you’re able, I’d greatly appreciate it if you could donate to help kickstart our 2024 campaign efforts.
Can I count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford before the ball drops at midnight? Here is the best link to use:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCT-05-Email-Dec2022-FR-EOY?refcode=jahanaNYE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56699510/385777144/1252986798?refcode=E19919-20221231-EOY3-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkzMTE2YS00Yzg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TFiLbnQMHcp5HkHyBDGKDUPiCG2kWjmB3ixooeH5dg=)**
I hope you have a safe and peaceful end to 2022. THANK YOU for all your support this year. See you in 2023!
– Jahana

Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes

Peter,

Candidates with public service backgrounds – from educators to firefighters to veterans – know first-hand the real-life impact of policies and their direct work in strengthening their communities. That makes them uniquely qualified for public office.

But it also means that they can’t rely on personal wealth or connections in high places to fund their campaigns. In 2022, Democrats Serve worked to fix that by supporting public servant candidates with resources and training.

**Our strategy worked, and we’re already hard at work to keep electing public service pros in 2023 and beyond, but we rely on grassroots supporters to help us.**

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

That makes them uniquely qualified for public office. But it also means that they can’t rely on personal wealth or connections in high places to fund their campaigns. In 2022, Democrats Serve worked to fix that by supporting public servant candidates with resources and training. body:
I hope you had a blessed Christmas, and are enjoying a wonderful holiday season. I want to let you know that many great Judicial Watch members and supporters are helping us with year-end gifts, and I am very grateful!

| |
---
|

Dear Fellow American,

Steve Andersen

| Dear Fellow American,

The clock is ticking down on 2022, but there is still time to help Judicial Watch with [your best year-end tax-deductible gift!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61637&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

With the support of our members, we are fighting for the rule of law with greater impact than ever.

But we need your help now so that we can continue:
* Fighting for honest elections across the country;
* Exposing taxpayer funding of Critical Race Theory propaganda and other extreme woke programs in our schools, military academies and other public institutions;
* Holding corrupt politicians and secretive government officials accountable;
* Educating the American people about the dreadful impact and costs of the Biden administration’s refusal to enforce our laws against illegal immigration.

[**Please help us with your best year-end gift today!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61637&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70d88592eaf34812b5adf510b0531b22&_e=yDRi98GuR9jA5gwYMdj7lCbfpYYvX_XjMxDv9dyPKBW6PSGGyBb7sCjaFIwlMWrnffhYbr1zjuhcCHxKZgObDZweQN6ymtXBUkFNSvVF2-Z5-PZ4uj1mekRPsyP2yWCJi2jSz1_eQlRJOtpJqPoN3DVNDneEln8JA-eYM4nwLSp_zCbicRuA2kZvKH8wnPQbiZlA0XOf4yXdY2_lz2xcolxafQVrAkGIuji8BvFP1GNYIF3pq7rf-IMyvp_pN2UOwe2OWphdg4RorseX1w1f47nPdUszSytxex0PjAj-48tRy7-JiAmHkzilgy-hRnpPL5uQ0f0fKCXm4wy2BDJzAY5NZBayzR32fJa4y9chzQK02YtZZtKPAqzLOOu1qir4)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70d88592eaf34812b5adf510b0531b22&_e=yDRi98GuR9jA5gwYMdj7lCbfpYYvX_XjMxDv9dyPKBW6PSGGyBb7sCjaFIwlMWrnffhYbr1zjuhcCHxKZgObDZweQN6ymtXBUkFNSvVF2-Z5-PZ4uj1mekRPsyP2yWCJi2jSz1_eQlRJOtpJqPoN3DVNDneEln8JA-eYM4nwLSp_zCbicRuA2kZvKH8wnPQbiZlA0XOf4yXdY2_lz2xcolxafQVrAkGIuji8BvFP1GO2Hxyn7y2THpv208f--nklFGHM4rUz4fbJMe4Mg8ktH9iUYu09RKVh8qhPWLrMAlkYZtluDM6sTt8XGn_IGPKXXGWBKEzPvgfEdER3WNC23h5DGt055pNEjmZDpJg3TShsL7n_PJoEzcnu3OxEiXpo)
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70d88592eaf34812b5adf510b0531b22&_e=yDRi98GuR9jA5gwYMdj7lCbfpYYvX_XjMxDv9dyPKBW6PSGGyBb7sCjaFIwlMWrnffhYbr1zjuhcCHxKZgObDZweQN6ymtXBUkFNSvVF2-Z5-PZ4uj1mekRPsyP2yWCJi2jSz1_eQlRJOtpJqPoN3DVNDneEln8JA-eYM4nwLSp_zCbicRuA2kZvKH8wnPQbiZlA0XOf4yXdY2_lz2xcolxafQVrAkGIuji8BvFP1GOR-P0RyjsmSTmXbcO5K5f734naFeo8aAr6_b5FuZyUh9BoJnDDKH9nXwzj_kaH7GhHmfzTr4kxc_npEXTG090xsCstWgNxLNGwmnQSt99zjR_BdVYKNnctkjUU-YJteZCQIzYWIbhhRAS9MXu96LiX)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70d88592eaf34812b5adf510b0531b22&_e=yDRi98GuR9jA5gwYMdj7lCbfpYYvX_XjMxDv9dyPKBW6PSGGyBb7sCjaFIwlMWrnffhYbr1zjuhcCHxKZgObDZweQN6ymtXBUkFNSvVF2-Z5-PZ4uj1mekRPsyP2yWCJi2jSz1_eQlRJOtpJqPoN3DVNDneEln8JA-eYM4nwLSp_zCbicRuA2kZvKH8wnPQbiZlA0XOf4yXdY2_lz2xcolxafQVrAkGIuji8BvFP1GNTocNcjEyZHvr1BgWodz9FiYvDDLZIa8vFiBi1-qTmEr7BPfjtQW16GJ2gKF7R5HZLSCkeYxF9jAzzUFOnSXXS6BKJFi5AewZIA9-I_C89g6kcyZpvR6Frj1GvNmUBgWz0i2nf6hhPF9E1Xb92jV4o) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: AG Miyares
subject: 7 BIG accomplishments 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
2022 has been a whirlwind of a year... | | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=d90554560cae4a62b558967eb234a116&_e=2cHS5MUeJzBWLqSzwQba_YkF6ExDUhNTnA6AdkzhZRJXEDYRrdxfTzgbrGCFmvZ87nT3jYfuwDBsJFURLYFzfHihQJBSkuG_RpZAGjydmYl1gfVR00J2VHodtCYjgaxx2CFXXx3O8uTC0pzlyE8GY5d1bqZaXkmlTlV8x0bkbLbqYI0gkUrSwTS3OB66_SBQ6oUXcFzvGqR5HQCqPE6PcaMrn3MoRF7WAlmt4xt_NgWujzNGbLe9Ca0cPOwfxpyVKt_LuO17ekZoZfgnLIIXiqahGDqOJLVeFM4cOUaqtXDTAWdUAQFiNW0zfsJ7Qi7nVR14dckiHRux7ns4K2j07E89iKk2Kx0O3eCQ4fOUNiGcxT1bWAQZTakluVvScMGF)

Friend – I’m proud of my team’s accomplishments throughout my first year serving as Virginia’s Attorney General. In 2022 we... ✅ Launched Operation Ceasefire to go after repeat, violent criminals. ✅ Prevented Virginia’s schools and childcare centers from requiring the COVID vaccine. ✅ Launched an investigation into Loudoun County Public Schools’ mishandling of multiple sexual assault cases. _[**KEEP FIGHTING FOR VIRGINIA Dear Friend,

Please donate $23 today to help us build a progressive Pennsylvania.

DONATE $23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=123122&amount=23]

As we start this New Year, progressive efforts are budding in PA, and our work together will make it flourish! The results of the midterm elections show that progressives in PA are active — and we know that so many other people around the state are ready to join our cause as activists and voters. Reaching them is a key part of Keystone Progress's work.

But we need your support today, so please give $23 before 2023. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=123122&amount=23]

Together, we can build a Pennsylvania that provides everyone with the rights and resources they need to thrive. We will fight for every single person who lives here, because every one of us deserves that dignity and respect.

We are grateful to have you in this fight with us. Please give today to reaffirm your commitment.

Wishing you the happiest New Year!

Laura

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Reflecting on 2022
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
Friend,Thank you. 2022 was an incredible year, and it’s because of you. Our team had a tremendous challenge in front of us and not only did we protect our House DFL majority, we won a trifecta! I’m so proud of all we accomplished in 2022, and I’m excited to see what we can do together in 2023.
This House DFL majority is committed to building a Minnesota that works better for everyone. From securing reproductive freedom and funding our schools to making housing more affordable and taking bold climate action, there is so much we can achieve.
Friend, none of this would be possible without you. With support of DFLers like you, 2022 was a great year. Let’s make 2023 even better.
Happy New Year,
Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House
Minnesota House of Representatives
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=123122EOY12]
Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
255 Plato Blvd E
Saint Paul, MN 55105
United States https://twitter.com/mnhouseDFL [https://twitter.com/mnhouseDFL] https://www.facebook.com/mnhousedfl [https://www.facebook.com/mnhousedfl] https://www.dflhouse.com/ [https://www.dflhouse.com/] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ak20don310KR6-uQVjV7fw2?unsubscribedata=mfC6NQKFa3iLXirqlBYR6Ev1KRbrJ7ZUDHMGxhzvZkTw4mkQoLYH7I8tyThbzvfCvwhT2v3BOtGUUh8ewt0X2avFJrAGOMJ0IZOMLJrCHTUBUN0r1bn32swBzTPF3TGrtQWYcK38NgNr5VoeS7QnwZ9OCYniKqKNkJQRpgqbr%2FRqX0satiE0163SMwF2f6leQx4pzGbSdCYTzNS9l2NgACmhRpZroa0wa3fKhwjn4QwoVKiuEoQA%2BIPb6GO3Xbnnf4S%2Fg9gnC%2BvRvHyQMsNBc8X2zO4IF%2FPwggw8nakwYO%2BBhKe185YZVa1brINCG5d4eaAMwGpW8brkz99knehWbcw%2F4iXTgB9CPR3etsBVZi66aFkglf8F3vc%2FWCTC6nX6mNQa8su0yQq1MMat4tXQItz4qdCTgPD0kp7V8rWPlBk%3D .

body:
| Hi, it’s Dan.

I hope you and your loved ones are enjoying the holiday season. This is my last email to you before I officially log off for the year and I’m reaching out to ask for your support ahead of our fundraising deadline tonight at midnight.

It’s our first major deadline since you helped us win last month’s election, and we need to use this as an opportunity to show that Democrats are engaged and energized to take back the House majority in 2024.

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/dec22-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56703076/385784370/1325829060?amount=15&contactdata=LvX1dKVndIH4eZNabxuiER7U6cnKc4Iu7T0WijU6hy%2F5pLW508Zj3iU6LZPBPBWip38p7ALpiJk0NLJjg6utrU0JSomr%2FfbcmxcPMHyk6w8iOThc9aDXwVPIj1mmaL759QDJj6GRMBkmqWfF8aa04A%3D%3D&refcode2=d24be6df-5089-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221231_FR_1.3_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_fec&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRiZTZkZi01MDg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7BKfIGQiWEfK97kCF2JqyrUX73MJw9sG7G03yvlw7g=)**

We won last month thanks to early investments we made in our race nearly two years ago, and we’re doing the same work again because we know our district will remain competitive going forward.

We couldn’t do this work without you, so will you please contribute $15 or any amount to support our campaign before we close the books on 2022?

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/dec22-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56703078/385784371/1325829060?amount=15&contactdata=LvX1dKVndIH4eZNabxuiER7U6cnKc4Iu7T0WijU6hy%2F5pLW508Zj3iU6LZPBPBWip38p7ALpiJk0NLJjg6utrU0JSomr%2FfbcmxcPMHyk6w8iOThc9aDXwVPIj1mmaL759QDJj6GRMBkmqWfF8aa04A%3D%3D&refcode2=d24be6df-5089-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221231_FR_1.3_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_fec&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRiZTZkZi01MDg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7BKfIGQiWEfK97kCF2JqyrUX73MJw9sG7G03yvlw7g=)**

Thank you so much, and Happy New Year!

Dan

We’re counting on grassroots Democratic members to come together early and stand against this GOP threat, but our records show that you haven’t activated your Democratic membership -- and this is your last chance to do so before the end of the year! Happy New Year, Peter! 2022 has been a long year, and having Joe Biden as President made it feel even longer. Everyone makes a New Year’s resolution, but Biden has a lot of things he needs to try and do differently in 2023. Crippling inflation, a rampant border crisis, and the Left’s woke agenda are hurting every American. subject: Bruce and I watch this movie every New Year’s Eve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
It's a story about love, loyalty, and courage. It's about how people survive and how they flourish — even against all odds. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56705732/385786230/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ11B_EOQ_E_20221231_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDcxY2RiNC01Mjg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eDlC0iA_96Lzu1zeKpLrR1z9GeKz6LH3QwpYnEbXOdw=&emci=ee71cdb4-5289-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=f071cdb4-5289-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=9027908)
---
Happy New Year's Eve — I hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy. Bruce and I always like to have a quiet New Year's, so tonight, we'll keep up our tradition of rewatching Casablanca for the zillionth time. Every time I watch it, Casablanca gives me hope. It's a story about love, loyalty, and courage. It's about how people survive and how they flourish — even against all odds. And it's about hope — young people on the threshold of building a new life, and old people looking for a safe landing place. At the edge of a big transformation — praying and fighting for a brighter dawn. What better way to start the new year to come? 2023 will be a better year, but not because there's any magic associated with turning a page on a calendar. It will be a better year because so many people have fought so hard throughout these past few challenging years — and will continue to fight. So many people just worked their tails off to defend our democracy in the midterms, paving the way for a better 2023 than the pundits predicted. So many workers across the country have been unionizing and fighting back against unjust working conditions — to demand better for themselves and for workers everywhere. So many people pushed uphill for student debt cancellation, investments in fighting climate change, a tax hike on billionaire corporations, and lower prescription drug prices — and now change is on the way. We have a lot of work ahead of us in 2023, and I'm asking if you can chip in to help keep up the fight, and the hope. clean_body: It's a story about love, loyalty, and courage. It's about how people survive and how they flourish — even against all odds. | | | Happy New Year's Eve — I hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy. Bruce and I always like to have a quiet New Year's, so tonight, we'll keep up our tradition of rewatching Casablanca for the zillionth time. Every time I watch it, Casablanca gives me hope. It's a story about love, loyalty, and courage. It's about how people survive and how they flourish — even against all odds. And it's about hope — young people on the threshold of building a new life, and old people looking for a safe landing place. At the edge of a big transformation — praying and fighting for a brighter dawn. What better way to start the new year to come? 2023 will be a better year, but not because there's any magic associated with turning a page on a calendar. It will be a better year because so many people have fought so hard throughout these past few challenging years — and will continue to fight. So many people just worked their tails off to defend our democracy in the midterms, paving the way for a better 2023 than the pundits predicted. So many workers across the country have been unionizing and fighting back against unjust working conditions — to demand better for themselves and for workers everywhere. So many people pushed uphill for student debt cancellation, investments in fighting climate change, a tax hike on billionaire corporations, and lower prescription drug prices — and now change is on the way. We have a lot of work ahead of us in 2023, and I'm asking if you can chip in to help keep up the fight, and the hope. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | If you can believe it, we launched our presidential exploratory committee four years ago on this day based on a few key pillars: Calling out what's broken, laying out plans to fix it, and building a grassroots movement — where everyone has an equal voice — to make change. Today, we're still following those same values through Warren Democrats. We're still fighting to put political and economic power in the hands of the people — where it belongs. And we're going to keep up the fight in 2023 and beyond. But it's only possible with the continued support of people like you. Let's keep working side by side to make sure the new year is a brighter one for everyone who's struggling and everyone who needs a government that finally is on their side. = Have a safe and happy New Year's Eve, and thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

We're still $2,032 from reaching our goal, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me make up the difference. We don’t have much time to turn things around, so I need you to act quickly. Before you begin your New Year’s festivities, I’m hoping you’ll chip in just one final $5 to help push us over the top. Can I count on you to help me finish the year off strong? You can use this personal link to make your donation before the deadline hits in 24 hours: \- Lisa Sent from my iPhone Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Susan Wild
subject: as 2022 wraps up:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I am so grateful for your past support, which has been instrumental in building a solid campaign.

| Hi Peter,

I wanted to check in quickly to update you on our fundraising. We have just a few hours to go before our final FEC filing deadline of 2022, but we’re still $2,391 short of our $10,000 goal.

If you are able, would you consider chipping in before midnight? [_**https://wildforcongress.com/2022Goal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56683384/385735052/-1389333690?refcode=BLU-SWC-20221231-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzNmYjg5ZS0yOTg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5ehGJd7qy5EWs1ZQ7ZVkAqJUJL088F08Li289JO6nI=)

Believe me, Peter, I hate asking for your hard-earned money — and I know I’ve been asking a lot ahead of this important FEC filing deadline. But if we’re going to stand a chance against Republicans’ attempts to unseat me, we need to start laying the foundation for a strong campaign right now.

Even a small contribution, like $5 or $10, can make a big difference. Can I count on you to chip in before midnight?

You can use this secure link: [_**https://wildforcongress.com/2022Goal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56683385/385735053/-1389333690?refcode=BLU-SWC-20221231-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzNmYjg5ZS0yOTg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5ehGJd7qy5EWs1ZQ7ZVkAqJUJL088F08Li289JO6nI=)

Thank you,
Susan

body:
Before tonight's festivities, please read:
Peter,

Before tonight's festivities begin, we wanted to check in.

**[We have until midnight TONIGHT to reach our crucial $10,000 end-of-year fundraising goal. Can Derek count on you to chip in whatever you can to help us close the gap and meet our final goal before midnight, Peter?](https://act.myngp.com/el/WsJRr81mv8QLrDw3ZH9ktloWJl0-_RbB0y4sg9xmFZA=/rKr51YkKWuj456--by4dkkplersbEvkfviw4gX-ssj0=?refcode=em22_221231_eoy3_fndd_gq_act___dkfc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221231_eoy3_fndd_gq_act___dkfc_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

This year has been one of triumphs and losses. We defied the odds and expanded our narrow Democratic Majority in the Senate. And despite losing the House, we were able to re-elect Derek, defend vulnerable Democrats like Dr. Kim Schrier, and even flip Washington's 3rd Congressional District BLUE.

Now, as we look ahead to the new year, we need all hands on deck to ensure pro-democracy, for-the-people Democrats like Derek have the resources needed to continue fighting effectively and relentlessly on Capitol Hill.

**[The clock is ticking down to midnight, and Derek needs your help crossing the finish line. Please contribute $10 or more to help us reach our $10,000 end-of-year goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WsJRr81mv8QLrDw3ZH9ktloWJl0-_RbB0y4sg9xmFZA=/rKr51YkKWuj456--by4dkkplersbEvkfviw4gX-ssj0=?refcode=em22_221231_eoy3_fndd_gq_act___dkfc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221231_eoy3_fndd_gq_act___dkfc_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

House majority or not, Derek will never stop fighting for the people in our region. Whether that means defending reproductive rights, fighting to enact common-sense gun-safety laws, moving our economy forward, or protecting our natural resources, we're ready to hit the ground running come 2023.

Thank you, and Happy New Year!

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | This year has been one of triumphs and losses. We defied the odds and expanded our narrow Democratic Majority in the Senate. And despite losing the House, we were able to re-elect Derek, defend vulnerable Democrats like Dr. Kim Schrier, and even flip Washington's 3rd Congressional District BLUE. Now, as we look ahead to the new year, we need all hands on deck to ensure pro-democracy, for-the-people Democrats like Derek have the resources needed to continue fighting effectively and relentlessly on Capitol Hill. House majority or not, Derek will never stop fighting for the people in our region. Whether that means defending reproductive rights, fighting to enact common-sense gun-safety laws, moving our economy forward, or protecting our natural resources, we're ready to hit the ground running come 2023. Thank you, and Happy New Year! Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. name: Eric Swalwell (personal)
subject: 2023 here we come!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Team,

It’s New Year’s Eve, and I know you have plans, so I’ll make this quick.

On January 3, the 118th Congress will be sworn into office. Members of Congress will pledge to protect and defend the Constitution and faithfully discharge their duty to the American people.

We already know there are MAGA Republicans unable to honor this oath. Through words and actions, they are making it clear protecting and defending our democracy is not a priority.

And now, because Kevin McCarthy is sowing the wind and corruptly bargaining with these extremists to secure the speakership, congressional Republicans are about to reap the whirlwind.

Team, we’re heading into troubled times. Kevin McCarthy is an opportunist, not a leader. His speakership — if he gets there — will be a short and unqualified failure.

But it will be the American people and our democracy paying the price.

That’s why I’m asking you, as we close out 2022, to help us hit our end-of-year goal by 11:59 p.m. tonight.

We need to bring in $1,675 to get us there. Please take a moment and use this link to make a donation: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-FR-December?refcode=E19894-20221231-EOY3-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-Holiday-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-FR-December?refcode=E19894-20221231-EOY3-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-Holiday-NA&amount=25]

Thank you for all you are doing. From my family to yours, have a safe and happy New Year!

— Eric

Peter, the integrity of our elections is at stake. As we stand on the brink of the 2024 election cycle, **we must act in 2023 to restore free, fair, and transparent elections.** This conservative fight trumps every other one because we can’t win on any front until we restore faith in our elections. Peter, tonight at MIDNIGHT marks my final fundraising deadline of the year, but more importantly, this is the last deadline before Republicans officially take back the House. I need your help ensuring election integrity is our number 1 priority next year. name: Greg Landsman
subject: Before we ring in the new year…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
There’s a lot to be grateful for this year

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56684513/385739184/-1334107482?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ3ODU5My0yYzg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FcvO_uyfOvXkUdQKEIBK4bq9Tqsbh75EU93QRXMT1pI=)
---
We have a lot to be grateful for this year.

**I’m grateful for supporters like you** who helped our team defeat one of the most entrenched and extreme Republicans in Congress and give OH‐01 the leadership it deserves.

**I’m grateful we refused every dime from corporate PACS and special interest groups.** We relied on folks like you chipping in $1 or $7 at a time to fund our campaign, and it shows.

That grassroots effort is grounded in the values we fought for and the commitment to community that our campaign was — _and continues to be_ — all about.

And, I’m especially grateful that we were able to **do it by forming a team of Democrats, Republicans, and Independents** to make a difference for our district and move beyond the politics of the past.

body:
Dear Peter,

_This is bad news._

Democrats just leaked Donald Trump's tax returns.

**Now the regime's foot soldiers in the IRS will comb through Trump's returns to fabricate even more witch hunts and prosecutions.**

The MAGA movement needs to fight back right now.

But to defend President Trump, I need to hit my $50,000 goal by midnight tonight.

**[Will you chip in to defend President Trump](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61332064:snlgYlDpN:m:1:2365227053:F1476CC65A3010CFA9E83015969DDF8C:r)?**

And the GOP majority will take power in just three days.

_I need to hit the ground running in the fights to:_

DEFUND the witch hunt into Donald Trump.

**But I can't win this fight without you.**

name: Andy Kim
subject: Final thoughts on 2022, and what’s ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
As we close the books on an exhausting, exhilarating 2022, I want to take one more chance to tell you how glad I am that you're a part of this movement.

At a time when America is facing a stark choice between giving in to cynicism or recommitting to our highest ideals, I'm proud that we're doubling down on our belief in community and democracy.

This year, we stood strong despite a multimillion dollar effort to buy this congressional seat. Through a tough race, we held firm to our principles, refusing corporate PAC money, pushing for fairness and transparency in our elections, and doubling down on our belief in grassroots organizing.

Faced with unprecedented dangerous attacks on our democracy itself, this movement has shown – over and over – that there's no remedy more effective than a group of passionate people willing to choose and work for a better future.

The work's far from over, of course. When I take the oath of office next week, I'll be joined by more than 170 people who deny or question the results of the 2020 election. Recent news suggests that we've got a long way to go to bring truth to our politics, and I'm sorry to say that the incoming GOP leadership continues to fan the flames of the Big Lie.

Still, I'm optimistic. We're seeing more and more folks rejecting the politics of division and hate and choosing humility, service, and compassion. And in just the last few weeks, we've secured crucial victories in protecting marriage equality, funding our government, and securing our elections.

There's a lot to do, and I am eager to get to work. I look forward to fighting to continue to bring down health care costs, get our infrastructure investments on track, and work toward a politics that is rooted in service and civility.

Wishing you a happy and healthy new year,

Andy

P.S. While the 2024 election is still a ways away, my team and I have already started work to keep our movement strong and growing. Will you chip in $3 to keep up the momentum in 2023? Trump is still running for President. He wants a rematch against President Biden, and we can’t let him come within even an inch of winning.

This is the tumbler that makes drinks great again...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11082/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11082/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5?message_id=IjMyOTU3YjUwLTZiODYtMDEzYi1mYzU1LTQyMDEwYTgwMDA5OEB0aGVndW5wZW9wbGUuY29tIg==).
---
| |
---
---
|
---
It was 1776 when America gave Great Britain the finger and said “we’re out.”
For two-and-and-half centuries we Americans have enjoyed unadulterated, in-your-face freedom. (Despite the left wing’s best efforts.)

And I think we can both agree that one thing has provided us with this freedom that we love and cherish.

Our God-given right to bear arms.

And if you're anything like us, you like to help preserve this legacy by showing your support for the 2nd amendment.

(Plus we find it’s a great snowflake repellent.)

That’s why we took this iconic number and had a little something engraved on our premium quality tumblers.

Because **I am 1776% sure no one will be taking my guns!**
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
And nothing makes me feel more like a red-blooded American patriot...
Than sipping Kentucky’s finest out of this bad boy while watching a snowflake run for a “safe space.”

The best part is you can make a day of it since the double-wall insulation keeps cold drinks cold for 24 hours. (And hot drinks are hot for 8 hours!)

**This is the tumbler that makes drinks great again.** Engraved by freedom-loving Americans in Boise, Idaho Food Grade 18/8 Stainless Steel Construction Fits and any truck or car cup holder Never rusts...even after collecting salty liberal tears Leak-proof lid for those bumpy roads or stormy fishing days Superior finish (Sweat-proof!) Fits 20oz of American whiskey, beer, water, coffee, etc 30-day money-back guarantee Makes the PERFECT gift This rugged tumbler is 100% awesome and 0% liberal.

So if you're unapologetically American and you like your beverages to stay icy cold, or scalding hot...

This Freedom Tumbler is for you.

And I have some excellent news for you today.

Because for a very limited time, [you can get your own Freedom Tumbler at just a fraction of the normal price.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11082/6374453/25665fa4d04c7ede4a77ed2a1c8ef7fc97023d66/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5)

If you were to go directly to our online store, you’d pay USD40 for this piece of badassery.

And we sell them at that price every single day of the week.

But I’m on a mission to make this thing go “viral.”

So right now you can get your very own Freedom Tumbler for only USD40 USD19.

Hell, at that price you can get one for you and a friend and still pay half of what one normally costs.

The only catch is, I set aside some of these for this special sale...and right now we only have 694 left as of the sending of this email!

And once those are gone you’ll have to pay the normal price of USD40.

I think we can both agree that USD19 is a small price to pay for showing your support for the 2nd amendment.

Plus pissing off whiny liberal snowflakes everywhere you go is _priceless._

**[GO HERE to claim your Freedom Tumbler for 50% OFF](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11082/6374453/25665fa4d04c7ede4a77ed2a1c8ef7fc97023d66/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5)**

So if you're ready to trigger a liberal just by enjoying a tasty beverage, you better hurry.

Because this IS a limited-time offer and these WILL sell out fast.

We’ve mostly been getting orders for multiple tumblers at this incredible price, so I really don’t know how much longer these will be available.

But if you order now, your Freedom Tumbler will be delivered to your front door in the next 3-5 days.

And since you're backed by our 30-day, 100% guarantee...

There’s no risk on your part.

If you're not 100% satisfied, email our support team and we’ll refund you every penny. But I don’t see that happening, to be honest.

**Just look at what other 2nd amendment supporters are saying about their Freedom Tumblers**

“ _Fist bumps, thumbs up, smiles, and some gal passed me her number at Starbucks....so be ready.”_ **Robert B. – Omaha, NE**

_“When drinking from this tumbler, I have bald eagles wearing American flags as capes swoop down and land on my arm. I get the nods and the handshakes when walking around, rocking this tumbler. People appreciate my badassness when representing.”_ **Justin G. – Toledo, OH**

_“I bought one for myself, now every member of the family wants one.”_ **Lenny P. – Marcus Hook, PA**

Remember, these are only 50% off until I sell the remaining ones.

**[GO HERE to get your Freedom Tumbler now](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11082/6374453/25665fa4d04c7ede4a77ed2a1c8ef7fc97023d66/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5)**

There’s never been a more important time than now to stand up for our rights.

Thanks for being a fellow patriot!
---
|
---
---

You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed.Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.
---
|
---

514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US

[1-Click Unsubscribe](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/one_click_unsubscribe/11082/6374453/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5) | [Edit Profile](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/edit_profile/11082/6374453/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5) | [Manage Subscriptions](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/unsubscribe/11082/6374453/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5) | [Report Spam](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/report_spam/11082/6374453/0d6d2c16c70aa30c3ecb5ae732dd5bc5eff5f6b5) |

body:

Peter, this is my last chance to reach out about hitting my final fundraising deadline of 2022.

This past year has been unbelievable thanks to YOUR SUPPORT. We were able to beat back the hand-picked Socialist candidate in Ohio and secure a conservative victory for all Americans.

We can’t let this momentum go to waste. We have too much to accomplish.

So please, if you’re able, rush whatever you’re able using the secure link below so I can hit my final fundraising deadline and we have the resources needed to kick 2023 off right!

[**_Use the secure link HERE to donate._**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=e7df0630589e450381b6d7d7e734f0da&_e=7ddzESr97yflUFe6L104RDmputEzURFIZHB6jmSoEYpAhXX8AeS2WZ74G3SNuiU1lSe_XWPdYmMujQVB4RFDzVMnxQPzpA1oYZzsdTyd8p-3Lwl5eZVugV6vvswQAbvT2EnZTj5KesiVqDOyT1UVbw3j7lNdGDmNLPC6KtzIWqrRLMxwoR7UVWXDp6PmSiJ_XPbZBVQb135s4F7iqHxRC_T-ZjTJzYP64cpld7WGvLIwOcWP0JuygbvXB_Jj07FkGEv0da0Jxas72CX-ke-9vp9uQ0qJPHPCeqoT05cW8MFpIrAj0jKauhtRKsHqfHY6bRCAbg31z2pYPUL8SCdZyb4Opd1E8YuKy2Cq2y3K83vQlqg_ijdKbp8IEpqb24p0vUAwmdmoOkiPamLt44TJneX6owq_boVG4bPLPblDOrr-NPSfu_0Egr7uNYzp7YL2srJ5TLPrHiRozf6JusEsG6dfj2ngJK86aL78sxBhheNJxleWu1VqMHP3e1ioPExtkyZGfXD7blvqfbquGFTBqZRFGNF0i2EQlx2NGFlJ4qTWWBUgxEFP-5LFGA1XtRpX)

Thank you in advance for your generosity and support. Happy early New Year to you and your family.

God Bless,

JD Vance

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: 🎉 Happy New Year 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Thank you for all your support – let’s keep up the fight for America’s future!
| | | Peter, The countdown is on – 2022 is quickly coming to a close as we prepare to ring in the New Year at midnight tonight.
_**I want to wish you and your loved ones all the best as we head into 2023!**_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/dd899540f253b05a/89f9dfd778c9acedc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
There’s no question that the last couple of years have been extremely challenging. Complete Democrat control in Washington has been a disaster for family budgets, our border security, and our great nation’s standing on the world stage.
The good news is we have a real reason for hope and optimism for a better tomorrow...
**We broke the D.C. Democrats’ grip on power this November, and I know that we’re going to make Joe Biden a one-term president and take back the Senate on November 5, 2024!**
Thank you, as always, for being part of our fight-to-win grassroots team. I’m grateful beyond words for your encouragement, prayers, and financial support as I help lead the charge for our conservative values and priorities in Washington.
\- Coach
---
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/dd899540f253b05a/0b741aa550c4fc04c3d6b838967d376c/33013)| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/dd899540f253b05a/113cdda249996de5c3d6b838967d376c/33013)| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/dd899540f253b05a/72176ddf554401fcc3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Dianne Black
subject: We need you to run for office
body:
Dear fellow Mississippians, Have you ever considered running for office? Do you want to recruit more Democrats to run for office in 2023? As
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/4fOLbQc9d/c?w=dQb56PdrffTdxAVwOOaCuB9-aiLz-nT3iVUPZMNPWGU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzRmT0xiUWM5ZD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImQ0ODdlYmZmLWQ3ZjUtNGFlYi1hZGIzLTFhZmNkMzc1NTliZiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | We will continue turningMississippi blue!
---
| | Dear fellow Mississippians, Have you ever considered running for office? Do you want to recruit more Democrats to run for office in 2023? As a small business owner, I didn't necessarily want to be a politician or run for Congress. But when no one stepped up, I knew it was up to me. With training, a supportive campaign team, and endorsements from Indivisible and the Mississippi Federation of Democratic Women ([MFDW](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/4fOLbQc9d/c?w=ZenVgxWmnkIMvhhs3GekNyrz7nbJNlLPI7ZZTM-LOOQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWZkdy5vcmciLCJyIjoiMjJlZWY3ZDgtMDM2OS00MjBjLTdiNjMtNmVjZmE3Y2VjNzY5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZDQ4N2ViZmYtZDdmNS00YWViLWFkYjMtMWFmY2QzNzU1OWJmIn0)), I became the first African-American woman to run for U.S. Congression for Mississippi District 1. We need more Democrats to run for office. We need you. To have a Democrat on the ballot for every race in Mississippi in 2023, MFDW will host a virtual workshop that will cover everything you need to know about launching a campaign. [Workshop to Recruit Democrats to Run for Office](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/4fOLbQc9d/c?w=LZ-BbYkGsGlmSxHPqP6PJgTRdC2SHrMCx7F3n8TfTn4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWZkdy5vcmcvcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uLXJ1bi1mb3Itb2ZmaWNlLTIwMjMiLCJyIjoiMjJlZWY3ZDgtMDM2OS00MjBjLTdiNjMtNmVjZmE3Y2VjNzY5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZDQ4N2ViZmYtZDdmNS00YWViLWFkYjMtMWFmY2QzNzU1OWJmIn0)When: Jan. 7, 2023, at 2 p.m.Where: VirtualCost: Free Led by experienced campaign professionals, you'll learn about 2023 election positions and qualifications, free training, pay, and filing deadlines. We'll also offer information on developing a campaign platform, building a campaign team, fundraising, and getting out the vote. This is a great opportunity for anyone who is interested in running for office, or who simply wants to learn more about the political process and recruit more Democrats to run for office. Please consider joining us for this informative and educational workshop. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out to Kelly Jacobs at [kellitaj@aol.com](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/4fOLbQc9d/c?w=wcplBkG4qCElA82kaC7wmtnQKNtNfaXDZnStt445P1o.eyJ1IjoibWFpbHRvOmtlbGxpdGFqQGFvbC5jb20iLCJyIjoiMjJlZWY3ZDgtMDM2OS00MjBjLTdiNjMtNmVjZmE3Y2VjNzY5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZDQ4N2ViZmYtZDdmNS00YWViLWFkYjMtMWFmY2QzNzU1OWJmIn0). Thank you for your support,Dianne Black
---
| | | [**REGISTER NOW**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/4fOLbQc9d/c?w=Yuax35WCOWEUwsp5m7IBC-X5X7VuRy7Qa_hADs-102s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWZkdy5vcmcvcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uLXJ1bi1mb3Itb2ZmaWNlLTIwMjMiLCJyIjoiOGRkNGJkMGQtNzAwMC00NjRjLTI0YzMtYmI4YjM3YjQ3MmMyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZDQ4N2ViZmYtZDdmNS00YWViLWFkYjMtMWFmY2QzNzU1OWJmIn0)
---
| | |
---

clean_body: Dear fellow Mississippians, Have you ever considered running for office? Do you want to recruit more Democrats to run for office in 2023? As | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | We will continue turningMississippi blue! | | Dear fellow Mississippians, Have you ever considered running for office? Do you want to recruit more Democrats to run for office in 2023? As a small business owner, I didn't necessarily want to be a politician or run for Congress. But when no one stepped up, I knew it was up to me. With training, a supportive campaign team, and endorsements from Indivisible and the Mississippi Federation of Democratic Women (), I became the first African-American woman to run for U.S. Congression for Mississippi District 1. We need more Democrats to run for office. We need you. To have a Democrat on the ballot for every race in Mississippi in 2023, MFDW will host a virtual workshop that will cover everything you need to know about launching a campaign. : Jan. 7, 2023, at 2 p.m.Where: VirtualCost: Free Led by experienced campaign professionals, you'll learn about 2023 election positions and qualifications, free training, pay, and filing deadlines. We'll also offer information on developing a campaign platform, building a campaign team, fundraising, and getting out the vote. This is a great opportunity for anyone who is interested in running for office, or who simply wants to learn more about the political process and recruit more Democrats to run for office. Please consider joining us for this informative and educational workshop. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out to Kelly Jacobs at . Thank you for your support,Dianne Black | | | | | | | | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

name: John Fetterman
subject: This team has always stepped up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, it's New Year's Eve, so I promise to keep this *very* short.
2022 was a big year, and we accomplished a LOT together. When I'm sworn in as Pennsylvania's next senator in just a few days, it will be thanks to the movement we built.
We're looking at our last FEC deadline of 2022 in just a few hours. We set a goal of 15,000 donations before 11:59 PM tonight, and we're still falling just short.
But I believe in us — I know that time and time again, this team has stepped up and reached every goal we set. 🙏🙏
**[So Derek, before the ball drops, could you make a contribution to help us reach our end-of-year goal? This is the last time I'll ask for your support this year.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221231-1?refcode=em20221231-1-8192&refcode2=8192_434096_U7MIFR&akid=8192%2E434096%2EU7MIFR)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221231-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221231-8192&refcode2=8192_434096_U7MIFR&akid=8192%2E434096%2EU7MIFR)**
Thank you!
— John 💛
John Fetterman
Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221231-8192-footer&t=1&refcode2=8192_434096_U7MIFR&akid=8192%2E434096%2EU7MIFR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8192%2E434096%2EU7MIFR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8192%2E434096%2EU7MIFR)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

When I'm sworn in as Pennsylvania's next senator in just a few days, it will be thanks to the movement we built. We're looking at our last FEC deadline of 2022 in just a few hours. We set a goal of 15,000 donations before 11:59 PM tonight, and we're still falling just short. But I believe in us — I know that time and time again, this team has stepped up and reached every goal we set. 🙏🙏 Thank you! — John 💛 John Fetterman Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.

body:

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: A great year for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
> _We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC._
Friend,

From the war in Ukraine, to the uncertain state of the economy, to continued attacks on our institutions, it’s clear that we’re facing major challenges. But let’s be clear about something: **2022 was a great year for our democracy.** Because of your unwavering support, we had the resources necessary to defeat conspiracy theorists and election deniers in key swing states, up and down the ballot. You helped us amplify the message of the January 6 Committee. And you’re helping us keep up the pressure on Trump and his allies to the point where many Republicans are thinking twice about supporting Trump’s 2024 presidential run. We’ve seen the power we have together to stand up to the MAGA takeover of the GOP. We know we can stop them from destroying our democracy. Thank you for helping keep our democracy strong and secure this year. I’m also counting on you to be right there with us in 2023. Happy New Year, and thank you for your support. Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

clean_body: | We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC. Friend, From the war in Ukraine, to the uncertain state of the economy, to continued attacks on our institutions, it’s clear that we’re facing major challenges. But let’s be clear about something: 2022 was a great year for our democracy. Because of your unwavering support, we had the resources necessary to defeat conspiracy theorists and election deniers in key swing states, up and down the ballot. You helped us amplify the message of the January 6 Committee. And you’re helping us keep up the pressure on Trump and his allies to the point where many Republicans are thinking twice about supporting Trump’s 2024 presidential run. We’ve seen the power we have together to stand up to the MAGA takeover of the GOP. We know we can stop them from destroying our democracy. Thank you for helping keep our democracy strong and secure this year. I’m also counting on you to be right there with us in 2023. Happy New Year, and thank you for your support. Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Midterm Elections Update
subject: the bad news for Democrats in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Team, despite Senator Warnock’s victory, not all of the news coming out of Georgia is good for Democrats.

Earlier this year, a court held that Georgia’s congressional maps likely violated the Voting Rights Act, but the maps were allowed to remain in place anyway because of the Supreme Court’s decision. **As a result, Georgia voters were forced to vote in an election with manipulated maps – and it could have cost Democrats the House majority.** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56689419/385751958/-1417996814?amount=30&refcode=20221229.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhZGUyMWYzLTM0ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GvNYOa5ZQveiR8ec5g8Xm4YS5K4uMM_lSsQ5RbM6mFE=)**
---
**Even though Raphael Warnock won more than 50% of the statewide vote, congressional Democrats won _just 35% of Georgia’s House seats_.** Considering that Republicans took control of the House of Representatives by a razor-thin margin, fair maps in a state like Georgia could have made the difference.
**Team, Senator Warnock’s victory has PROVEN that Georgia is a purple state._Georgia’s congressional maps should reflect that._**

[**_That’s why the NDRC is fighting across the country to stop Republicans from using map manipulation to gain unearned power in places like Georgia. Will you pitch in now to support all our efforts?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56689423/385751973/-1417996814?amount=30&refcode=20221229.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhZGUyMWYzLTM0ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GvNYOa5ZQveiR8ec5g8Xm4YS5K4uMM_lSsQ5RbM6mFE=)
