name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: No matter one's faith, if any, it only takes common decency to do the opposite of Texas Gov. Greg Abbott. To not purposely dump kids into the streets in temperatures that cause frostbite to exposed skin in minutes. As the National Immigration Law Center (NILC) tweeted, "seeking asylum is a human right--regardless of who you are and where you're from."
body:
Inhumane and evil
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb88f72a2-7ab9-4c55-b135-8902b20e1155/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Texas Governor Greg Abbott calls himself a Christian. He seems closer to a devil. His behavior towards immigrants arriving in Texas has been unconscionable, inexcusable, and evil._ This morally scarred misanthrope, like many of his Republican brethren, likes to make a good show of Jesus' being his Savior. Yet, he apparently never read The Parable of the Good Samaritan, where his God commands Abbott to take care of those he finds penniless, harmed, lost and/or in need of sanctuary on the road. **_Abbott, being not simply a hypocrite, but a simmering, toxic ghoul, thrust poor, unsuspecting migrant children in t-shirts onto buses, sending them on an overnight journey to be dumped in front of the Vice President's home in Washington, D.C. in dangerously frigid temperatures. _** [**_Will you join us in helping those in need by giving $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to the NILC, who specifically help low-income immigrants and their families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted0e4aa6-69fc-4103-88e4-29755e053e83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _On Christmas, Ya know, as his Savior would've done._

| | No matter one's religion, or whether they practice any, _**it only takes knowing right from wrong and common decency to do the opposite of Abbott. To not purposely dump kids into the streets in temperatures that cause frostbite to exposed skin in minutes. **As the National Immigration Law Center (NILC) tweeted, "seeking asylum is a human right--regardless of who you are and where you're from."_ Damn right. [**_Let's be better--Far Better--than human oil-spill Abbott this holiday season. In the emergency situation he created, will you join us in helping those in need by giving $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to the NILC, who specifically help low-income immigrants and their families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9734586-2cb4-44c6-b57e-5cc238247916/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your kindness, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. clean_body: Inhumane and evil | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Texas Governor Greg Abbott calls himself a Christian. He seems closer to a devil. His behavior towards immigrants arriving in Texas has been unconscionable, inexcusable, and evil. This morally scarred misanthrope, like many of his Republican brethren, likes to make a good show of Jesus' being his Savior. Yet, he apparently never read The Parable of the Good Samaritan, where his God commands Abbott to take care of those he finds penniless, harmed, lost and/or in need of sanctuary on the road. Abbott, being not simply a hypocrite, but a simmering, toxic ghoul, thrust poor, unsuspecting migrant children in t-shirts onto buses, sending them on an overnight journey to be dumped in front of the Vice President's home in Washington, D.C. in dangerously frigid temperatures. On Christmas, Ya know, as his Savior would've done. | | | | | | | | | No matter one's religion, or whether they practice any, it only takes knowing right from wrong and common decency to do the opposite of Abbott. To not purposely dump kids into the streets in temperatures that cause frostbite to exposed skin in minutes. As the National Immigration Law Center (NILC) tweeted, "seeking asylum is a human right--regardless of who you are and where you're from." Damn right. name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Hear me out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

I have a question for you,
Peter.

If you knew that chipping in
a $3
donation *right now* could help us cover our budget as we close out the
year here at Justice Democrats... would you donate?

What if I told you that if you donated $3 to Justice
Democrats *right now* it would directly go to funding our 2024 Candidate
Recruitment efforts?

Since 2018, Justice Democrats has been dedicated to recruiting progressive
leaders to take on the establishment. And we rely on grassroots supporters
like you,
Peter, to have the resources we
need to help progressive candidates win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123971?refcode=em20221231-26821&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26821%2E1203867%2EpcPGpi ]If you’re ready to make a real difference in the future of our
politics, please make a contribution today to help us reach our $75,000
end-of-year goal by midnight tonight. Will you rush a contribution of
$3 or more?

Are you still reading? Okay, here are some more important things to know
about JD:

* This year, with your support, we helped re-elect the Squad and expand
our bloc by supporting Greg Casar and Summer Lee.
* We were the organization to recruit Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, AOC, and
Summer to run for Congress in the first place. We support our
candidates from day one to defeat entrenched incumbents.
* When we say we’re a grassroots organization supported by activists
across the country, we mean it. We strongly believe that the way we
fund our organization matters, and that’s why we’re proud to say we
have an average contribution of $18.35 this year.

Now that I’ve told you all that, what do you think,
Peter? [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123971?refcode=em20221231-26821&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26821%2E1203867%2EpcPGpi ]Can we count on you
to make your first
donation of $3 or more by midnight tonight? Every donation
helps, no matter the amount.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123971?refcode=em20221231-26821&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26821%2E1203867%2EpcPGpi ]Contribute $3

If you can’t give at all, I understand. No matter what, thank you so much
for your support this year, and I can’t wait to see what we do together
next year.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26821%2E1203867%2EpcPGpi ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26821%2E1203867%2EpcPGpi ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221231-26821-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26821_1203867_pcPGpi&akid=26821%2E1203867%2EpcPGpi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26821%2E1203867%2EpcPGpi

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
We still have to publicly report how much we’ve raised in this post-election period of 2022.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15602%2E3422442%2EpCWzoA)
Happy New Year’s Eve, Derek! We'll keep this short...**[can you contribute $20.23 to Katie Porter’s campaign before we head into the new year?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14209?refcode=EMAE31_NYE_20221231_V1_F&t=2&akid=15602%2E3422442%2EpCWzoA)**
**[Donate $20.23 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14209?refcode=EMAE31_NYE_20221231_V1_F&t=3&akid=15602%2E3422442%2EpCWzoA)**
Yes, the election just happened (and we’re so appreciative of every person who chipped in and helped us win). **But we still have to publicly report how much we’ve raised in this post-election period of 2022.** And just like each end of quarter deadline we email you about, pundits will be watching to see the strength of our movement. **[So if you can, consider chipping in $5 before midnight and help Team Porter start 2023 in a strong position.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14210?refcode=EMAE31_NYE_20221231_V1_F&t=4&akid=15602%2E3422442%2EpCWzoA)**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14210?refcode=EMAE31_NYE_20221231_V1_F&t=5&akid=15602%2E3422442%2EpCWzoA)**
Cheers to our victory in 2022 and onward to 2023. Happy New Year!
Team Porter

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=6&akid=15602%2E3422442%2EpCWzoA)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=15602%2E3422442%2EpCWzoA).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Something worth celebrating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
But we don’t know what’s ahead.
#
Peter,
We’ve made historic progress in Congress this year. Democrats delivered on promises to lower prescription drug prices, create new jobs, and confront climate change.
And with bipartisan support, we passed legislation like the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ and _CHIPS and Science Act_ , strengthening our economy and building a stronger future.
In January, a new year begins, and we don’t know what new challenges we’ll face. Now is the time to prepare to defend our progress in the months ahead.
I hope I can continue to count on your support.
**[Tonight is our last deadline of 2022. Please, chip in any amount you are able to give.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56691962/385757836/-1892388897?refcode=dd_em_221231_t1_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGIyNTEzZi0zYjg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OjtFGvWpHv3Dxzn5HXUVFZDJa7YTH7d8CfADe5UpnqA=)**

Dick Durbin

Team - Over a decade ago, the Supreme Court handed down its ruling in Citizens United, paving the way for unlimited, anonymous money to be spent in our elections.

The decision has been crippling for our democracy ever since – allowing special interests and billionaires to buy unparalleled influence over everyday, working Americans.

In 2022 alone, billionaires spent RECORD sums of money trying to prop up election-denying, Trump-backed Republicans.

We need grassroots supporters like you to fight back and join us in calling for a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United.

clean_body: | | = | | Team - Over a decade ago, the Supreme Court handed down its ruling in Citizens United, paving the way for unlimited, anonymous money to be spent in our elections. The decision has been crippling for our democracy ever since – allowing special interests and billionaires to buy unparalleled influence over everyday, working Americans. In 2022 alone, billionaires spent RECORD sums of money trying to prop up election-denying, Trump-backed Republicans. We need grassroots supporters like you to fight back and join us in calling for a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United. | Team DASS | = Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. There are 27 Secretaries of State races this year. We're fighting to reelect 13 Democratic Secretaries of State, win in battleground states, and flip red seats blue. But we're relying on grassroots supporters to provide us with the resources we need to win nationwide. = =

I hope you’re enjoying the holiday, Peter. As 2022 comes to a close, I wanted to take a moment and express my sincere gratitude for all of the support you’ve shown over the past year. While there’s certainly so much to celebrate and be grateful for, I'm headed into 2023 knowing that we still have work to do – in our fight to defend our basic freedoms, the integrity of our democracy, and to improve the lives of hard-working families across the country. I’m looking forward to what the new year brings, but for now, I hope we all get a chance to take a breather and connect with our loved ones. So, from the entire team here at Rollins HQ, we wish you a happy holiday and a safe new year! All our best, – Will

| Peter,

We did not want you to miss Linda’s last message.

The final 2022 FEC deadline is _**TONIGHT,**_ and Linda needs your support to prepare for any challenges that may come our way.

Linda is ready to fight back against Republican attacks on working families in California and across the country. [_**But she can’t do it without your support. In anticipation of the new year, will you invest early in our campaign to help us hit our fundraising goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56721340/385806107/-1667771348?refcode=BLU-SAN-20221231-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA2MzcxNS02ODg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvOyzUNfOfJoVexdh0udE8HWW2WeSWCjWC8Gu7AgTLc=)

* * *
Peter,

We’ve almost made it through another year, and I couldn’t be happier to continue representing California’s 38th district.

| | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. name: Garrett Soldano
subject: Happy New Year
body:
Let's DOMINATE 2023
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---

|
---
| | | |
---
# Endorsement ALERT
|
---

|
---
**A lot of people don 't know this, but I was going to turn down ****Matt DePerno 's offer to be his Co-Chair.**
|
---
I know, SHOCKING. It wasn't until I sat down with Matt and he explained his vision for our Republican Party. You see, running a successful campaign is hard enough, but it is especially hard when you don't get any support from your own party.Unfortunately, Matt and I experienced this first hand with our own campaigns. This is one of the many reasons I said YES to be his Co-Chair. Matt and I plan on, not only re-branding the MIGOP, but building a successful organization to support great conservative candidates as they run for their respective elections.But what REALLY sold me was his plan for the elections. We are no longer going to sit on the sidelines during election time and just tell people to show up and vote. We are going on the offensive. We will be motivating, inspiring and ACTIVATING Michigan's greatest asset, WE THE PEOPLE, to go out and get those voters.

|
---
## **Matt & I NEED your help.**
|
---
We need, not only your support, but also your financial skin in the game. We are building something special here in Michigan and we need all hands on deck. Click on the “DONATE NOW” button below. We appreciate any amount that you can do.

body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFhyrHYXaNJaec31Nsb_qaNf08_boLWQ8cJwyqX21vAFmAaPAbJUSJ2PNCDZ90_veAq-SVazxh_Y3X-S7zV9VsKt7XUNakzlZg43an5tJQbRu1oQTwyaSEeCXx0WkAmSgzBYU4GCBPElcrLs690y4XKTevd_ejILNuV8xkU05cQlIsEubuVh1hB2IcuDi0-4QyeZL9hrz7kShZicHmTeEbeCl_JWJWH3yaae3zkdDjFO/3sg/2s4z_z0WRJuOEwhZcVJqdA/h0/6L8-aZe4AzbpNWZvJ_W9P6aLylsrWMt6nYK1DwnOnAk)
---
Hi Peter, it’s Joe, campaign manager for Team Sorensen. I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution to Eric’s campaign before our end-of-year FEC deadline. But first, let me explain why today’s deadline is so important. Just 53 days ago, Eric was elected with 51.8% of the vote. The outcome was never anything close to a foregone conclusion.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFhyrHYXaNJaec31Nsb_qaMKkMLSStYRJ_LDSvnCGzukRKQe68-1WRPJzdJO1MZpAqFQCJe3GbPvLLPgOHg5ezzncK0AsMnNPbSfxVmIPW-DjFtcsN1wq1ze9mYa3M1y__7v_z_kmR3mESyXsCrIfxA86QjEblwZ11oTQKI_T9peU-pQNEKoMt3jvDMWzziKr0P0A3YvML379dvqX3oaQYqbhPUNrTb6u90ARudumMTZ/3sg/2s4z_z0WRJuOEwhZcVJqdA/h1/3i7Y6w-Kh9Fp2KUgiXPmlWGHNud1vWvwD-Q8QYNbcgo)
---
In a district like IL-17, it’s critical we start building grassroots support early. At midnight tonight, we close the books on the final fundraising quarter of 2022. After this deadline, we’ll send our public report to the FEC. How much we report is crucial for several reasons:
1. **Potential** **challengers will be watching closely:** They want to see whether we’re in good enough shape financially to ward off a challenge. With the razor-thin margins in our district, we need a show of strength now to set the stage for our re-election campaign.

2. **The media is paying attention:** This is a true swing district and has become a bellwether for Democrats’ standing around the country. If we report a lot of donations, it’ll demonstrate grassroots energy behind our ideas.

3. **Your donations help us grow:** These contributions help us increase the reach of our campaign. We use these funds to train volunteers in IL-17 and run digital advertisements highlighting Eric’s work across our community.

Bottom line: The numbers we report tonight are really important – especially because it’s early in our re-election effort. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your support. **[Will you contribute $5 or more before our midnight deadline? We’re just $2,190 from our quarterly goal, and every donation will go a long way in showing strength on the final public FEC report.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFhyrHYXaNJaec31Nsb_qaMbpbsLhZzb1FVO-hgH4FFkNx4q7WSKtvB3d4Q7wnwdh8S0X8wEqNzJ0NNR9SCMbhRSet3Ug20XHqaFxuPnGf2BnhW35DtzPI9JXTw6LjH0cPGRzReDh8XogvelNwn0DcncgpiJ87FEPXWHR-ybaeVa745X5BgBv9ie_KbXFX4jiI2YYxP0fCh3JtCT7gwGcOKYiejZ4XDEH6SWZAPwWVqz/3sg/2s4z_z0WRJuOEwhZcVJqdA/h2/mWhKiZ1P-f5VKFVV65gEOdXCndiMBaRRMoIHPtTPeRw)**
---
[ **Donate****$5** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFhyrHYXaNJaec31Nsb_qaMEz9sERRWcdYhLf9wyQ0vpgCQ8LRzNVe0CIYVBNBW8Ukcpju8Wz_elmpYM_wVnHgduFv4JXaIesLJaFBVqmMSxXN3XXlhzV8gwZo5O7nF7W2FSbVAOAGmR2ywQgOLxggYKP7OpLnT4XJL52DAO2mZMhc-pfviYspGJ0F3gFFaxhfmpf5y6bF0_0EeO4SvzpBxaFpGV3AaDGDgGY8aerREk/3sg/2s4z_z0WRJuOEwhZcVJqdA/h3/yodfjK51FADlvvtd-f1Lfo2BUgHBY56plMdHA_F7S9c)
---
Thank you for everything, Joe Goldberg Campaign Manager Eric Sorensen for Congress
---
[ **Donate** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFhyrHYXaNJaec31Nsb_qaOOEn6DUIeG67XDDjHv_Gy4Sk4HOX8ZRkfkSr_60YxjhA1ujsYDcS-ZsRl2C2dUJjA98rMFnCAbOyJHoaVy3nfmKYycFYyD3UuqzL8FYIE3L1717usGnhPqu_pMK_CcngcysW4hIMdr5dM1E6aPM33LHlirDmY68Z8qkpfrTksaGUJglbKNfoWEjgikThSMklRQIFsmdXzFMWUMb6xMJFs7/3sg/2s4z_z0WRJuOEwhZcVJqdA/h4/0WY34FutDm6enIec7tgeFpePuCsSkEH7ns7TaL1FdDU)

| Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
---

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. clean_body: | | Hi Peter, it’s Joe, campaign manager for Team Sorensen. I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution to Eric’s campaign before our end-of-year FEC deadline. But first, let me explain why today’s deadline is so important. Just 53 days ago, Eric was elected with 51.8% of the vote. The outcome was never anything close to a foregone conclusion. | In a district like IL-17, it’s critical we start building grassroots support early. At midnight tonight, we close the books on the final fundraising quarter of 2022. After this deadline, we’ll send our public report to the FEC. How much we report is crucial for several reasons: 1. Potential challengers will be watching closely: They want to see whether we’re in good enough shape financially to ward off a challenge. With the razor-thin margins in our district, we need a show of strength now to set the stage for our re-election campaign. 2. The media is paying attention: This is a true swing district and has become a bellwether for Democrats’ standing around the country. If we report a lot of donations, it’ll demonstrate grassroots energy behind our ideas. 3. Your donations help us grow: These contributions help us increase the reach of our campaign. We use these funds to train volunteers in IL-17 and run digital advertisements highlighting Eric’s work across our community. Bottom line: The numbers we report tonight are really important – especially because it’s early in our re-election effort. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your support. Thank you for everything, Joe Goldberg Campaign Manager Eric Sorensen for Congress | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. | |
# **WASHINGTON, D.C.**
Friends, I hope you all have had a wonderful holiday season! Laura and I have been blessed to spend time with our family and most recently, show our kids around Washington, D.C. We arrived a few days early to our nation's Capital before swearing-in to explore, learn, and enjoy time together. From the plane ride, to Lincoln and Vietnam Memorials, to Smithsonian museums, to family dinners and board games, we have enjoyed every moment. On Tuesday, I will be sworn-in as a member of the 118th United States Congress representing Arizona’s 6th congressional district. I am humbled and grateful for the outpouring of support, prayers and love throughout the election and before. This wouldn’t be possible without your support. So Laura, Zoe, Juan David, Kenny, Lily, Lucas, and Gloria all want to say THANK YOU!! Thank you for your friendship, your contributions, and your belief in our vision. I look forward to all 2023 has in store for us! Happy New Year! ¡Feliz Año Nuevo! Juan

clean_body: We know the GOP is continuing to put everything they’ve got into stopping President Biden and our Democratic agenda to lower costs and protect our fundamental rights. | | Derek -- we’ll cut to the chase: With hours to go until midnight, this is your last opportunity of the year to donate $10 (or any amount) to reserve your Official 2023 DNC Membership Card. All year long, we’ve been making investments in organizing and voter protection to ensure Democrats win at the ballot box -- and that work doesn’t end just because the 2022 elections are over. We’ve got to keep going. We know the GOP is continuing to put everything they’ve got into stopping President Biden and our Democratic agenda to lower costs and protect our fundamental rights. Grassroots supporters are funding our work to counter their attacks nationwide, and we need you to commit before tonight’s final deadline of the year. Hundreds of thousands of Democrats nationwide have donated millions of dollars to carry Democrats to victory this year. Now it’s your turn to join the team. There’s too much at stake next year to take our foot off the gas now, Derek. Thank you so much in advance. Happy New Year, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, ** , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

clean_body: | | | Peter, I hope you’re enjoying your New Year’s Eve! I wanted to reach out to you because we have just HOURS until our end of year deadline, and we’re STILL not at our goal. Peter, you’ve been such a dedicated patriot in 2022. I don’t want you to let us fall behind now. In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) \-------Forwarded Message------- From: Mike Waltz Date: December 29, 2022 Subject: One last chance Peter, I can’t believe it... we’re just THREE DAYS away from our FINAL deadline of the year. Peter, how we do in this final push will have a MAJOR impact on Republicans’ year in 2023. If we finish with strong numbers, we’ll be showing America that grassroots patriots are READY to get to work. But if we fall short, it will look like we’re losing traction - and the radical Left will SEIZE on our shortcoming. It’s been a great year to be a Republican, Peter. We took back the House and elected strong conservative leaders across America... and it’s all thanks to YOU. Now, it’s time to solidify our work once and for all and go into 2023 strong. | | In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) | | Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: end of year debt reporting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. That debt will be publicly reported after the end of the year.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.Kj_kSg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)
_Hi – Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and the amount we owe will be publicly reported at the end of the year. If you could give $10 right now to Adam Schiff and me to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link:**[secure.actblue.com/donate/dec2022_abs_em_hassan](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.2wUsRw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)**_
Derek – GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to win. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding we needed would come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding _didn’t_ come through and now my campaign has a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. That debt will be publicly reported after the end of the year. Since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to help shrink the number.
**[Will you please split $10 or as much as you can between my campaign and Adam Schiff’s to help us retire our debt? I’d be grateful for anything you can give.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.2wUsRw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Maggie Hassan and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.xJndYL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.ctFNzz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.2nykqu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.oa3PdW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.rpqHwJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.Kj_kSg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=12&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)
---
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off once and for all.
If you’re able to help, you can donate here: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/dec2022_abs_em_hassan](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em_hassan.Kj_kSg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=13&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)**
Thank you for your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1534%2E5257348%2E6sktCS)**

Peter,
We know today is New Year's Eve, so we’ll make it brief.
Earlier this week, we told you about our goal to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight. That deadline is now in less than 9 hours — but, as of writing this email, we're $1,000 away from reaching our goal.

name: Josh (personal)
subject: asking for your support before midnight!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
As we’re about the ring in the new year, our end-of-year fundraising deadline is just a few hours away, and I wanted to take this opportunity to tell you why it’s so important.

When I first got to Congress, it was against all odds. I faced a powerful far-right incumbent, and everyone assumed he’d win again. I won an upset because we worked together and demonstrated there was a better way of doing things in Washington.

I’ve been living up to that promise ever since I got to Congress. I co-founded the Problem Solvers Caucus to help bridge the partisan divide, and worked to find common ground whenever possible.

But there’s a side effect to my work: it angers the partisans who only care about their extreme agendas. They see me as a threat to the system, and they’re already planning to send opponents after me. I know because they’ve done it before.

That’s where this $10,000 goal comes in. To defend this seat and keep it in the hands of a problem solver, we’ll need to be prepared for the new cycle as soon as possible. With $10K in the bank, we can say to the challengers: bring it on.

We’re just $2,356 away, and time’s running out. Will you help us close the gap before the clock strikes midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2212?amount=]

From my family to yours, thank you for all that you do and have a safe and healthy New Year!

Yours,

Josh

Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Unwanted pregnancy is a common cause of extreme mother & child poverty, which can lead to lifelong trauma for children or set off a vicious, downward spiral of financial catastrophe for entire families. Help women take control of their reproductive decisions for the New Year?
body:
Prevent a vicious cycle
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66e6a216-9bf7-4c82-bbeb-ac7a9a8f4be6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, During a holiday season that’s been more challenging than many of us hoped, we all want to do anything we can to help those who are suffering. __After the cruel Dobbs decision by the Supreme Court, we're naturally thinking of pregnant women forced to become mothers, even though it sends their families into poverty. Or hiding from those reading their social media posts and spying on their behavior in anti-abortion police-states, all to turn them into Republican Big Brother running their local or state government in the hope of collecting some kind of sick bounty.__ _This is where the National Network of Abortion Funds (NNAF) steps in. They ensure that women, no matter their geography, gerrymandered state legislature, economic status or any other factors have access to their most basic right--control of their bodies. _ **_An unplanned pregnancy is often a significant factor in dire, intractable family poverty, and economic insecurity so severe that it causes children lifelong trauma. Giving women back control over their reproductive futures can help entire families, and in the end it helps all of us live in stronger, more stable communities._** [**Can you give $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure these women don't become cautionary statistics, but thrive?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44513292-8a2c-4f26-92de-e70b7b03fb52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Support abortion access**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03f46c8d-c4a1-401f-accd-ea5141ee1acb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **__The Network helps with financial costs of the procedure, childcare, travel, translation (if necessary) and a place to stay. They are truly doing the work of the angels, continuing a long tradition that includes the underground railroad, to help those whom our government has abandoned or is actively trying to harm. __** **_Let's just be decent human beings--let that guide us as we care for others in the very same manner we'd hope they'd care for us, if we found ourselves in a similarly desperate, heartbreaking situation._** [**Can you give $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure these women don't become cautionary statistics, but thrive?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b76f31b-8140-4945-9e1c-6fc331b1add7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your compassion, Cliff
---

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1fb2788-f2f3-4d81-bda4-8631289c8482/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Giffords.org
subject: FINAL CALL: It’s your last chance to donate to Giffords PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re just hours away from our final fundraising deadline of the year
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221231-2-15&t=1&akid=3099%2E3935704%2E_Qk07P)
We’re just hours away from the most critical fundraising deadline we’ve faced yet this year.
[**Before we ring in the New Year tonight, please contribute $3 or anything you can to Giffords PAC right away before our end of year fundraising deadline at midnight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221231-2-15&t=2&akid=3099%2E3935704%2E_Qk07P)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec22.xfoOYP&refcode=em221231-2-15&amount=3&t=3&akid=3099%2E3935704%2E_Qk07P)**
We need to finish the year with strong numbers that show we are a coalition ready to take on the gun lobby and demand change from our newly elected Congress.
We deserve a better future—a future free from gun violence—and we’re going to keep fighting for it. But we can’t do this work without your support.
So please, don’t miss this opportunity to make your final donation of the year to Giffords PAC and help us reach our end of year fundraising goal.
**You can use this link to donate:**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Last-Chance-2022**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221231-2-15&t=4&akid=3099%2E3935704%2E_Qk07P)
Thank you. With your help, we can cross the finish line and reach our goals for the year.
\- The team at Giffords PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=3099%2E3935704%2E_Qk07P) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Julia, Finance Director (via Justice Democrats)
subject: Keeping track of the numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this wasn’t
the email I had hoped to send to you today.

It’s my job to keep track of Justice Democrats' fundraising and make sure
we raise enough each month to cover our costs and plan for the long-term.
But, I have some tough news, this year we raised 17.3% less over ActBlue
than in 2021.

As a result of this dip in our numbers, it’s crucial that we reach our
$75,000 end-of-year fundraising goal. We don’t have corporate PACs or
billionaire donors to turn to if we fall short.

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, or Cori Bush in
Congress. Justice Democrats recruited each of these leaders to run and win
and we’re building the infrastructure for even more grassroots candidates
to do the same.

We can’t continue to fall short of our fundraising goals. The success of
our 2024 Candidate Recruitment is on the line and if we fall short of our
end-of-year goal, we’re going to need to take a look at budget cuts for
2023.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123987?refcode=em20221231-26833&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26833%2E1203867%2EYImlP5 ]So with that in mind, will you contribute $3 right now?
Every single donation will make a difference.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123987?refcode=em20221231-26833&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26833%2E1203867%2EYImlP5 ]Contribute $3

We don’t take this work lightly — we know what we’re up against, and we do
everything in our power to set our candidates up for success. There’s no
other organization that does what we do. But our work is only possible
because of your grassroots support.

More soon,

Julia Eddy
Finance Director, Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=26833%2E1203867%2EYImlP5 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=26833%2E1203867%2EYImlP5 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221231-26833-footer&t=1023&refcode2=26833_1203867_YImlP5&akid=26833%2E1203867%2EYImlP5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=26833%2E1203867%2EYImlP5

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Peter's file
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our final fundraising goal of 2022 is coming up at midnight tonight. So we wanted to check in with you to share your supporter record.
#
Can you believe it? Our final fundraising goal of 2022 is coming up at midnight TONIGHT.
**So we wanted to check in with you to share your 2022 supporter record.** Here's what we have on file for you, Peter:
**2022 Supporter Record for Peter**
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2022 Donor?:** No — not yet!**
****2022 Total:** $0
**Suggested donation:** $3
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20221231.xm6EK6&refcode=em20221231-2011&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2011%2E420207%2E8u8EJc)**
_(FYI: If you donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!)_
There's so much at stake. Pramila is still fighting for the legislation because working people are counting on Congress to deliver — from student debt cancellation to an assault weapons ban, to the Child Tax Credit. She's continued her fierce advocacy for Democrats in the Senate to immediately end the filibuster and protect abortion rights, expand health care, and more. And she's never shied away from opposing excessive, bloated military spending that takes even more money away from our communities.
As we turn to 2023 and a Republican-controlled House, we need to continue to strengthen our progressive coalition in Congress — plans that require us to make necessary, early investments right now to see them through. **But that means we can't afford to lose our momentum in fundraising — and we need to meet every fundraising goal from here on out,_especially the last fundraising goal of the year._**
[**Can I count on you to make your first donation to this campaign of $3 or any amount toward our end-of-year goal of $900,000 to help us close out the year strong?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20221231.xm6EK6&refcode=em20221231-2011&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2011%2E420207%2E8u8EJc)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20221231.xm6EK6&refcode=em20221231-2011&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2011%2E420207%2E8u8EJc)**
Thank you for giving at such a pivotal moment for our movement!
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221231-2011-footer&t=24&refcode2=2011_420207_8u8EJc&akid=2011%2E420207%2E8u8EJc)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: It’s our last chance to meet the moment and hit our December 2022 goal. | Derek, In just a few hours, we’ll say goodbye to 2022. It was a big year for Democrats in Virginia, but 2023 will be even bigger. We need to expand our State Senate majority, retake the State House, and continue working to hold Glenn Youngkin and the GOP accountable. We’ll be fighting to protect abortion rights, expand access to healthcare, and put working-class folks first. 2023 will be a big year for Democrats – and we’re going to need your help. But before the clock strikes midnight and we change our calendars, we have one final deadline to meet. Tonight, we hit our final deadline of 2022 – and with so much on the line in 2023, we can’t afford to fall short. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** Don’t miss your chance to add your name to our list of 2022 Democratic donors – and to help Virginia Democrats head into 2023 with the momentum needed to win in every corner of the Commonwealth. = See you in 2023, Virginia Democrats =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20221231 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20221231]
Friend,
As 2023 approaches, I wanted to take one final moment to say thank you for all of your support over the last year.
One reason I do these emails is to draw back the curtain on what it’s like to run a campaign, and what it’s like to work in Congress. In the years since taking office, I’ve really enjoyed the feedback we hear from those who take the time to read our messages.
And you’re truly reading from all over! I received a very sweet letter from Ellen after the election, a Michigander living all the way in Alaska. Here's an excerpt that really brought a smile to my face:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87595/images/ellen%20letter.jpg]
So, thank you Ellen and every other person who reads these notes. And I hope you’ve all had some time to relax and enjoy time with loved ones this holiday season.
Happy New Year!
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she was elected to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook and Twitter.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: The Last Day and last FEC Deadline of 2022
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
It’s New Year’s Eve — the last day of a very eventful year! It is also the last day in the FEC reporting period for this year, and the first in the 2024 election cycle!
We’re so grateful for all #TeamLizzie did this year to help us run a strong campaign and send Lizzie back to Washington so she can build on the important work she’s doing for Texans and for all Americans — from lowering health care costs to protecting access to reproductive health care itself, and so much more.
As we reach the end of the year, we are so grateful for your support. None of the work we do can happen without people like you stepping up and getting involved. And we hope you’ll consider making a contribution ahead of the final FEC deadline of the year. The money we raise today will help us go into the 2024 election cycle in a strong place, and build on the work we’ve done over the last four years. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf221231?refcode=folf221231_nd]
Thank you for all you do, and best wishes for a very happy new year!
Thanks,
Team Lizzie

We’re so grateful for all #TeamLizzie did this year to help us run a strong campaign and send Lizzie back to Washington so she can build on the important work she’s doing for Texans and for all Americans — from lowering health care costs to protecting access to reproductive health care itself, and so much more. As we reach the end of the year, we are so grateful for your support. None of the work we do can happen without people like you stepping up and getting involved. And we hope you’ll consider making a contribution ahead of the final FEC deadline of the year. The money we raise today will help us go into the 2024 election cycle in a strong place, and build on the work we’ve done over the last four years. [] Thank you for all you do, and best wishes for a very happy new year! Thanks, Team Lizzie DONATE [] PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC. Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.lizziefletcher.com []

name: Andy Beshear
subject: My New Year’s resolution? I’ll tell you >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Here’s where we’re headed in 2023 Hey Peter,

We're just hours away from 2023. It's been a busy year; we've accomplished so much. But I want to take a moment to look forward.

Next year, we will continue the tremendous progress of the last several years. We'll keep rebuilding and strengthening our economy, creating new and good-paying jobs, investing in our education, and expanding access to affordable health care.

But many challenges lie ahead in 2023. We're about to enter an election year, and I'm already facing a dozen opponents, including a self-funded billionaire. It's only a matter of time before the attacks and dark money flood our commonwealth in an attempt to undo all the progress we've made.

We have a lot of work to do in 2023, and I'm counting on your support to hit the ground running in the election year. **So I'm asking you to please chip in to my 2023 re-election campaign before our final end-of-year fundraising deadline at midnight to help us protect the progress we've made for Kentucky >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-eoy-22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56710492/385789788/-1742588925?refcode=em22_221231_NYElf_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221231_NYElf_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU3OGM3Yy01Njg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFH3DWlc_rQ3J238Lfycov8lmYc586nB6E8gl3ErMnQ=)**

Thank you, and Happy New Year!

Andy

name: Claire
subject: two things before the end of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Team, before the year officially ends, I wanted to reach out and tell you about two things:

(1) What your grassroots support helped the NDRC accomplish in 2022, and

(2) What work we still have ahead of us in 2023.

**This is a longer email, and at the end of it I’m going to ask you to pitch in to help the NDRC hit our end-of-year fundraising goal so we can continue our work in the new year. If you’d like to do that now, you can use this special link:[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndrc-longgame_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56710335/385789553/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221231.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1ZTc4YzdjLTU2ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QOxVERQzwt0tdlxfYNg0l1ux3smaMS4Aml1zUumM3Fw=)** **_The NDRC’s Victories in 2022_**
* Democrats **flipped** state legislative chambers in Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania. And, **for the first time since 1934** , the president’s party didn’t lose a _single_ state legislative chamber!
* Our Democracy Defenders **defeated election deniers** in governors and secretary of state races in Arizona, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin, helping to secure the future of free and fair elections in critical swing states.
* As a result of these victories, more Americans will live in states fully controlled by Democrats than fully controlled by Republicans for the first time in _years!_

**The NDRC’s victories this November were made possible by the work our grassroots movement has been doing for years.** By continuing our efforts in 2023, we can lay the groundwork for many more Democratic victories in years to come. **_What’s Next for the NDRC in 2023_**
* In states like Alabama, Georgia, Louisiana, and Ohio, voters were _forced_ to participate in elections with maps that had already been ruled unconstitutional gerrymanders. In 2023, the NDRC is preparing for decisions in these cases and the redraws that may follow.
* In states like Michigan and Colorado, our fight for redistricting reforms paid off, and elections took place on some of the fairest maps in years. In 2023, the NDRC will continue fighting for redistricting reforms state by state.
* Across the country, Republicans have been _relentless_ in their assault on voting rights. Now that the GOP has won control of the House, we expect to see continued voter suppression efforts at the national level. The NDRC is fighting back by continuing to fight for every American’s right to vote.

[**_We’re in this fight for the long haul, team, and we hope you are too. Please, if you’re able, pitch in now to help us hit our end-of-year fundraising goal so we can keep up our democracy-saving work._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56710348/385789564/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221231.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1ZTc4YzdjLTU2ODktZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMjI0ODMyZTYxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QOxVERQzwt0tdlxfYNg0l1ux3smaMS4Aml1zUumM3Fw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| | Folks, I stepped away from New Years celebrations to reach out one last time. Our FEC deadline is in just a few hours and the stakes couldn’t be higher. We still have $940 to raise to reach our goal by midnight, and I simply cannot do this without your support. The incoming Republican House majority is preparing to pass the most radical pieces of legislation we’ve seen in generations and we must be prepared. I’m ready to fight tooth and nail to push back against them but I’d be lying if I said I could take them on alone. [**So before the ball drops and we ring in the New Year – I’m asking you to rush a contribution of $10 to help me reach my end-of-year goal. body:
There are only a few hours to go before the end of the year, and as of this morning we were still $24,699 away from reaching our end-of-year online fundraising goal. | | | Peter — As we head into 2023, a lot of us are thinking about the change that we want to see — about our resolutions. If you’re reading this email, odds are one thing you’ve resolved to do is to help build working class power in this country. **Our records for this email address show that you haven’t had a chance to pitch in yet in 2022 to help fuel our organizing, grow our movement, and elect WFP champions up and down the ballot.**
We know financial contributions aren't the only measure of your support, and we're so thankful for all of you who pitched in your time, skills, and energy in 2022. But the truth is that donations from supporters like you, no matter how big or small, are also critical to making sure we have the resources we need to fight back against Republican attacks on working people and advance our positive agenda wherever we can. There are only a few hours to go before the end of the year, and as of this morning we were still $24,699 away from reaching our end-of-year online fundraising goal. **[Before midnight tonight, will you make your first donation of 2022 to help grow our movement?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU6jxGP4DGqt6AmYcItqTUk1mXoT9-BbQ6Uho7urWphPUPIJId_3sbROOC1iQxHbJBr74ZEavk2pgUg65u_Ku9T-c5tJtBk40siC_KJ9RCsMjMXoWmmzAX9Cm1sYVfaNPNKhFQCjTLBYOC0CAuIAth2i71h4MpvmnDIkCmJoy5zAQ4-bIMAa7HU4eqOdHdywRGHyX1RLPrTuMS3uE_hLxq2i02d5yeaDZcVQoSWgyEa2mu5aLeB6eNfBqzoCeDkzLoj-N0IXQSrMSnyCxM6YIxsqfJ87SxXPusvwAyqaFjcBn3-kvJaAThcseEu1l5oXo0FknYDSAqk2U0kysx_F1BDzF1JxN4z0584EWg-LNCVuM/3sg/8Etg9KN4R-S-u3xbLHDfpQ/h0/bMscqWJ3TR2ksDipqq-cbxgB_xU9ib7RWwOGPClh7Zk)**

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Before the ball drops:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
I have a quick favor to ask

In just a few hours, we'll close the books on 2022.

[**To enter the new year (and election cycle) in a strong position, we need to raise $1,391 more by midnight. Will you please donate $10 right now to help us close the gap?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56718099/385794107/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221231EOY_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGU4NjNjNi01Yzg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GdyCdaG5GW3zD1cq5NLWhCO0WxSUnGiCWthnXsmhLZM=)

Democrats need only a 5-seat gain to recapture the House — but first, we need to make sure we hold on to swing districts like mine. And I'm going to be a top target for Republicans.

Whether it's healthcare, abortion rights, LGBTQ+ equality, or economic opportunity, I'm not backing down from fighting for our values. If you can help me continue the fight in the new year, against the far-right Republican House majority, I'd really appreciate it.

**Please pitch in a few dollars (or more) here:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_em**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56718100/385794108/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221231EOY_N_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGU4NjNjNi01Yzg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GdyCdaG5GW3zD1cq5NLWhCO0WxSUnGiCWthnXsmhLZM=)

Thank you so much,

Jennifer
Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States
